 6508 |  831 | function calcLive(){
 6509 |  832 |   // â”€â”€ Step 0 context fields â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 6510 |  833 |   const hasSector  = document.getElementById('sector').value?1:0;
 6511 |  834 |   const hasBizType = document.getElementById('bizType').value?1:0;
 6512 |  835 |   const hasGeo     = document.getElementById('geo').value?1:0;
 6513 |  836 |   const probLen    = document.getElementById('problem').value.length;
 6514 |  837 |   const probScore  = probLen>120?5:probLen>60?3:probLen>20?1:0;
 6515 |  838 |   const stageVal   = +(document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.dataset.val)||0;
 6516 |  839 | 
 6517 |  840 |   // Only score if context is filled
 6518 |  841 |   const contextFilled = hasSector&&hasBizType&&hasGeo;
 6519 |  842 | 
 6520 |  843 |   // â”€â”€ Read actual selected values from AI questions â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 6521 |  844 |   // Each select has data-w (weight) and returns v (1-5)
 6522 |  845 |   // We track which section each question belongs to via ID prefix
 6523 |  846 |   const selScores={d1:[],d2:[],d3:[],d4:[],d5:[],d6:[]};
 6524 |  847 | 
 6525 |  848 |   // Map question IDs to dimensions
 6526 |  849 |   // s1=Market Size(d1), s2=Audience(d2), s3=Competition(d3),
 6527 |  850 |   // s4=Revenue(d4), s5=Risk(d5), s6=GTM(d4), s7=PMF(d2), s8=SectorFit(d6)
 6528 |  851 |   const dimMap={'s1':'d1','s2':'d2','s3':'d3','s4':'d4','s5':'d5','s6':'d4','s7':'d2','s8':'d6','f1':'d1','f2':'d2','f3':'d3','f4':'d4','f5':'d5','f6':'d4','f7':'d2','f8':'d6'};
 6529 |  852 | 
 6530 |  853 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{
 6531 |  854 |     if(!el.value)return;
 6532 |  855 |     const v=+(el.value)||0;          // actual selected value 1-5
 6533 |  856 |     const w=+(el.dataset.w)||2;      // weight of this question
 6534 |  857 |     const prefix=el.id.replace(/q\d+$/,'').replace(/^s/,'s').slice(0,2); // e.g. s1, s2
 6535 |  858 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||dimMap[el.id.slice(0,2)]||'d1';
 6536 |  859 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w});
 6537 |  860 |   });
 6538 |  861 | 
 6539 |  862 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{
 6540 |  863 |     const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');
 6541 |  864 |     if(!on)return;
 6542 |  865 |     const v=+(on.dataset.val)||3;
 6543 |  866 |     const id=grp.id||'';
 6544 |  867 |     const prefix=id.slice(0,2);
 6545 |  868 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||'d1';
 6546 |  869 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w:2});
 6547 |  870 |   });
 6548 |  871 | 
 6549 |  872 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{
 6550 |  873 |     const section=el.closest('.sec');
 6551 |  874 |     const secId=section?.id||'sec1';
 6552 |  875 |     const secNum=+secId.replace('sec','')||1;
 6553 |  876 |     const dimKeys=['d1','d2','d3','d4','d5','d4','d2','d6'];
 6554 |  877 |     const dim=dimKeys[secNum-1]||'d6';
 6555 |  878 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v:4,w:1}); // checkboxes = moderate positive
 6556 |  879 |   });
 6557 |  880 | 
 6558 |  881 |   // â”€â”€ Calculate each dimension score (0-100) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 6559 |  882 |   function dimScore(key){
 6560 |  883 |     const items=selScores[key]||[];
 6561 |  884 |     if(!items.length)return null; // not yet answered
 6562 |  885 |     const totalW=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.w,0);
 6563 |  886 |     const weighted=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.v*i.w),0);
 6564 |  887 |     // weighted average on 1-5 scale â†’ convert to 0-100
 6565 |  888 |     return Math.round(((weighted/totalW)-1)/4*100);
 6566 |  889 |   }
 6567 |  890 | 
 6568 |  891 |   const d1=dimScore('d1'); // Market Size
 6569 |  892 |   const d2=dimScore('d2'); // Audience Quality
 6570 |  893 |   const d3=dimScore('d3'); // Competition Edge
 6571 |  894 |   const d4=dimScore('d4'); // Revenue Potential
 6572 |  895 |   const d5=dimScore('d5'); // Risk Profile
 6573 |  896 |   const d6=dimScore('d6'); // Sector Fit
 6574 |  897 | 
 6575 |  898 |   // â”€â”€ Context bonus (filling basics) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 6576 |  899 |   // Max 15 points for context â€” NOT for just having a sector selected
 6577 |  900 |   const contextBonus=contextFilled?(hasSector*3+hasBizType*3+hasGeo*2+probScore+Math.min(stageVal,5)):0;
 6578 |  901 | 
 6579 |  902 |   // â”€â”€ Overall score = weighted average of dims + context â”€
 6580 |  903 |   // Dims that haven't been answered yet are excluded from average
 6581 |  904 |   const answeredDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6].filter(v=>v!==null);
 6582 |  905 |   let overall=0;
 6583 |  906 |   if(!contextFilled||answeredDims.length===0){
 6584 |  907 |     // Nothing meaningful answered â€” score is 0
 6585 |  908 |     overall=0;
 6586 |  909 |   } else {
 6587 |  910 |     // Weighted: competition(d3) and revenue(d4) matter most
 6588 |  911 |     const weights=[15,20,25,25,10,5]; // d1 d2 d3 d4 d5 d6
 6589 |  912 |     const allDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
 6590 |  913 |     let wSum=0, wTotal=0;
 6591 |  914 |     allDims.forEach((v,i)=>{
 6592 |  915 |       if(v!==null){wSum+=v*weights[i];wTotal+=weights[i];}
 6593 |  916 |     });
 6594 |  917 |     const dimAvg=wTotal>0?wSum/wTotal:0;
 6595 |  918 | 
 6596 |  919 |     // Context bonus adds up to 15 points on top of dim average
 6597 |  920 |     // But only if at least 2 sections answered
 6598 |  921 |     const bonus=answeredDims.length>=2?Math.round(contextBonus/15*15):0;
 6599 |  922 |     overall=Math.min(100,Math.round(dimAvg*0.85+bonus));
 6600 |  923 | 
 6601 |  924 |     // Penalty: if less than 3 sections answered, cap score at 60
 6602 |  925 |     if(answeredDims.length<3)overall=Math.min(overall,60);
 6603 |  926 |     // Penalty: if problem statement too short, cap at 70
 6604 |  927 |     if(probLen<40&&overall>70)overall=70;
 6605 |  928 |   }
 6606 |  929 | 
 6607 |  930 |   // â”€â”€ Update UI â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 6608 |  931 |   const lsEl=document.getElementById('liveScore');
 6609 |  932 |   const lgEl=document.getElementById('liveGrade');
 6610 |  933 |   if(overall===0){
 6611 |  934 |     lsEl.textContent='0';lsEl.className='big-sc sc-zero';
 6612 |  935 |     lgEl.textContent='Fill in the form';lgEl.style.color='#9BAABB';
 6613 |  936 |     document.getElementById('topScoreWrap').style.display='none';
 6614 |  937 |     // Reset dim bars
 6615 |  938 |     ['bf1','bf2','bf3','bf4','bf5','bf6'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.style.width='0%';});
 6616 |  939 |     ['d1lbl','d2lbl','d3lbl','d4lbl','d5lbl','d6lbl'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.textContent='â€”';});
 6617 |  940 |     return;
 6618 |  941 |   }
 6619 |  942 |   lsEl.textContent=overall;
 6620 |  943 |   if(overall>=70){lsEl.className='big-sc sc-high';lgEl.textContent='High Potential âœ“';lgEl.style.color='#00A3A1';}
 6621 |  944 |   else if(overall>=45){lsEl.className='big-sc sc-mid';lgEl.textContent='Moderate Potential';lgEl.style.color='#E8A000';}
 6622 |  945 |   else{lsEl.className='big-sc sc-low';lgEl.textContent='Needs Strengthening';lgEl.style.color='#C8002D';}
 6623 |  946 | 
 6624 |  947 |   document.getElementById('topScoreWrap').style.display='flex';
 6625 |  948 |   document.getElementById('topScore').textContent=overall+'/100';
 6626 |  949 | 
 6627 |  950 |   // â”€â”€ Update individual dimension bars â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 6628 |  951 |   const dimVals=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
 6629 |  952 |   const dimColors=['#00338D','#0091DA','#E8A000','#005EB8','#6D2077','#00A3A1'];
 6630 |  953 |   ['bf1','bf2','bf3','bf4','bf5','bf6'].forEach((id,i)=>{
 6631 |  954 |     const el=document.getElementById(id);
 6632 |  955 |     if(!el)return;
 6633 |  956 |     const v=dimVals[i];
 6634 |  957 |     el.style.width=(v!==null?v:0)+'%';
 6635 |  958 |     el.style.background=dimColors[i];

 6637 |  960 |   ['d1lbl','d2lbl','d3lbl','d4lbl','d5lbl','d6lbl'].forEach((id,i)=>{
 6638 |  961 |     const el=document.getElementById(id);
 6639 |  962 |     if(!el)return;
 6640 |  963 |     const v=dimVals[i];
 6641 |  964 |     el.textContent=v!==null?v+'/100':'â€”';
 6642 |  965 |   });
 6643 |  966 | 
 6644 |  967 |   buildLiveInsights(overall,{d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6});
 6645 |  968 | }
 6646 |  969 | 
 6647 |  970 | function buildLiveInsights(t,dims){
 6648 |  971 |   const sec=document.getElementById('sector').value;
 6649 |  972 |   const geo=document.getElementById('geo').value;
 6650 |  973 |   const items=[];
 6651 |  974 |   dims=dims||{};
 6652 |  975 | 
 6653 |  976 |   // Score-based headline
 6654 |  977 |   if(t>=70)items.push('Strong overall market potential â€” fundamentals solid across answered dimensions.');
 6655 |  978 |   else if(t>=50)items.push('Moderate potential â€” see which dimensions below need strengthening.');
 6656 |  979 |   else if(t>=30)items.push('Several dimensions are weak â€” fill more steps to get precise guidance.');
 6657 |  980 |   else if(t>0)items.push('Early stage â€” complete all 9 steps for a full and accurate score.');
 6658 |  981 | 
 6659 |  982 |   // Dimension-specific insights â€” only shown when that dim is answered
 6660 |  983 |   const dimNames={d1:'Market Size',d2:'Audience Quality',d3:'Competition Edge',d4:'Revenue Potential',d5:'Risk Profile',d6:'Sector Fit'};
 6661 |  984 |   const weakDims=Object.entries(dims).filter(([,v])=>v!==null&&v<45).sort((a,b)=>a[1]-b[1]);
 6662 |  985 |   const strongDims=Object.entries(dims).filter(([,v])=>v!==null&&v>=70).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]);
 6663 |  986 | 
 6664 |  987 |   if(weakDims.length>0){
 6665 |  988 |     const [wk,wv]=weakDims[0];
 6666 |  989 |     items.push(`âš ï¸ ${dimNames[wk]} scores ${wv}/100 â€” your weakest dimension. Focus here first.`);
 6667 |  990 |   }
 6668 |  991 |   if(strongDims.length>0){
 6669 |  992 |     const [sk,sv]=strongDims[0];
 6670 |  993 |     items.push(`âœ… ${dimNames[sk]} scores ${sv}/100 â€” your strongest signal to lead with.`);
 6671 |  994 |   }
 6672 |  995 | 
 6673 |  996 |   // Sector-specific tips

 6849 | 1172 | 
 6850 | 1173 | /* Repair a truncated JSON string by closing any open structures */
 6851 | 1174 | function repairTruncatedJSON(s){
 6852 | 1175 |   // Walk the string tracking depth; truncate at last complete top-level section
 6853 | 1176 |   // Strategy: find the last occurrence of "}]}" or "}]," and close from there
 6854 | 1177 |   let best=s;
 6855 | 1178 |   // Try progressively shorter slices to find parseable JSON
 6856 | 1179 |   for(let i=s.length-1;i>s.length*0.4;i--){
 6857 | 1180 |     const c=s[i];
 6858 | 1181 |     if(c==='}'){
 6859 | 1182 |       try{
 6860 | 1183 |         const candidate=closeJSON(s.slice(0,i+1));
 6861 | 1184 |         JSON.parse(candidate);
 6862 | 1185 |         best=candidate;
 6863 | 1186 |         break;
 6864 | 1187 |       }catch(_){}
 6865 | 1188 |     }
 6866 | 1189 |   }
 6867 | 1190 |   return best;
 6868 | 1191 | }
 6869 | 1192 | 
 6870 | 1193 | function closeJSON(s){
 6871 | 1194 |   // Count open brackets/braces
 6872 | 1195 |   let depth=0; const stack=[];
 6873 | 1196 |   for(const c of s){
 6874 | 1197 |     if(c==='{'){stack.push('}');}
 6875 | 1198 |     else if(c==='['){stack.push(']');}
 6876 | 1199 |     else if(c==='}'||c===']'){stack.pop();}
 6877 | 1200 |   }
 6878 | 1201 |   // Close any trailing comma before we close
 6879 | 1202 |   let result=s.replace(/,\s*$/,'');
 6880 | 1203 |   return result+stack.reverse().join('');
 6881 | 1204 | }

 7700 | 2023 |   const shapedSeries=rawShare.map((s,i)=>{
 7701 | 2024 |     let data=[...s.data];
 7702 | 2025 |     const validVals=data.filter(v=>typeof v==='number'&&!isNaN(v));
 7703 | 2026 |     const mx=validVals.length?Math.max(...validVals):0;

 7705 | 2028 |     const spread=mx-mn;
 7706 | 2029 | 
 7707 | 2030 |     if(i===0){

 8340 | 2663 |       const cx=W/2, cy=100, R=72, sw=12;
 8341 | 2664 |       const pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,score))/100;

 8346 | 2669 |       const ex=cx+R, ey=cy;

 8474 | 2797 |     // Donut chart â€” pure SVG
 8475 | 2798 |     function donutSVG(data,W,cx,cy,OR,IR){
 8476 | 2799 |       const tot=data.reduce((s,d)=>s+(+d.v||0),0)||100;
 8477 | 2800 |       let ang=-Math.PI/2;
 8478 | 2801 |       return data.map((d,i)=>{
 8479 | 2802 |         const sw=(+d.v||0)/tot*2*Math.PI;
 8480 | 2803 |         if(sw<0.02){ang+=sw;return '';}
 8481 | 2804 |         const x1=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang),y1=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang);
 8482 | 2805 |         const x2=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y2=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
 8483 | 2806 |         const x3=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y3=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
 8484 | 2807 |         const x4=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang),y4=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang);
 8485 | 2808 |         const lg=sw>Math.PI?1:0;
 8486 | 2809 |         const mx=cx+(OR+IR)/2*Math.cos(ang+sw/2),my=cy+(OR+IR)/2*Math.sin(ang+sw/2);
 8487 | 2810 |         const pct=Math.round((+d.v||0)/tot*100);
 8488 | 2811 |         const lbl2=pct>=6?`<text x="${mx}" y="${my+3.5}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.95)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${pct}%</text>`:'';
 8489 | 2812 |         ang+=sw;
 8490 | 2813 |         return `<path d="M${x1},${y1} A${OR},${OR} 0 ${lg},1 ${x2},${y2} L${x3},${y3} A${IR},${IR} 0 ${lg},0 ${x4},${y4} Z" fill="${d.c}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5"/>${lbl2}`;
 8491 | 2814 |       }).join('');
 8492 | 2815 |     }

 8942 | ------------------------------------------------------------
 8943 | FILE: README.md
 8944 | ------------------------------------------------------------
 8945 |    1 | # Infopace â€” React + Supabase Edition
 8946 |    2 | 
 8947 |    3 | > AI-powered market intelligence assessment platform.
 8948 |    4 | > Built with React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Gemini AI + Supabase.
 8949 |    5 | 
 8950 |    6 | ---
 8951 |    7 | 
 8952 |    8 | ## What This App Does
 8953 |    9 | 
 8954 |   10 | 1. **Onboarding Form** â€” Collects user details (name, email, phone, organization, role, website, LinkedIn, team size, sector, geography, problem statement, stage)
 8955 |   11 | 2. **AI Assessment** â€” Generates 8 tailored question groups using Gemini AI, with a live market score panel updating as you answer
 8956 |   12 | 3. **Results Dashboard** â€” Full market intelligence dashboard with:
 8957 |   13 |    - Score donut + dimension bars + capability radar
 8958 |   14 |    - Revenue projection chart (conservative / base / optimistic)
 8959 |   15 |    - TAM / SAM / SOM estimates
 8960 |   16 |    - Competitor analysis
 8961 |   17 |    - Key AI-generated insights
 8962 |   18 |    - 90-day action plan
 8963 |   19 |    - Full printable report view
 8964 |   20 |    - Raw JSON data view
 8965 |   21 | 4. **Supabase Storage** â€” Every submission (user details + all answers + full analysis) is saved to your Supabase database
 8966 |   22 | 
 8967 |   23 | ---
 8968 |   24 | 
 8969 |   25 | ## Prerequisites
 8970 |   26 | 
 8971 |   27 | - Node.js 18+
 8972 |   28 | - A free [Gemini API key](https://aistudio.google.com) (already in `server.js`)
 8973 |   29 | - A free [Supabase](https://supabase.com) project
 8974 |   30 | 
 8975 |   31 | ---
 8976 |   32 | 
 8977 |   33 | ## Quick Start
 8978 |   34 | 
 8979 |   35 | ### Step 1 â€” Set up Supabase
 8980 |   36 | 
 8981 |   37 | 1. Create a free project at [supabase.com](https://supabase.com)
 8982 |   38 | 2. Go to **SQL Editor** and paste + run the contents of `supabase_setup.sql`
 8983 |   39 | 3. Go to **Settings â†’ API** and copy:
 8984 |   40 |    - **Project URL** (looks like `https://xxxx.supabase.co`)
 8985 |   41 |    - **anon / public key** (long JWT string)
 8986 |   42 | 
 8987 |   43 | ### Step 2 â€” Configure environment
 8988 |   44 | 
 8989 |   45 | ```bash
 8990 |   46 | cp .env.example .env
 8991 |   47 | ```
 8992 |   48 | 
 8993 |   49 | Edit `.env` and fill in your values:
 8994 |   50 | 
 8995 |   51 | ```env
 8996 |   52 | VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://YOUR_PROJECT_ID.supabase.co
 8997 |   53 | VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=YOUR_ANON_PUBLIC_KEY
 8998 |   54 | ```
 8999 |   55 | 
 9000 |   56 | ### Step 3 â€” Install dependencies
 9001 |   57 | 
 9002 |   58 | ```bash
 9003 |   59 | npm install
 9004 |   60 | ```
 9005 |   61 | 
 9006 |   62 | ### Step 4 â€” Run the app (two terminals)
 9007 |   63 | 
 9008 |   64 | **Terminal 1** â€” Start the Gemini proxy server (port 4000):
 9009 |   65 | ```bash
 9010 |   66 | node server.js
 9011 |   67 | ```
 9012 |   68 | 
 9013 |   69 | **Terminal 2** â€” Start the React dev server (port 3000):
 9014 |   70 | ```bash
 9015 |   71 | npm run dev
 9016 |   72 | ```
 9017 |   73 | 
 9018 |   74 | Open **http://localhost:3000**
 9019 |   75 | 
 9020 |   76 | The Vite dev server automatically proxies `/api` requests to `server.js` on port 4000.
 9021 |   77 | 
 9022 |   78 | ---
 9023 |   79 | 
 9024 |   80 | ## Project Structure
 9025 |   81 | 
 9026 |   82 | ```
 9027 |   83 | infopace-react/
 9028 |   84 | â”œâ”€â”€ server.js                    â† Gemini AI proxy (Node.js, port 4000)
 9029 |   85 | â”œâ”€â”€ supabase_setup.sql           â† Run once in Supabase SQL Editor
 9030 |   86 | â”œâ”€â”€ .env.example                 â† Copy to .env and fill in keys
 9031 |   87 | â”‚
 9032 |   88 | â”œâ”€â”€ index.html                   â† Vite entry HTML

 9052 |  108 | ```
 9053 |  109 | 
 9054 |  110 | ---
 9055 |  111 | 
 9056 |  112 | ## Data Saved to Supabase
 9057 |  113 | 
 9058 |  114 | Every completed assessment saves one row to the `submissions` table:
 9059 |  115 | 
 9060 |  116 | | Column | Type | Description |
 9061 |  117 | |---|---|---|
 9062 |  118 | | `id` | uuid | Auto-generated primary key |
 9063 |  119 | | `name` | text | Full name |
 9064 |  120 | | `email` | text | Email address |
 9065 |  121 | | `phone` | text | Phone number |
 9066 |  122 | | `organization` | text | Company name |
 9067 |  123 | | `role` | text | Job role |
 9068 |  124 | | `website` | text | Website URL |
 9069 |  125 | | `linkedin` | text | LinkedIn URL |
 9070 |  126 | | `team_size` | text | Team size bracket |
 9071 |  127 | | `sector` | text | e.g. "HealthTech", "B2B SaaS" |
 9072 |  128 | | `geography` | text | e.g. "PI" (Pan India), "GL" (Global) |
 9073 |  129 | | `problem` | text | Problem statement |
 9074 |  130 | | `stage` | text | Business stage (1â€“5) |
 9075 |  131 | | `answers` | jsonb | All question answers keyed by question ID |
 9076 |  132 | | `overall_score` | integer | Final market score (0â€“100) |
 9077 |  133 | | `grade` | text | e.g. "A", "B+", "C" |
 9078 |  134 | | `dimensions` | jsonb | Six dimension scores |
 9079 |  135 | | `analysis_json` | jsonb | Complete AI analysis (TAM/SAM/SOM, competitors, insights, action plan, projections) |
 9080 |  136 | | `created_at` | timestamptz | Submission timestamp |
 9081 |  137 | 
 9082 |  138 | ---
 9083 |  139 | 
 9084 |  140 | ## Production Deployment
 9085 |  141 | 
 9086 |  142 | ### Build the React app
 9087 |  143 | 
 9088 |  144 | ```bash
 9089 |  145 | npm run build
 9090 |  146 | ```
 9091 |  147 | 
 9092 |  148 | This creates a `dist/` folder.
 9093 |  149 | 
 9094 |  150 | ### Serve with server.js
 9095 |  151 | 
 9096 |  152 | Update `server.js` to serve the `dist/` folder as static files. Replace the static file section at the bottom of `server.js` with:
 9097 |  153 | 
 9098 |  154 | ```javascript
 9099 |  155 | // Serve React build
 9100 |  156 | let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
 9101 |  157 | 
 9102 |  158 | // For React Router â€” serve index.html for unknown routes
 9103 |  159 | const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', fp);
 9104 |  160 | fs.readFile(fullPath, (err, data) => {
 9105 |  161 |   if (err) {
 9106 |  162 |     // Fallback to index.html for client-side routing
 9107 |  163 |     fs.readFile(path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', 'index.html'), (e2, d2) => {
 9108 |  164 |       if (e2) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
 9109 |  165 |       res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'text/html' });
 9110 |  166 |       res.end(d2);
 9111 |  167 |     });
 9112 |  168 |     return;
 9113 |  169 |   }
 9114 |  170 |   res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fullPath)] || 'text/plain' });
 9115 |  171 |   res.end(data);
 9116 |  172 | });
 9117 |  173 | ```
 9118 |  174 | 
 9119 |  175 | Then run just `node server.js` â€” it serves both the API and the React app on port 4000.
 9120 |  176 | 
 9121 |  177 | ### Deploy options
 9122 |  178 | 
 9123 |  179 | - **Railway / Render / Fly.io** â€” push repo, set env vars, run `node server.js`
 9124 |  180 | - **Vercel** â€” deploy React app, add serverless function wrapping Gemini calls
 9125 |  181 | - **VPS** â€” clone repo, `npm run build`, run with `pm2 start server.js`
 9126 |  182 | 
 9127 |  183 | ---
 9128 |  184 | 
 9129 |  185 | ## Customisation
 9130 |  186 | 
 9131 |  187 | ### Change sectors / geographies
 9132 |  188 | Edit the `SECTORS` and `GEO` arrays at the top of `src/pages/OnboardingForm.jsx`.
 9133 |  189 | 
 9134 |  190 | ### Change AI models
 9135 |  191 | Edit `MODEL_FAST` and `MODEL_SMART` constants in `server.js`.
 9136 |  192 | 
 9137 |  193 | ### Change question count
 9138 |  194 | Edit the prompt in `src/lib/gemini.js` â†’ `generateQuestions()`.
 9139 |  195 | 
 9140 |  196 | ### Add email notifications
 9141 |  197 | After `saveSubmission()` in `AssessmentShell.jsx`, call a Supabase Edge Function or a service like Resend/SendGrid.
 9142 |  198 | 
 9143 |  199 | ---
 9144 |  200 | 
 9145 |  201 | ## Troubleshooting
 9146 |  202 | 
 9147 |  203 | | Problem | Fix |
 9148 |  204 | |---|---|
 9149 |  205 | | `/api` returns 500 | Check Gemini API key on line 8 of `server.js` |
 9150 |  206 | | Supabase save fails | Verify `.env` values and that `supabase_setup.sql` was run |
 9151 |  207 | | Questions don't load | Gemini API key may be rate-limited; fallback questions will show |
 9152 |  208 | | Blank dashboard | Open browser console â€” look for JSON parse errors in analysis response |
 9153 |  209 | 
 9154 |  210 | ---
 9155 |  211 |

 9188 |   25 |   '.html':'text/html', '.js':'application/javascript',

 9193 |   30 | function geminiRequest(model, promptText, callback) {
 9194 |   31 |   const payload = JSON.stringify({
 9195 |   32 |     contents: [{ parts: [{ text: promptText }] }],
 9196 |   33 |     generationConfig: {
 9197 |   34 |       temperature: 0.7,
 9198 |   35 |       maxOutputTokens: 8192,
 9199 |   36 |       responseMimeType: 'text/plain'
 9200 |   37 |     }
 9201 |   38 |   });
 9202 |   39 | 
 9203 |   40 |   const options = {
 9204 |   41 |     hostname: 'generativelanguage.googleapis.com',
 9205 |   42 |     path: `/v1beta/models/${model}:generateContent?key=${API_KEY}`,
 9206 |   43 |     method: 'POST',
 9207 |   44 |     headers: {
 9208 |   45 |       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
 9209 |   46 |       'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(payload)
 9210 |   47 |     }
 9211 |   48 |   };
 9212 |   49 | 
 9213 |   50 |   const req = https.request(options, res => {
 9214 |   51 |     let body = '';
 9215 |   52 |     res.on('data', c => body += c);
 9216 |   53 |     res.on('end', () => callback(null, res.statusCode, body));
 9217 |   54 |   });
 9218 |   55 |   req.on('error', e => callback(e, null, null));
 9219 |   56 |   req.write(payload);
 9220 |   57 |   req.end();
 9221 |   58 | }
 9222 |   59 | 
 9223 |   60 | http.createServer((req, res) => {
 9224 |   61 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*');
 9225 |   62 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, OPTIONS');
 9226 |   63 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type');
 9227 |   64 |   if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') { res.writeHead(204); res.end(); return; }
 9228 |   65 | 
 9229 |   66 |   // â”€â”€ /api â†’ Gemini proxy â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 9230 |   67 |   if (req.url === '/api' && req.method === 'POST') {
 9231 |   68 |     if (!API_KEY || API_KEY === 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE') {
 9232 |   69 |       res.writeHead(500, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
 9233 |   70 |       res.end(JSON.stringify({error:'Gemini API key not set. Edit line 8 of server.js'}));
 9234 |   71 |       return;
 9235 |   72 |     }
 9236 |   73 | 
 9237 |   74 |     let body = '';
 9238 |   75 |     req.on('data', c => body += c);
 9239 |   76 |     req.on('end', () => {
 9240 |   77 |       let payload;
 9241 |   78 |       try { payload = JSON.parse(body); }
 9242 |   79 |       catch(e) { res.writeHead(400); res.end('bad json'); return; }
 9243 |   80 | 
 9244 |   81 |       const type   = payload._type || 'analysis';
 9245 |   82 |       const prompt = payload.prompt || '';
 9246 |   83 |       const model  = type === 'questions' ? MODEL_FAST : MODEL_SMART;
 9247 |   84 | 
 9248 |   85 |       console.log('  â†’  ' + type + ' (' + model + ')');
 9249 |   86 | 
 9250 |   87 |       geminiRequest(model, prompt, (err, status, respBody) => {
 9251 |   88 |         if (err) {
 9252 |   89 |           console.log('  âŒ Network error:', err.message);
 9253 |   90 |           res.writeHead(502, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
 9254 |   91 |           res.end(JSON.stringify({error: err.message}));
 9255 |   92 |           return;
 9256 |   93 |         }
 9257 |   94 | 
 9258 |   95 |         const icon = status < 300 ? 'âœ…' : 'âŒ';
 9259 |   96 |         console.log('  ' + icon + '  ' + status + '  ' + type);
 9260 |   97 | 
 9261 |   98 |         if (status !== 200) {
 9262 |   99 |           try {
 9263 |  100 |             const e = JSON.parse(respBody);
 9264 |  101 |             console.log('      Error:', e.error?.message || respBody.slice(0,120));
 9265 |  102 |           } catch(_) { console.log('      Raw:', respBody.slice(0,120)); }
 9266 |  103 |         }
 9267 |  104 | 
 9268 |  105 |         // Convert Gemini response â†’ Anthropic-style response
 9269 |  106 |         // so the HTML parsing code works without changes
 9270 |  107 |         let anthropicStyle;
 9271 |  108 |         try {
 9272 |  109 |           const geminiData = JSON.parse(respBody);
 9273 |  110 |           const text = (geminiData?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts||[])
 9274 |  111 |             .map(p => p.text||'').join('');
 9275 |  112 |           // Wrap in Anthropic content format
 9276 |  113 |           anthropicStyle = JSON.stringify({
 9277 |  114 |             candidates: geminiData.candidates,
 9278 |  115 |             content: [{ type: 'text', text: text }]
 9279 |  116 |           });
 9280 |  117 |         } catch(_) {
 9281 |  118 |           anthropicStyle = respBody;
 9282 |  119 |         }
 9283 |  120 | 
 9284 |  121 |         res.writeHead(status, {
 9285 |  122 |           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
 9286 |  123 |           'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'
 9287 |  124 |         });
 9288 |  125 |         res.end(anthropicStyle);
 9289 |  126 |       });
 9290 |  127 |     });
 9291 |  128 |     return;
 9292 |  129 |   }
 9293 |  130 | 
 9294 |  131 |   // â”€â”€ Static files â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 9295 |  132 |   let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
 9296 |  133 |   fp = path.join(process.cwd(), fp);
 9297 |  134 |   fs.readFile(fp, (err, data) => {
 9298 |  135 |     if (err) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
 9299 |  136 |     res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fp)] || 'text/plain'});
 9300 |  137 |     res.end(data);
 9301 |  138 |   });

 9402 |    3 | export async function saveSubmission({ userData, answers, result }) {
 9403 |    4 |   const { data, error } = await supabase
 9404 |    5 |     .from("submissions")
 9405 |    6 |     .insert([
 9406 |    7 |       {
 9407 |    8 |         name: userData.name,
 9408 |    9 |         email: userData.email,
 9409 |   10 |         phone: userData.phone,
 9410 |   11 |         organization: userData.organization,
 9411 |   12 |         role: userData.role,
 9412 |   13 |         website: userData.website || null,
 9413 |   14 |         linkedin: userData.linkedin || null,
 9414 |   15 |         team_size: userData.teamSize || null,
 9415 |   16 |         sector: userData.sector,
 9416 |   17 |         geography: userData.geography,
 9417 |   18 |         problem: userData.problem,
 9418 |   19 |         stage: userData.stage,
 9419 |   20 |         answers: answers,
 9420 |   21 |         overall_score: result.overallScore,
 9421 |   22 |         grade: result.grade,
 9422 |   23 |         dimensions: result.dimensions,
 9423 |   24 |         analysis_json: result,
 9424 |   25 |         created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
 9425 |   26 |       },
 9426 |   27 |     ])
 9427 |   28 |     .select()
 9428 |   29 |     .single();
 9429 |   30 | 
 9430 |   31 |   if (error) {
 9431 |   32 |     console.error("Supabase save error:", error);
 9432 |   33 |     throw error;
 9433 |   34 |   }
 9434 |   35 |   return data;
 9435 |   36 | }
 9436 |   37 | 
 9437 |   38 | export async function getAllSubmissions() {
 9438 |   39 |   const { data, error } = await supabase
 9439 |   40 |     .from("submissions")
 9440 |   41 |     .select("*")
 9441 |   42 |     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
 9442 |   43 |   if (error) throw error;
 9443 |   44 |   return data;
 9444 |   45 | }

 9447 | ------------------------------------------------------------
 9448 | FILE: src\lib\gemini.js
 9449 | ------------------------------------------------------------
 9450 |    1 | // Gemini API helper â€” calls the proxy server (server.js) at /api
 9451 |    2 | export async function geminiCall(prompt, type = "analysis") {
 9452 |    3 |   const res = await fetch("/api", {
 9453 |    4 |     method: "POST",
 9454 |    5 |     headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
 9455 |    6 |     body: JSON.stringify({ prompt, _type: type }),
 9456 |    7 |   });
 9457 |    8 |   if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`API error: ${res.status}`);
 9458 |    9 |   const data = await res.json();
 9459 |   10 |   // Extract text from Anthropic-style wrapper (server.js converts it)
 9460 |   11 |   return data?.content?.[0]?.text || "";
 9461 |   12 | }
 9462 |   13 | 
 9463 |   14 | export async function generateQuestions(sector, geography, problem) {
 9464 |   15 |   const prompt = `You are an expert market intelligence analyst. Generate exactly 8 groups of 3â€“4 assessment questions for a ${sector} startup targeting ${geography}. 
 9465 |   16 | Problem they solve: "${problem}"
 9466 |   17 | 
 9467 |   18 | Each group covers one of: Market Size, Audience Quality, Competition Edge, Revenue Potential, Risk Profile, Sector Fit, Growth Levers, Strategic Differentiation.
 9468 |   19 | 
 9469 |   20 | Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format:
 9470 |   21 | {
 9471 |   22 |   "groups": [
 9472 |   23 |     {
 9473 |   24 |       "title": "Market Size",
 9474 |   25 |       "icon": "ðŸ“Š",
 9475 |   26 |       "questions": [
 9476 |   27 |         { "id": "q1_1", "text": "...", "type": "scale", "min": 1, "max": 10 },
 9477 |   28 |         { "id": "q1_2", "text": "...", "type": "choice", "options": ["Option A","Option B","Option C"] },
 9478 |   29 |         { "id": "q1_3", "text": "...", "type": "text" }
 9479 |   30 |       ]
 9480 |   31 |     }
 9481 |   32 |   ]
 9482 |   33 | }
 9483 |   34 | Types: "scale" (1-10), "choice" (multiple choice), "text" (free text), "multiselect" (array of options).`;
 9484 |   35 |   return JSON.parse(await geminiCall(prompt, "questions"));
 9485 |   36 | }
 9486 |   37 | 
 9487 |   38 | export async function generateAnalysis(userData, answers) {
 9488 |   39 |   const GEO_LABELS = {
 9489 |   40 |     PI: "Pan India", SA: "South Asia (SAARC)", SE: "Southeast Asia",
 9490 |   41 |     MEA: "Middle East & Africa", EU: "Europe", NA: "North America", GL: "Global",
 9491 |   42 |   };
 9492 |   43 |   const geo = GEO_LABELS[userData.geography] || userData.geography;
 9493 |   44 |   const sector = userData.sector;
 9494 |   45 |   const biz = userData.organization || "Your Venture";
 9495 |   46 | 
 9496 |   47 |   const answersText = Object.entries(answers)
 9497 |   48 |     .filter(([, v]) => v && v !== "")
 9498 |   49 |     .map(([k, v]) => `  - ${k}: ${Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : v}`)
 9499 |   50 |     .join("\n") || "(no answers provided)";
 9500 |   51 | 
 9501 |   52 |   const prompt = `You are a senior market intelligence analyst with deep knowledge of Indian and global markets.
 9502 |   53 |

 9576 |  127 | 
 9577 |  128 |   const text = await geminiCall(prompt, "analysis");
 9578 |  129 |   let raw = text.trim();
 9579 |  130 |   const fm = raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
 9580 |  131 |   if (fm) raw = fm[1].trim();
 9581 |  132 |   const s0 = raw.indexOf("{"), e0 = raw.lastIndexOf("}");
 9582 |  133 |   if (s0 === -1 || e0 === -1) throw new Error("No JSON in response");
 9583 |  134 |   raw = raw.slice(s0, e0 + 1);
 9584 |  135 |   try { return JSON.parse(raw); }
 9585 |  136 |   catch (_) {
 9586 |  137 |     // best-effort repair for truncated responses
 9587 |  138 |     let s = raw.replace(/,\s*$/, "");
 9588 |  139 |     const opens = [];
 9589 |  140 |     for (const ch of s) {
 9590 |  141 |       if (ch === "{" || ch === "[") opens.push(ch === "{" ? "}" : "]");
 9591 |  142 |       else if (ch === "}" || ch === "]") opens.pop();
 9592 |  143 |     }
 9593 |  144 |     return JSON.parse(s + opens.reverse().join(""));
 9594 |  145 |   }
 9595 |  146 | }

 9631 |    1 | import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
 9632 |    2 | import { generateAnalysis } from "../lib/gemini";
 9633 |    3 | import { saveSubmission } from "../lib/db";
 9634 |    4 | 
 9635 |    5 | // Maps React onboarding userData â†’ the field codes dashboard.html expects
 9636 |    6 | function buildPrefill(userData) {
 9637 |    7 |   const SECTOR_MAP = {
 9638 |    8 |     "HealthTech": "HC", "EdTech": "ED", "FinTech": "FS",
 9639 |    9 |     "AgriTech": "AG", "CleanTech": "EN", "B2B SaaS": "IT",
 9640 |   10 |     "D2C / Consumer": "EC", "Logistics / Supply Chain": "LG",
 9641 |   11 |     "HR Tech": "IT", "LegalTech": "OT", "PropTech": "RE",
 9642 |   12 |     "Manufacturing / DeepTech": "MF", "Media / Content": "ME",
 9643 |   13 |     "RetailTech": "EC", "GovTech": "OT", "Other": "OT",
 9644 |   14 |   };
 9645 |   15 |   const ROLE_BIZ_TYPE_MAP = {
 9646 |   16 |     "Founder / Co-Founder": "B2B_SME", "CEO / MD": "B2B_ENT",
 9647 |   17 |     "CTO / CPO": "B2B_SME", "CMO / VP Marketing": "B2C_MASS",
 9648 |   18 |     "Business Development": "B2B_SME", "Product Manager": "B2B_SME",
 9649 |   19 |     "Investor / VC": "B2B_ENT", "Consultant / Advisor": "B2B_SME", "Other": "B2B_SME",
 9650 |   20 |   };
 9651 |   21 |   const GEO_MAP = {
 9652 |   22 |     PI: "PI", SA: "SA", SE: "SE", MEA: "MEA", EU: "EU", NA: "NA", GL: "GL",
 9653 |   23 |   };
 9654 |   24 | 
 9655 |   25 |   return {
 9656 |   26 |     organization: userData.organization,
 9657 |   27 |     sectorCode: SECTOR_MAP[userData.sector] || "OT",
 9658 |   28 |     bizTypeCode: ROLE_BIZ_TYPE_MAP[userData.role] || "B2B_SME",
 9659 |   29 |     geoCode: GEO_MAP[userData.geography] || "PI",
 9660 |   30 |     problem: userData.problem,
 9661 |   31 |     stage: userData.stage,
 9662 |   32 |   };
 9663 |   33 | }
 9664 |   34 | 
 9665 |   35 | const LOADER_STEPS = [
 9666 |   36 |   { n: 1, msg: "Reading your inputsâ€¦", pct: 8 },
 9667 |   37 |   { n: 2, msg: "Searching live market data & sector sizingâ€¦", pct: 25 },
 9668 |   38 |   { n: 3, msg: "Fetching real-time competitor profiles & funding dataâ€¦", pct: 48 },
 9669 |   39 |   { n: 4, msg: "Calculating TAM/SAM/SOM, scores & 12-month projectionsâ€¦", pct: 75 },
 9670 |   40 |   { n: 5, msg: "Assembling your market intelligence dashboardâ€¦", pct: 95 },
 9671 |   41 | ];
 9672 |   42 | 
 9673 |   43 | export default function AssessmentAndDashboard({ userData, onRestart }) {
 9674 |   44 |   const iframeRef = useRef(null);
 9675 |   45 |   const prefillSentRef = useRef(false);
 9676 |   46 | 
 9677 |   47 |   function postToIframe(msg) {
 9678 |   48 |     iframeRef.current?.contentWindow?.postMessage(msg, "*");
 9679 |   49 |   }
 9680 |   50 | 
 9681 |   51 |   async function handleSubmit(fd) {
 9682 |   52 |     // Drive the loader steps in the iframe
 9683 |   53 |     for (const s of LOADER_STEPS) {
 9684 |   54 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: s.n, msg: s.msg, pct: s.pct });
 9685 |   55 |       await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, s.n === 3 ? 150 : 300));
 9686 |   56 |     }
 9687 |   57 | 
 9688 |   58 |     try {
 9689 |   59 |       const result = await generateAnalysis(userData, fd.answers || {});
 9690 |   60 | 
 9691 |   61 |       // Save to Supabase (non-blocking)
 9692 |   62 |       saveSubmission({ userData, answers: fd.answers || {}, result })
 9693 |   63 |         .catch(e => console.warn("DB save failed:", e.message));
 9694 |   64 | 
 9695 |   65 |       // Send result to iframe to render the dashboard
 9696 |   66 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: result });
 9697 |   67 | 
 9698 |   68 |     } catch (err) {
 9699 |   69 |       console.error("Analysis failed:", err);
 9700 |   70 |       // Let iframe show error via its own fallback
 9701 |   71 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: 5, msg: "Running offline analysisâ€¦", pct: 95 });
 9702 |   72 |       setTimeout(() => {
 9703 |   73 |         // Trigger iframe's own offline fallback by sending empty analysis
 9704 |   74 |         postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: {} });
 9705 |   75 |       }, 800);
 9706 |   76 |     }
 9707 |   77 |   }
 9708 |   78 | 
 9709 |   79 |   useEffect(() => {
 9710 |   80 |     function handleMessage(event) {
 9711 |   81 |       if (!event.data) return;
 9712 |   82 | 
 9713 |   83 |       // Iframe loaded â€” send prefill data
 9714 |   84 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_LOADED") {
 9715 |   85 |         if (!prefillSentRef.current) {
 9716 |   86 |           prefillSentRef.current = true;
 9717 |   87 |           const prefill = buildPrefill(userData);
 9718 |   88 |           postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_PREFILL", userData: prefill });
 9719 |   89 |         }
 9720 |   90 |       }
 9721 |   91 | 
 9722 |   92 |       // User clicked "Generate Dashboard" â€” run analysis
 9723 |   93 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_SUBMIT") {
 9724 |   94 |         handleSubmit(event.data.fd);
 9725 |   95 |       }
 9726 |   96 | 
 9727 |   97 |       // "New Assessment" clicked inside dashboard
 9728 |   98 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_RESET") {
 9729 |   99 |         onRestart();
 9730 |  100 |       }
 9731 |  101 |     }
 9732 |  102 | 
 9733 |  103 |     window.addEventListener("message", handleMessage);
 9734 |  104 |     return () => window.removeEventListener("message", handleMessage);
 9735 |  105 |   }, [userData]);
 9736 |  106 | 
 9737 |  107 |   return (
 9738 |  108 |     <iframe
 9739 |  109 |       ref={iframeRef}
 9740 |  110 |       src="/dashboard.html"
 9741 |  111 |       style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, border: "none", width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
 9742 |  112 |       title="Infopace Assessment"
 9743 |  113 |       sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups allow-downloads"
 9744 |  114 |     />
 9745 |  115 |   );
 9746 |  116 | }
 9747 |  117 |

 9776 |   25 |     website: "", linkedin: "", teamSize: "",

 9779 |   28 |   const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
 9780 |   29 | 
 9781 |   30 |   const set = (k, v) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, [k]: v }));
 9782 |   31 |   const err = (k, msg) => setErrors((e) => ({ ...e, [k]: msg }));
 9783 |   32 |   const clearErr = (k) => setErrors((e) => { const n = { ...e }; delete n[k]; return n; });
 9784 |   33 | 
 9785 |   34 |   function validateStep1() {
 9786 |   35 |     let ok = true;
 9787 |   36 |     if (!form.name.trim()) { err("name", "Required"); ok = false; }
 9788 |   37 |     if (!form.email.match(/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/)) { err("email", "Valid email required"); ok = false; }
 9789 |   38 |     if (!form.phone.match(/^\+?[\d\s\-]{8,}$/)) { err("phone", "Valid phone required"); ok = false; }
 9790 |   39 |     if (!form.organization.trim()) { err("organization", "Required"); ok = false; }
 9791 |   40 |     if (!form.role) { err("role", "Required"); ok = false; }
 9792 |   41 |     return ok;
 9793 |   42 |   }
 9794 |   43 | 
 9795 |   44 |   function validateStep2() {
 9796 |   45 |     let ok = true;
 9797 |   46 |     if (!form.sector) { err("sector", "Required"); ok = false; }
 9798 |   47 |     if (!form.geography) { err("geography", "Required"); ok = false; }
 9799 |   48 |     if (!form.problem.trim() || form.problem.trim().length < 20) { err("problem", "Please describe in at least 20 characters"); ok = false; }
 9800 |   49 |     if (!form.stage) { err("stage", "Required"); ok = false; }
 9801 |   50 |     return ok;
 9802 |   51 |   }
 9803 |   52 | 
 9804 |   53 |   const handleNext = () => {
 9805 |   54 |     setErrors({});
 9806 |   55 |     if (step === 1 && validateStep1()) setStep(2);
 9807 |   56 |     else if (step === 2 && validateStep2()) onComplete(form);
 9808 |   57 |   };

10043 | ------------------------------------------------------------
10044 | FILE: supabase_setup.sql
10045 | ------------------------------------------------------------
10046 |    1 | -- ================================================================
10047 |    2 | --  Infopace â€” Supabase Database Setup
10048 |    3 | --  Run this entire file in: Supabase â†’ SQL Editor â†’ Run
10049 |    4 | -- ================================================================
10050 |    5 | 
10051 |    6 | -- 1. Create the submissions table
10052 |    7 | create table if not exists public.submissions (
10053 |    8 |   id            uuid        default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
10054 |    9 |   name          text        not null,
10055 |   10 |   email         text        not null,
10056 |   11 |   phone         text,
10057 |   12 |   organization  text,
10058 |   13 |   role          text,
10059 |   14 |   website       text,
10060 |   15 |   linkedin      text,
10061 |   16 |   team_size     text,
10062 |   17 |   sector        text,
10063 |   18 |   geography     text,
10064 |   19 |   problem       text,
10065 |   20 |   stage         text,
10066 |   21 |   answers       jsonb,
10067 |   22 |   overall_score integer,
10068 |   23 |   grade         text,
10069 |   24 |   dimensions    jsonb,
10070 |   25 |   analysis_json jsonb,
10071 |   26 |   created_at    timestamptz default now()
10072 |   27 | );
10073 |   28 | 
10074 |   29 | -- 2. Enable Row Level Security
10075 |   30 | alter table public.submissions enable row level security;
10076 |   31 | 
10077 |   32 | -- 3. Policy: anyone can INSERT (submit assessment)
10078 |   33 | create policy "Allow public inserts"
10079 |   34 |   on public.submissions
10080 |   35 |   for insert
10081 |   36 |   with check (true);
10082 |   37 | 
10083 |   38 | -- 4. Policy: anyone can SELECT (view results in-app)
10084 |   39 | --    Tighten this later if you add auth
10085 |   40 | create policy "Allow public reads"
10086 |   41 |   on public.submissions
10087 |   42 |   for select
10088 |   43 |   using (true);
10089 |   44 | 
10090 |   45 | -- 5. Optional: index on email for fast lookups
10091 |   46 | create index if not exists submissions_email_idx
10092 |   47 |   on public.submissions (email);
10093 |   48 | 
10094 |   49 | -- 6. Optional: index on created_at for dashboard sorting
10095 |   50 | create index if not exists submissions_created_at_idx
10096 |   51 |   on public.submissions (created_at desc);
10097 |   52 | 
10098 |   53 | -- ================================================================
10099 |   54 | --  DONE. You should see the `submissions` table in Table Editor.
10100 |   55 | -- ================================================================

14242 | 4025 | 1172 | 
14243 | 4026 | 1173 | /* Repair a truncated JSON string by closing any open structures */
14244 | 4027 | 1174 | function repairTruncatedJSON(s){
14245 | 4028 | 1175 |   // Walk the string tracking depth; truncate at last complete top-level section
14246 | 4029 | 1176 |   // Strategy: find the last occurrence of "}]}" or "}]," and close from there
14247 | 4030 | 1177 |   let best=s;
14248 | 4031 | 1178 |   // Try progressively shorter slices to find parseable JSON
14249 | 4032 | 1179 |   for(let i=s.length-1;i>s.length*0.4;i--){
14250 | 4033 | 1180 |     const c=s[i];
14251 | 4034 | 1181 |     if(c==='}'){
14252 | 4035 | 1182 |       try{
14253 | 4036 | 1183 |         const candidate=closeJSON(s.slice(0,i+1));
14254 | 4037 | 1184 |         JSON.parse(candidate);
14255 | 4038 | 1185 |         best=candidate;
14256 | 4039 | 1186 |         break;
14257 | 4040 | 1187 |       }catch(_){}
14258 | 4041 | 1188 |     }
14259 | 4042 | 1189 |   }
14260 | 4043 | 1190 |   return best;
14261 | 4044 | 1191 | }
14262 | 4045 | 1192 | 
14263 | 4046 | 1193 | function closeJSON(s){
14264 | 4047 | 1194 |   // Count open brackets/braces
14265 | 4048 | 1195 |   let depth=0; const stack=[];
14266 | 4049 | 1196 |   for(const c of s){
14267 | 4050 | 1197 |     if(c==='{'){stack.push('}');}
14268 | 4051 | 1198 |     else if(c==='['){stack.push(']');}
14269 | 4052 | 1199 |     else if(c==='}'||c===']'){stack.pop();}
14270 | 4053 | 1200 |   }
14271 | 4054 | 1201 |   // Close any trailing comma before we close
14272 | 4055 | 1202 |   let result=s.replace(/,\s*$/,'');
14273 | 4056 | 1203 |   return result+stack.reverse().join('');
14274 | 4057 | 1204 | }

15731 | 5514 | 2661 |     // Score gauge â€” clean minimal
15732 | 5515 | 2662 |     function scoreGaugeSVG(score,W,H){
15733 | 5516 | 2663 |       const cx=W/2, cy=100, R=72, sw=12;
15734 | 5517 | 2664 |       const pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,score))/100;
15735 | 5518 | 2665 |       const arcColor=score>=70?'#10B981':score>=50?'#F59E0B':'#EF4444';
15736 | 5519 | 2666 |       const gradId='g'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,6);
15737 | 5520 | 2667 |       // Arc endpoints: left=180deg, right=0deg, going clockwise (bottom open)
15738 | 5521 | 2668 |       const sx=cx-R, sy=cy;
15739 | 5522 | 2669 |       const ex=cx+R, ey=cy;
15740 | 5523 | 2670 |       const scX=cx+R*Math.cos(Math.PI*(1-pct));
15741 | 5524 | 2671 |       const scY=cy-R*Math.sin(Math.PI*pct);
15742 | 5525 | 2672 |       const lg=pct>0.5?1:0;
15743 | 5526 | 2673 |       // Grade label
15744 | 5527 | 2674 |       const grade=score>=70?'Strong':score>=50?'Moderate':'Needs Work';
15745 | 5528 | 2675 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="118" viewBox="0 0 ${W} 118" style="display:block;overflow:visible;">
15746 | 5529 | 2676 |         <defs>
15747 | 5530 | 2677 |           <linearGradient id="${gradId}" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
15748 | 5531 | 2678 |             <stop offset="0%" stop-color="${arcColor}" stop-opacity="0.4"/>
15749 | 5532 | 2679 |             <stop offset="100%" stop-color="${arcColor}"/>
15750 | 5533 | 2680 |           </linearGradient>
15751 | 5534 | 2681 |         </defs>
15752 | 5535 | 2682 |         <!-- Grey track -->
15753 | 5536 | 2683 |         <path d="M${sx},${sy} A${R},${R} 0 0,1 ${ex},${ey}"
15754 | 5537 | 2684 |               fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"/>
15755 | 5538 | 2685 |         <!-- Coloured score arc -->
15756 | 5539 | 2686 |         <path d="M${sx},${sy} A${R},${R} 0 ${lg},1 ${scX},${scY}"
15757 | 5540 | 2687 |               fill="none" stroke="url(#${gradId})" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"/>
15758 | 5541 | 2688 |         <!-- 0 and 100 end labels -->
15759 | 5542 | 2689 |         <text x="${sx-8}" y="${sy+5}" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">0</text>
15760 | 5543 | 2690 |         <text x="${ex+8}" y="${ey+5}" text-anchor="start" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">100</text>
15761 | 5544 | 2691 |         <!-- Centre tick at 50 -->
15762 | 5545 | 2692 |         <line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy-R-sw/2-2}" x2="${cx}" y2="${cy-R+sw/2+2}" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
15763 | 5546 | 2693 |         <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-R-sw/2-6}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">50</text>

15765 | 5548 | 2695 |         <line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy}" x2="${scX}" y2="${scY}"

15817 | 5600 | 2747 |         const y = 6 + i * (SEG + GAP);
15818 | 5601 | 2748 |         const cx = FW / 2;
15819 | 5602 | 2749 |         // Trapezoid: top-left, top-right, bottom-right, bottom-left
15820 | 5603 | 2750 |         const tlx = cx - s.tw/2, trx = cx + s.tw/2;
15821 | 5604 | 2751 |         const blx = cx - s.bw/2, brx = cx + s.bw/2;

15824 | 5607 | 2754 |

15828 | 5611 | 2758 |

15832 | 5615 | 2762 |           <path d="${path}" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" stroke-width="1.2"/>

15867 | 5650 | 2797 |     // Donut chart â€” pure SVG
15868 | 5651 | 2798 |     function donutSVG(data,W,cx,cy,OR,IR){
15869 | 5652 | 2799 |       const tot=data.reduce((s,d)=>s+(+d.v||0),0)||100;
15870 | 5653 | 2800 |       let ang=-Math.PI/2;
15871 | 5654 | 2801 |       return data.map((d,i)=>{
15872 | 5655 | 2802 |         const sw=(+d.v||0)/tot*2*Math.PI;
15873 | 5656 | 2803 |         if(sw<0.02){ang+=sw;return '';}
15874 | 5657 | 2804 |         const x1=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang),y1=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang);
15875 | 5658 | 2805 |         const x2=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y2=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
15876 | 5659 | 2806 |         const x3=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y3=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
15877 | 5660 | 2807 |         const x4=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang),y4=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang);
15878 | 5661 | 2808 |         const lg=sw>Math.PI?1:0;
15879 | 5662 | 2809 |         const mx=cx+(OR+IR)/2*Math.cos(ang+sw/2),my=cy+(OR+IR)/2*Math.sin(ang+sw/2);
15880 | 5663 | 2810 |         const pct=Math.round((+d.v||0)/tot*100);
15881 | 5664 | 2811 |         const lbl2=pct>=6?`<text x="${mx}" y="${my+3.5}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.95)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${pct}%</text>`:'';
15882 | 5665 | 2812 |         ang+=sw;
15883 | 5666 | 2813 |         return `<path d="M${x1},${y1} A${OR},${OR} 0 ${lg},1 ${x2},${y2} L${x3},${y3} A${IR},${IR} 0 ${lg},0 ${x4},${y4} Z" fill="${d.c}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5"/>${lbl2}`;
15884 | 5667 | 2814 |       }).join('');
15885 | 5668 | 2815 |     }

16336 | 6119 | FILE: README.md
16337 | 6120 | ------------------------------------------------------------
16338 | 6121 |    1 | # Infopace â€” React + Supabase Edition
16339 | 6122 |    2 | 
16340 | 6123 |    3 | > AI-powered market intelligence assessment platform.
16341 | 6124 |    4 | > Built with React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Gemini AI + Supabase.
16342 | 6125 |    5 | 
16343 | 6126 |    6 | ---
16344 | 6127 |    7 | 
16345 | 6128 |    8 | ## What This App Does
16346 | 6129 |    9 | 
16347 | 6130 |   10 | 1. **Onboarding Form** â€” Collects user details (name, email, phone, organization, role, website, LinkedIn, team size, sector, geography, problem statement, stage)
16348 | 6131 |   11 | 2. **AI Assessment** â€” Generates 8 tailored question groups using Gemini AI, with a live market score panel updating as you answer
16349 | 6132 |   12 | 3. **Results Dashboard** â€” Full market intelligence dashboard with:
16350 | 6133 |   13 |    - Score donut + dimension bars + capability radar
16351 | 6134 |   14 |    - Revenue projection chart (conservative / base / optimistic)
16352 | 6135 |   15 |    - TAM / SAM / SOM estimates
16353 | 6136 |   16 |    - Competitor analysis
16354 | 6137 |   17 |    - Key AI-generated insights
16355 | 6138 |   18 |    - 90-day action plan
16356 | 6139 |   19 |    - Full printable report view
16357 | 6140 |   20 |    - Raw JSON data view
16358 | 6141 |   21 | 4. **Supabase Storage** â€” Every submission (user details + all answers + full analysis) is saved to your Supabase database
16359 | 6142 |   22 | 
16360 | 6143 |   23 | ---
16361 | 6144 |   24 | 
16362 | 6145 |   25 | ## Prerequisites
16363 | 6146 |   26 | 
16364 | 6147 |   27 | - Node.js 18+
16365 | 6148 |   28 | - A free [Gemini API key](https://aistudio.google.com) (already in `server.js`)
16366 | 6149 |   29 | - A free [Supabase](https://supabase.com) project
16367 | 6150 |   30 | 
16368 | 6151 |   31 | ---
16369 | 6152 |   32 | 
16370 | 6153 |   33 | ## Quick Start
16371 | 6154 |   34 | 
16372 | 6155 |   35 | ### Step 1 â€” Set up Supabase
16373 | 6156 |   36 | 
16374 | 6157 |   37 | 1. Create a free project at [supabase.com](https://supabase.com)
16375 | 6158 |   38 | 2. Go to **SQL Editor** and paste + run the contents of `supabase_setup.sql`
16376 | 6159 |   39 | 3. Go to **Settings â†’ API** and copy:
16377 | 6160 |   40 |    - **Project URL** (looks like `https://xxxx.supabase.co`)
16378 | 6161 |   41 |    - **anon / public key** (long JWT string)
16379 | 6162 |   42 | 
16380 | 6163 |   43 | ### Step 2 â€” Configure environment
16381 | 6164 |   44 | 
16382 | 6165 |   45 | ```bash
16383 | 6166 |   46 | cp .env.example .env
16384 | 6167 |   47 | ```
16385 | 6168 |   48 | 
16386 | 6169 |   49 | Edit `.env` and fill in your values:
16387 | 6170 |   50 | 
16388 | 6171 |   51 | ```env
16389 | 6172 |   52 | VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://YOUR_PROJECT_ID.supabase.co
16390 | 6173 |   53 | VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=YOUR_ANON_PUBLIC_KEY
16391 | 6174 |   54 | ```
16392 | 6175 |   55 | 
16393 | 6176 |   56 | ### Step 3 â€” Install dependencies
16394 | 6177 |   57 | 
16395 | 6178 |   58 | ```bash
16396 | 6179 |   59 | npm install
16397 | 6180 |   60 | ```
16398 | 6181 |   61 | 
16399 | 6182 |   62 | ### Step 4 â€” Run the app (two terminals)
16400 | 6183 |   63 | 
16401 | 6184 |   64 | **Terminal 1** â€” Start the Gemini proxy server (port 4000):
16402 | 6185 |   65 | ```bash
16403 | 6186 |   66 | node server.js
16404 | 6187 |   67 | ```
16405 | 6188 |   68 | 
16406 | 6189 |   69 | **Terminal 2** â€” Start the React dev server (port 3000):
16407 | 6190 |   70 | ```bash
16408 | 6191 |   71 | npm run dev
16409 | 6192 |   72 | ```
16410 | 6193 |   73 | 
16411 | 6194 |   74 | Open **http://localhost:3000**
16412 | 6195 |   75 | 
16413 | 6196 |   76 | The Vite dev server automatically proxies `/api` requests to `server.js` on port 4000.
16414 | 6197 |   77 | 
16415 | 6198 |   78 | ---
16416 | 6199 |   79 |

16448 | 6231 |  111 | 
16449 | 6232 |  112 | ## Data Saved to Supabase
16450 | 6233 |  113 | 
16451 | 6234 |  114 | Every completed assessment saves one row to the `submissions` table:
16452 | 6235 |  115 | 
16453 | 6236 |  116 | | Column | Type | Description |
16454 | 6237 |  117 | |---|---|---|
16455 | 6238 |  118 | | `id` | uuid | Auto-generated primary key |
16456 | 6239 |  119 | | `name` | text | Full name |
16457 | 6240 |  120 | | `email` | text | Email address |
16458 | 6241 |  121 | | `phone` | text | Phone number |
16459 | 6242 |  122 | | `organization` | text | Company name |
16460 | 6243 |  123 | | `role` | text | Job role |
16461 | 6244 |  124 | | `website` | text | Website URL |
16462 | 6245 |  125 | | `linkedin` | text | LinkedIn URL |
16463 | 6246 |  126 | | `team_size` | text | Team size bracket |
16464 | 6247 |  127 | | `sector` | text | e.g. "HealthTech", "B2B SaaS" |
16465 | 6248 |  128 | | `geography` | text | e.g. "PI" (Pan India), "GL" (Global) |
16466 | 6249 |  129 | | `problem` | text | Problem statement |
16467 | 6250 |  130 | | `stage` | text | Business stage (1â€“5) |
16468 | 6251 |  131 | | `answers` | jsonb | All question answers keyed by question ID |
16469 | 6252 |  132 | | `overall_score` | integer | Final market score (0â€“100) |
16470 | 6253 |  133 | | `grade` | text | e.g. "A", "B+", "C" |
16471 | 6254 |  134 | | `dimensions` | jsonb | Six dimension scores |
16472 | 6255 |  135 | | `analysis_json` | jsonb | Complete AI analysis (TAM/SAM/SOM, competitors, insights, action plan, projections) |
16473 | 6256 |  136 | | `created_at` | timestamptz | Submission timestamp |
16474 | 6257 |  137 | 
16475 | 6258 |  138 | ---
16476 | 6259 |  139 | 
16477 | 6260 |  140 | ## Production Deployment
16478 | 6261 |  141 | 
16479 | 6262 |  142 | ### Build the React app
16480 | 6263 |  143 | 
16481 | 6264 |  144 | ```bash
16482 | 6265 |  145 | npm run build
16483 | 6266 |  146 | ```
16484 | 6267 |  147 | 
16485 | 6268 |  148 | This creates a `dist/` folder.
16486 | 6269 |  149 | 
16487 | 6270 |  150 | ### Serve with server.js
16488 | 6271 |  151 | 
16489 | 6272 |  152 | Update `server.js` to serve the `dist/` folder as static files. Replace the static file section at the bottom of `server.js` with:
16490 | 6273 |  153 | 
16491 | 6274 |  154 | ```javascript
16492 | 6275 |  155 | // Serve React build
16493 | 6276 |  156 | let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
16494 | 6277 |  157 | 
16495 | 6278 |  158 | // For React Router â€” serve index.html for unknown routes
16496 | 6279 |  159 | const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', fp);
16497 | 6280 |  160 | fs.readFile(fullPath, (err, data) => {
16498 | 6281 |  161 |   if (err) {
16499 | 6282 |  162 |     // Fallback to index.html for client-side routing
16500 | 6283 |  163 |     fs.readFile(path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', 'index.html'), (e2, d2) => {
16501 | 6284 |  164 |       if (e2) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
16502 | 6285 |  165 |       res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'text/html' });
16503 | 6286 |  166 |       res.end(d2);
16504 | 6287 |  167 |     });
16505 | 6288 |  168 |     return;
16506 | 6289 |  169 |   }
16507 | 6290 |  170 |   res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fullPath)] || 'text/plain' });
16508 | 6291 |  171 |   res.end(data);
16509 | 6292 |  172 | });
16510 | 6293 |  173 | ```
16511 | 6294 |  174 | 
16512 | 6295 |  175 | Then run just `node server.js` â€” it serves both the API and the React app on port 4000.
16513 | 6296 |  176 | 
16514 | 6297 |  177 | ### Deploy options
16515 | 6298 |  178 | 
16516 | 6299 |  179 | - **Railway / Render / Fly.io** â€” push repo, set env vars, run `node server.js`
16517 | 6300 |  180 | - **Vercel** â€” deploy React app, add serverless function wrapping Gemini calls
16518 | 6301 |  181 | - **VPS** â€” clone repo, `npm run build`, run with `pm2 start server.js`
16519 | 6302 |  182 | 
16520 | 6303 |  183 | ---
16521 | 6304 |  184 | 
16522 | 6305 |  185 | ## Customisation
16523 | 6306 |  186 | 
16524 | 6307 |  187 | ### Change sectors / geographies
16525 | 6308 |  188 | Edit the `SECTORS` and `GEO` arrays at the top of `src/pages/OnboardingForm.jsx`.
16526 | 6309 |  189 | 
16527 | 6310 |  190 | ### Change AI models
16528 | 6311 |  191 | Edit `MODEL_FAST` and `MODEL_SMART` constants in `server.js`.
16529 | 6312 |  192 | 
16530 | 6313 |  193 | ### Change question count
16531 | 6314 |  194 | Edit the prompt in `src/lib/gemini.js` â†’ `generateQuestions()`.
16532 | 6315 |  195 | 
16533 | 6316 |  196 | ### Add email notifications
16534 | 6317 |  197 | After `saveSubmission()` in `AssessmentShell.jsx`, call a Supabase Edge Function or a service like Resend/SendGrid.
16535 | 6318 |  198 | 
16536 | 6319 |  199 | ---
16537 | 6320 |  200 | 
16538 | 6321 |  201 | ## Troubleshooting
16539 | 6322 |  202 | 
16540 | 6323 |  203 | | Problem | Fix |
16541 | 6324 |  204 | |---|---|
16542 | 6325 |  205 | | `/api` returns 500 | Check Gemini API key on line 8 of `server.js` |
16543 | 6326 |  206 | | Supabase save fails | Verify `.env` values and that `supabase_setup.sql` was run |
16544 | 6327 |  207 | | Questions don't load | Gemini API key may be rate-limited; fallback questions will show |
16545 | 6328 |  208 | | Blank dashboard | Open browser console â€” look for JSON parse errors in analysis response |
16546 | 6329 |  209 | 
16547 | 6330 |  210 | ---

16556 | 6339 | ------------------------------------------------------------
16557 | 6340 |    1 | // ================================================================
16558 | 6341 |    2 | //  Infopace Proxy Server â€” Gemini Edition (FREE)

16561 | 6344 |    5 | //  2. Run:  node server.js
16562 | 6345 |    6 | //  3. Open: http://localhost:4000
16563 | 6346 |    7 | // ================================================================
16564 | 6347 |    8 | 
16565 | 6348 |    9 | const API_KEY = 'AIzaSyAAYHBlfh9Jh42dyjKHlQfU3dzqvUOOhHc'; // â† paste your Gemini key here
16566 | 6349 |   10 | 
16567 | 6350 |   11 | // â”€â”€ Models â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
16568 | 6351 |   12 | // Flash = fast + free (question generation)
16569 | 6352 |   13 | // Pro   = smart + free (dashboard analysis)
16570 | 6353 |   14 | const MODEL_FAST = 'gemini-2.5-flash';
16571 | 6354 |   15 | const MODEL_SMART = 'gemini-2.5-flash';  // both use flash on free tier
16572 | 6355 |   16 | 
16573 | 6356 |   17 | // â”€â”€ No edits needed below â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
16574 | 6357 |   18 | const http  = require('http');
16575 | 6358 |   19 | const https = require('https');
16576 | 6359 |   20 | const fs    = require('fs');
16577 | 6360 |   21 | const path  = require('path');
16578 | 6361 |   22 | const PORT  = 4000;
16579 | 6362 |   23 | 
16580 | 6363 |   24 | const MIME = {
16581 | 6364 |   25 |   '.html':'text/html', '.js':'application/javascript',
16582 | 6365 |   26 |   '.css':'text/css',   '.json':'application/json',
16583 | 6366 |   27 |   '.png':'image/png',  '.ico':'image/x-icon', '.txt':'text/plain'
16584 | 6367 |   28 | };
16585 | 6368 |   29 | 
16586 | 6369 |   30 | function geminiRequest(model, promptText, callback) {
16587 | 6370 |   31 |   const payload = JSON.stringify({
16588 | 6371 |   32 |     contents: [{ parts: [{ text: promptText }] }],
16589 | 6372 |   33 |     generationConfig: {
16590 | 6373 |   34 |       temperature: 0.7,
16591 | 6374 |   35 |       maxOutputTokens: 8192,
16592 | 6375 |   36 |       responseMimeType: 'text/plain'
16593 | 6376 |   37 |     }
16594 | 6377 |   38 |   });
16595 | 6378 |   39 | 
16596 | 6379 |   40 |   const options = {
16597 | 6380 |   41 |     hostname: 'generativelanguage.googleapis.com',
16598 | 6381 |   42 |     path: `/v1beta/models/${model}:generateContent?key=${API_KEY}`,
16599 | 6382 |   43 |     method: 'POST',
16600 | 6383 |   44 |     headers: {
16601 | 6384 |   45 |       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
16602 | 6385 |   46 |       'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(payload)
16603 | 6386 |   47 |     }
16604 | 6387 |   48 |   };
16605 | 6388 |   49 | 
16606 | 6389 |   50 |   const req = https.request(options, res => {
16607 | 6390 |   51 |     let body = '';
16608 | 6391 |   52 |     res.on('data', c => body += c);
16609 | 6392 |   53 |     res.on('end', () => callback(null, res.statusCode, body));
16610 | 6393 |   54 |   });
16611 | 6394 |   55 |   req.on('error', e => callback(e, null, null));
16612 | 6395 |   56 |   req.write(payload);
16613 | 6396 |   57 |   req.end();
16614 | 6397 |   58 | }
16615 | 6398 |   59 | 
16616 | 6399 |   60 | http.createServer((req, res) => {
16617 | 6400 |   61 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*');
16618 | 6401 |   62 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, OPTIONS');
16619 | 6402 |   63 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type');
16620 | 6403 |   64 |   if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') { res.writeHead(204); res.end(); return; }
16621 | 6404 |   65 | 
16622 | 6405 |   66 |   // â”€â”€ /api â†’ Gemini proxy â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
16623 | 6406 |   67 |   if (req.url === '/api' && req.method === 'POST') {
16624 | 6407 |   68 |     if (!API_KEY || API_KEY === 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE') {
16625 | 6408 |   69 |       res.writeHead(500, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});

16844 | 6627 |    2 | export async function geminiCall(prompt, type = "analysis") {
16845 | 6628 |    3 |   const res = await fetch("/api", {
16846 | 6629 |    4 |     method: "POST",
16847 | 6630 |    5 |     headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
16848 | 6631 |    6 |     body: JSON.stringify({ prompt, _type: type }),
16849 | 6632 |    7 |   });

16851 | 6634 |    9 |   const data = await res.json();
16852 | 6635 |   10 |   // Extract text from Anthropic-style wrapper (server.js converts it)
16853 | 6636 |   11 |   return data?.content?.[0]?.text || "";
16854 | 6637 |   12 | }

16973 | 6756 |  131 |   if (fm) raw = fm[1].trim();
16974 | 6757 |  132 |   const s0 = raw.indexOf("{"), e0 = raw.lastIndexOf("}");
16975 | 6758 |  133 |   if (s0 === -1 || e0 === -1) throw new Error("No JSON in response");
16976 | 6759 |  134 |   raw = raw.slice(s0, e0 + 1);
16977 | 6760 |  135 |   try { return JSON.parse(raw); }
16978 | 6761 |  136 |   catch (_) {
16979 | 6762 |  137 |     // best-effort repair for truncated responses
16980 | 6763 |  138 |     let s = raw.replace(/,\s*$/, "");
16981 | 6764 |  139 |     const opens = [];
16982 | 6765 |  140 |     for (const ch of s) {
16983 | 6766 |  141 |       if (ch === "{" || ch === "[") opens.push(ch === "{" ? "}" : "]");
16984 | 6767 |  142 |       else if (ch === "}" || ch === "]") opens.pop();
16985 | 6768 |  143 |     }
16986 | 6769 |  144 |     return JSON.parse(s + opens.reverse().join(""));
16987 | 6770 |  145 |   }
16988 | 6771 |  146 | }
16989 | 6772 |

17059 | 6842 |   36 |   { n: 1, msg: "Reading your inputsâ€¦", pct: 8 },
17060 | 6843 |   37 |   { n: 2, msg: "Searching live market data & sector sizingâ€¦", pct: 25 },

17066 | 6849 |   43 | export default function AssessmentAndDashboard({ userData, onRestart }) {
17067 | 6850 |   44 |   const iframeRef = useRef(null);
17068 | 6851 |   45 |   const prefillSentRef = useRef(false);
17069 | 6852 |   46 | 
17070 | 6853 |   47 |   function postToIframe(msg) {
17071 | 6854 |   48 |     iframeRef.current?.contentWindow?.postMessage(msg, "*");
17072 | 6855 |   49 |   }
17073 | 6856 |   50 | 
17074 | 6857 |   51 |   async function handleSubmit(fd) {
17075 | 6858 |   52 |     // Drive the loader steps in the iframe
17076 | 6859 |   53 |     for (const s of LOADER_STEPS) {
17077 | 6860 |   54 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: s.n, msg: s.msg, pct: s.pct });
17078 | 6861 |   55 |       await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, s.n === 3 ? 150 : 300));
17079 | 6862 |   56 |     }
17080 | 6863 |   57 | 
17081 | 6864 |   58 |     try {
17082 | 6865 |   59 |       const result = await generateAnalysis(userData, fd.answers || {});
17083 | 6866 |   60 | 
17084 | 6867 |   61 |       // Save to Supabase (non-blocking)
17085 | 6868 |   62 |       saveSubmission({ userData, answers: fd.answers || {}, result })
17086 | 6869 |   63 |         .catch(e => console.warn("DB save failed:", e.message));
17087 | 6870 |   64 | 
17088 | 6871 |   65 |       // Send result to iframe to render the dashboard
17089 | 6872 |   66 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: result });
17090 | 6873 |   67 | 
17091 | 6874 |   68 |     } catch (err) {
17092 | 6875 |   69 |       console.error("Analysis failed:", err);
17093 | 6876 |   70 |       // Let iframe show error via its own fallback
17094 | 6877 |   71 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: 5, msg: "Running offline analysisâ€¦", pct: 95 });
17095 | 6878 |   72 |       setTimeout(() => {
17096 | 6879 |   73 |         // Trigger iframe's own offline fallback by sending empty analysis
17097 | 6880 |   74 |         postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: {} });
17098 | 6881 |   75 |       }, 800);
17099 | 6882 |   76 |     }
17100 | 6883 |   77 |   }
17101 | 6884 |   78 | 
17102 | 6885 |   79 |   useEffect(() => {
17103 | 6886 |   80 |     function handleMessage(event) {
17104 | 6887 |   81 |       if (!event.data) return;
17105 | 6888 |   82 | 
17106 | 6889 |   83 |       // Iframe loaded â€” send prefill data
17107 | 6890 |   84 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_LOADED") {
17108 | 6891 |   85 |         if (!prefillSentRef.current) {
17109 | 6892 |   86 |           prefillSentRef.current = true;
17110 | 6893 |   87 |           const prefill = buildPrefill(userData);
17111 | 6894 |   88 |           postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_PREFILL", userData: prefill });
17112 | 6895 |   89 |         }
17113 | 6896 |   90 |       }
17114 | 6897 |   91 | 
17115 | 6898 |   92 |       // User clicked "Generate Dashboard" â€” run analysis
17116 | 6899 |   93 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_SUBMIT") {
17117 | 6900 |   94 |         handleSubmit(event.data.fd);
17118 | 6901 |   95 |       }
17119 | 6902 |   96 | 
17120 | 6903 |   97 |       // "New Assessment" clicked inside dashboard
17121 | 6904 |   98 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_RESET") {
17122 | 6905 |   99 |         onRestart();
17123 | 6906 |  100 |       }
17124 | 6907 |  101 |     }
17125 | 6908 |  102 | 
17126 | 6909 |  103 |     window.addEventListener("message", handleMessage);
17127 | 6910 |  104 |     return () => window.removeEventListener("message", handleMessage);
17128 | 6911 |  105 |   }, [userData]);
17129 | 6912 |  106 | 
17130 | 6913 |  107 |   return (
17131 | 6914 |  108 |     <iframe
17132 | 6915 |  109 |       ref={iframeRef}
17133 | 6916 |  110 |       src="/dashboard.html"
17134 | 6917 |  111 |       style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, border: "none", width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
17135 | 6918 |  112 |       title="Infopace Assessment"
17136 | 6919 |  113 |       sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups allow-downloads"
17137 | 6920 |  114 |     />
17138 | 6921 |  115 |   );
17139 | 6922 |  116 | }

17169 | 6952 |   25 |     website: "", linkedin: "", teamSize: "",

17173 | 6956 |   29 | 
17174 | 6957 |   30 |   const set = (k, v) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, [k]: v }));
17175 | 6958 |   31 |   const err = (k, msg) => setErrors((e) => ({ ...e, [k]: msg }));
17176 | 6959 |   32 |   const clearErr = (k) => setErrors((e) => { const n = { ...e }; delete n[k]; return n; });
17177 | 6960 |   33 | 
17178 | 6961 |   34 |   function validateStep1() {
17179 | 6962 |   35 |     let ok = true;
17180 | 6963 |   36 |     if (!form.name.trim()) { err("name", "Required"); ok = false; }
17181 | 6964 |   37 |     if (!form.email.match(/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/)) { err("email", "Valid email required"); ok = false; }
17182 | 6965 |   38 |     if (!form.phone.match(/^\+?[\d\s\-]{8,}$/)) { err("phone", "Valid phone required"); ok = false; }
17183 | 6966 |   39 |     if (!form.organization.trim()) { err("organization", "Required"); ok = false; }
17184 | 6967 |   40 |     if (!form.role) { err("role", "Required"); ok = false; }
17185 | 6968 |   41 |     return ok;
17186 | 6969 |   42 |   }
17187 | 6970 |   43 | 
17188 | 6971 |   44 |   function validateStep2() {
17189 | 6972 |   45 |     let ok = true;
17190 | 6973 |   46 |     if (!form.sector) { err("sector", "Required"); ok = false; }
17191 | 6974 |   47 |     if (!form.geography) { err("geography", "Required"); ok = false; }
17192 | 6975 |   48 |     if (!form.problem.trim() || form.problem.trim().length < 20) { err("problem", "Please describe in at least 20 characters"); ok = false; }
17193 | 6976 |   49 |     if (!form.stage) { err("stage", "Required"); ok = false; }
17194 | 6977 |   50 |     return ok;
17195 | 6978 |   51 |   }
17196 | 6979 |   52 | 
17197 | 6980 |   53 |   const handleNext = () => {
17198 | 6981 |   54 |     setErrors({});

17443 | 7226 |    5 | 
17444 | 7227 |    6 | -- 1. Create the submissions table
17445 | 7228 |    7 | create table if not exists public.submissions (
17446 | 7229 |    8 |   id            uuid        default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
17447 | 7230 |    9 |   name          text        not null,
17448 | 7231 |   10 |   email         text        not null,
17449 | 7232 |   11 |   phone         text,
17450 | 7233 |   12 |   organization  text,
17451 | 7234 |   13 |   role          text,
17452 | 7235 |   14 |   website       text,
17453 | 7236 |   15 |   linkedin      text,

17463 | 7246 |   25 |   analysis_json jsonb,
17464 | 7247 |   26 |   created_at    timestamptz default now()
17465 | 7248 |   27 | );
17466 | 7249 |   28 | 
17467 | 7250 |   29 | -- 2. Enable Row Level Security
17468 | 7251 |   30 | alter table public.submissions enable row level security;
17469 | 7252 |   31 | 
17470 | 7253 |   32 | -- 3. Policy: anyone can INSERT (submit assessment)
17471 | 7254 |   33 | create policy "Allow public inserts"
17472 | 7255 |   34 |   on public.submissions
17473 | 7256 |   35 |   for insert
17474 | 7257 |   36 |   with check (true);
17475 | 7258 |   37 | 
17476 | 7259 |   38 | -- 4. Policy: anyone can SELECT (view results in-app)
17477 | 7260 |   39 | --    Tighten this later if you add auth
17478 | 7261 |   40 | create policy "Allow public reads"
17479 | 7262 |   41 |   on public.submissions
17480 | 7263 |   42 |   for select
17481 | 7264 |   43 |   using (true);
17482 | 7265 |   44 | 
17483 | 7266 |   45 | -- 5. Optional: index on email for fast lookups
17484 | 7267 |   46 | create index if not exists submissions_email_idx
17485 | 7268 |   47 |   on public.submissions (email);
17486 | 7269 |   48 | 
17487 | 7270 |   49 | -- 6. Optional: index on created_at for dashboard sorting
17488 | 7271 |   50 | create index if not exists submissions_created_at_idx
17489 | 7272 |   51 |   on public.submissions (created_at desc);
17490 | 7273 |   52 |

18340 |  809 |   if(n<0)return;

18343 |  812 |     generateAIQuestions().then(()=>goTo(1));
18344 |  813 |   }else{
18345 |  814 |     goTo(n);
18346 |  815 |   }
18347 |  816 | }

18350 |  819 |
