18358 |  827 | 
18359 |  828 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
18360 |  829 |    LIVE SCORING
18361 |  830 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
18362 |  831 | function calcLive(){
18363 |  832 |   // â”€â”€ Step 0 context fields â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
18364 |  833 |   const hasSector  = document.getElementById('sector').value?1:0;
18365 |  834 |   const hasBizType = document.getElementById('bizType').value?1:0;
18366 |  835 |   const hasGeo     = document.getElementById('geo').value?1:0;
18367 |  836 |   const probLen    = document.getElementById('problem').value.length;
18368 |  837 |   const probScore  = probLen>120?5:probLen>60?3:probLen>20?1:0;
18369 |  838 |   const stageVal   = +(document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.dataset.val)||0;
18370 |  839 | 
18371 |  840 |   // Only score if context is filled
18372 |  841 |   const contextFilled = hasSector&&hasBizType&&hasGeo;
18373 |  842 | 
18374 |  843 |   // â”€â”€ Read actual selected values from AI questions â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
18375 |  844 |   // Each select has data-w (weight) and returns v (1-5)
18376 |  845 |   // We track which section each question belongs to via ID prefix
18377 |  846 |   const selScores={d1:[],d2:[],d3:[],d4:[],d5:[],d6:[]};
18378 |  847 | 
18379 |  848 |   // Map question IDs to dimensions
18380 |  849 |   // s1=Market Size(d1), s2=Audience(d2), s3=Competition(d3),
18381 |  850 |   // s4=Revenue(d4), s5=Risk(d5), s6=GTM(d4), s7=PMF(d2), s8=SectorFit(d6)
18382 |  851 |   const dimMap={'s1':'d1','s2':'d2','s3':'d3','s4':'d4','s5':'d5','s6':'d4','s7':'d2','s8':'d6','f1':'d1','f2':'d2','f3':'d3','f4':'d4','f5':'d5','f6':'d4','f7':'d2','f8':'d6'};
18383 |  852 | 
18384 |  853 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{
18385 |  854 |     if(!el.value)return;
18386 |  855 |     const v=+(el.value)||0;          // actual selected value 1-5
18387 |  856 |     const w=+(el.dataset.w)||2;      // weight of this question
18388 |  857 |     const prefix=el.id.replace(/q\d+$/,'').replace(/^s/,'s').slice(0,2); // e.g. s1, s2
18389 |  858 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||dimMap[el.id.slice(0,2)]||'d1';
18390 |  859 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w});
18391 |  860 |   });
18392 |  861 | 
18393 |  862 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{
18394 |  863 |     const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');
18395 |  864 |     if(!on)return;
18396 |  865 |     const v=+(on.dataset.val)||3;
18397 |  866 |     const id=grp.id||'';
18398 |  867 |     const prefix=id.slice(0,2);
18399 |  868 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||'d1';
18400 |  869 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w:2});
18401 |  870 |   });
18402 |  871 | 
18403 |  872 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{
18404 |  873 |     const section=el.closest('.sec');
18405 |  874 |     const secId=section?.id||'sec1';
18406 |  875 |     const secNum=+secId.replace('sec','')||1;
18407 |  876 |     const dimKeys=['d1','d2','d3','d4','d5','d4','d2','d6'];
18408 |  877 |     const dim=dimKeys[secNum-1]||'d6';
18409 |  878 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v:4,w:1}); // checkboxes = moderate positive
18410 |  879 |   });
18411 |  880 | 
18412 |  881 |   // â”€â”€ Calculate each dimension score (0-100) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
18413 |  882 |   function dimScore(key){
18414 |  883 |     const items=selScores[key]||[];
18415 |  884 |     if(!items.length)return null; // not yet answered
18416 |  885 |     const totalW=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.w,0);
18417 |  886 |     const weighted=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.v*i.w),0);
18418 |  887 |     // weighted average on 1-5 scale â†’ convert to 0-100
18419 |  888 |     return Math.round(((weighted/totalW)-1)/4*100);
18420 |  889 |   }
18421 |  890 | 
18422 |  891 |   const d1=dimScore('d1'); // Market Size
18423 |  892 |   const d2=dimScore('d2'); // Audience Quality
18424 |  893 |   const d3=dimScore('d3'); // Competition Edge
18425 |  894 |   const d4=dimScore('d4'); // Revenue Potential
18426 |  895 |   const d5=dimScore('d5'); // Risk Profile
18427 |  896 |   const d6=dimScore('d6'); // Sector Fit
18428 |  897 | 
18429 |  898 |   // â”€â”€ Context bonus (filling basics) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
18430 |  899 |   // Max 15 points for context â€” NOT for just having a sector selected
18431 |  900 |   const contextBonus=contextFilled?(hasSector*3+hasBizType*3+hasGeo*2+probScore+Math.min(stageVal,5)):0;
18432 |  901 | 
18433 |  902 |   // â”€â”€ Overall score = weighted average of dims + context â”€
18434 |  903 |   // Dims that haven't been answered yet are excluded from average
18435 |  904 |   const answeredDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6].filter(v=>v!==null);
18436 |  905 |   let overall=0;
18437 |  906 |   if(!contextFilled||answeredDims.length===0){
18438 |  907 |     // Nothing meaningful answered â€” score is 0
18439 |  908 |     overall=0;
18440 |  909 |   } else {
18441 |  910 |     // Weighted: competition(d3) and revenue(d4) matter most
18442 |  911 |     const weights=[15,20,25,25,10,5]; // d1 d2 d3 d4 d5 d6
18443 |  912 |     const allDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
18444 |  913 |     let wSum=0, wTotal=0;
18445 |  914 |     allDims.forEach((v,i)=>{
18446 |  915 |       if(v!==null){wSum+=v*weights[i];wTotal+=weights[i];}
18447 |  916 |     });
18448 |  917 |     const dimAvg=wTotal>0?wSum/wTotal:0;
18449 |  918 | 
18450 |  919 |     // Context bonus adds up to 15 points on top of dim average
18451 |  920 |     // But only if at least 2 sections answered
18452 |  921 |     const bonus=answeredDims.length>=2?Math.round(contextBonus/15*15):0;
18453 |  922 |     overall=Math.min(100,Math.round(dimAvg*0.85+bonus));
18454 |  923 | 
18455 |  924 |     // Penalty: if less than 3 sections answered, cap score at 60
18456 |  925 |     if(answeredDims.length<3)overall=Math.min(overall,60);
18457 |  926 |     // Penalty: if problem statement too short, cap at 70
18458 |  927 |     if(probLen<40&&overall>70)overall=70;
18459 |  928 |   }
18460 |  929 | 
18461 |  930 |   // â”€â”€ Update UI â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

18693 | 1162 |     if(aiQs.realTimeData)window._rtData=aiQs.realTimeData;
18694 | 1163 | 
18695 | 1164 |     if(!Array.isArray(aiQs.sections)||aiQs.sections.length===0) throw new Error('No sections in parsed JSON');
18696 | 1165 |     aiQs.sections.forEach((sec,i)=>renderSection(i+1,sec));
18697 | 1166 | 
18698 | 1167 |   }catch(e){
18699 | 1168 |     console.warn('AI question gen failed, using fallback:',e.message);
18700 | 1169 |     useFallbackQuestions(sector,bizType,geo);
18701 | 1170 |   }
18702 | 1171 | }
18703 | 1172 | 
18704 | 1173 | /* Repair a truncated JSON string by closing any open structures */
18705 | 1174 | function repairTruncatedJSON(s){
18706 | 1175 |   // Walk the string tracking depth; truncate at last complete top-level section
18707 | 1176 |   // Strategy: find the last occurrence of "}]}" or "}]," and close from there
18708 | 1177 |   let best=s;
18709 | 1178 |   // Try progressively shorter slices to find parseable JSON
18710 | 1179 |   for(let i=s.length-1;i>s.length*0.4;i--){
18711 | 1180 |     const c=s[i];
18712 | 1181 |     if(c==='}'){
18713 | 1182 |       try{
18714 | 1183 |         const candidate=closeJSON(s.slice(0,i+1));
18715 | 1184 |         JSON.parse(candidate);
18716 | 1185 |         best=candidate;
18717 | 1186 |         break;
18718 | 1187 |       }catch(_){}
18719 | 1188 |     }
18720 | 1189 |   }
18721 | 1190 |   return best;
18722 | 1191 | }
18723 | 1192 | 
18724 | 1193 | function closeJSON(s){
18725 | 1194 |   // Count open brackets/braces
18726 | 1195 |   let depth=0; const stack=[];
18727 | 1196 |   for(const c of s){
18728 | 1197 |     if(c==='{'){stack.push('}');}
18729 | 1198 |     else if(c==='['){stack.push(']');}
18730 | 1199 |     else if(c==='}'||c===']'){stack.pop();}
18731 | 1200 |   }
18732 | 1201 |   // Close any trailing comma before we close
18733 | 1202 |   let result=s.replace(/,\s*$/,'');
18734 | 1203 |   return result+stack.reverse().join('');
18735 | 1204 | }
18736 | 1205 | 
18737 | 1206 | function renderSection(idx,sec){
18738 | 1207 |   const el=document.getElementById('q'+idx);
18739 | 1208 |   if(!el||!sec)return;
18740 | 1209 |   let html=`<div class="sec-hd"><div class="sec-icon">${sec.icon||'ðŸ“‹'}</div><div><div class="sec-ttl">${sec.title}</div><div class="sec-sub">${sec.subtitle||''}</div></div></div><div class="fg">`;
18741 | 1210 |   (sec.questions||[]).forEach(q=>{
18742 | 1211 |     const wide=q.type==='checks'||q.type==='textarea';
18743 | 1212 |     html+=`<div class="fd ${wide?'s2':''}">`;
18744 | 1213 |     html+=`<label>${q.label}</label>`;
18745 | 1214 |     if(q.hint)html+=`<div class="hint">ðŸ’¡ ${q.hint}</div>`;
18746 | 1215 |     if(q.type==='select'){
18747 | 1216 |       html+=`<select class="ai-sel" id="${q.id}" data-w="${q.w||2}" onchange="calcLive()"><option value="">Selectâ€¦</option>`;
18748 | 1217 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<option value="${o.v}">${o.t}</option>`;});
18749 | 1218 |       html+=`</select>`;
18750 | 1219 |     }else if(q.type==='pills'){
18751 | 1220 |       html+=`<div class="pills ai-pills" id="${q.id}_pills">`;
18752 | 1221 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<span class="pill" data-val="${o.v||3}" onclick="pickAIPill(this)">${o.t}</span>`;});
18753 | 1222 |       html+=`</div>`;
18754 | 1223 |     }else if(q.type==='checks'){
18755 | 1224 |       html+=`<div class="ckg">`;
18756 | 1225 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<label class="cki"><input type="checkbox" class="ai-chk" onchange="calcLive()"> ${o.t}</label>`;});
18757 | 1226 |       html+=`</div>`;
18758 | 1227 |     }else if(q.type==='text'){
18759 | 1228 |       html+=`<input type="text" class="ai-txt" id="${q.id}" placeholder="${q.placeholder||'Enter valueâ€¦'}" oninput="calcLive()"/>`;
18760 | 1229 |     }
18761 | 1230 |     html+=`</div>`;
18762 | 1231 |   });
18763 | 1232 |   html+=`</div>`;
18764 | 1233 |   el.innerHTML=html;
18765 | 1234 | }

18832 | 1301 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
18833 | 1302 | function collectData(){
18834 | 1303 |   const gopt=id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);return el?.options[el.selectedIndex]?.text||'';};
18835 | 1304 |   const getv=id=>document.getElementById(id)?.value||'';
18836 | 1305 |   const answers={};
18837 | 1306 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{answers[el.id]=el.options[el.selectedIndex]?.text||'';});
18838 | 1307 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');if(on)answers[grp.id]=on.textContent;});
18839 | 1308 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-txt').forEach(el=>{if(el.value)answers[el.id]=el.value;});
18840 | 1309 |   const chkGroups={};
18841 | 1310 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{const g=el.closest('.ckg')?.parentElement?.querySelector('label')?.textContent||'checks';chkGroups[g]=(chkGroups[g]||[]);chkGroups[g].push(el.parentElement.textContent.trim());});
18842 | 1311 |   Object.assign(answers,chkGroups);
18843 | 1312 |   return {
18844 | 1313 |     bizName:getv('bizName')||'Unnamed Business',
18845 | 1314 |     sector:gopt('sector'),sectorCode:getv('sector'),
18846 | 1315 |     bizType:gopt('bizType'),bizTypeCode:getv('bizType'),
18847 | 1316 |     geo:gopt('geo'),geoCode:getv('geo'),
18848 | 1317 |     problem:getv('problem')||'Not described',
18849 | 1318 |     stage:document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.textContent||'Not specified',
18850 | 1319 |     answers,
18851 | 1320 |   };

18997 | 1466 |   // Exponential backoff helper (shared pattern)
18998 | 1467 |   const fetchWithRetry=async(url,opts,maxTries=3)=>{
18999 | 1468 |     for(let attempt=1;attempt<=maxTries;attempt++){
19000 | 1469 |       const r=await fetch(url,opts);
19001 | 1470 |       if((r.status===429||r.status===529||r.status>=500)&&attempt<maxTries){
19002 | 1471 |         await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,Math.min(2000*Math.pow(2,attempt-1),16000)));
19003 | 1472 |         continue;
19004 | 1473 |       }
19005 | 1474 |       return r;
19006 | 1475 |     }
19007 | 1476 |   };

20343 | 2812 |     // Donut chart â€” pure SVG
20344 | 2813 |     function donutSVG(data,W,cx,cy,OR,IR){
20345 | 2814 |       const tot=data.reduce((s,d)=>s+(+d.v||0),0)||100;
20346 | 2815 |       let ang=-Math.PI/2;
20347 | 2816 |       return data.map((d,i)=>{
20348 | 2817 |         const sw=(+d.v||0)/tot*2*Math.PI;
20349 | 2818 |         if(sw<0.02){ang+=sw;return '';}
20350 | 2819 |         const x1=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang),y1=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang);
20351 | 2820 |         const x2=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y2=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
20352 | 2821 |         const x3=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y3=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
20353 | 2822 |         const x4=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang),y4=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang);
20354 | 2823 |         const lg=sw>Math.PI?1:0;
20355 | 2824 |         const mx=cx+(OR+IR)/2*Math.cos(ang+sw/2),my=cy+(OR+IR)/2*Math.sin(ang+sw/2);
20356 | 2825 |         const pct=Math.round((+d.v||0)/tot*100);
20357 | 2826 |         const lbl2=pct>=6?`<text x="${mx}" y="${my+3.5}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.95)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${pct}%</text>`:'';
20358 | 2827 |         ang+=sw;
20359 | 2828 |         return `<path d="M${x1},${y1} A${OR},${OR} 0 ${lg},1 ${x2},${y2} L${x3},${y3} A${IR},${IR} 0 ${lg},0 ${x4},${y4} Z" fill="${d.c}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5"/>${lbl2}`;
20360 | 2829 |       }).join('');
20361 | 2830 |     }
20362 | 2831 |

20371 | 2840 |           <rect x="${lw}" y="${y+6}" width="${W-lw-40}" height="16" rx="3" fill="#F3F4F6"/>

20811 | ============================================================
20812 | FILE: README.md
20813 | ============================================================
20814 |    1 | # Infopace â€” React + Supabase Edition
20815 |    2 | 
20816 |    3 | > AI-powered market intelligence assessment platform.
20817 |    4 | > Built with React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Gemini AI + Supabase.
20818 |    5 | 
20819 |    6 | ---
20820 |    7 | 
20821 |    8 | ## What This App Does
20822 |    9 | 
20823 |   10 | 1. **Onboarding Form** â€” Collects user details (name, email, phone, organization, role, website, LinkedIn, team size, sector, geography, problem statement, stage)
20824 |   11 | 2. **AI Assessment** â€” Generates 8 tailored question groups using Gemini AI, with a live market score panel updating as you answer
20825 |   12 | 3. **Results Dashboard** â€” Full market intelligence dashboard with:
20826 |   13 |    - Score donut + dimension bars + capability radar
20827 |   14 |    - Revenue projection chart (conservative / base / optimistic)
20828 |   15 |    - TAM / SAM / SOM estimates
20829 |   16 |    - Competitor analysis
20830 |   17 |    - Key AI-generated insights
20831 |   18 |    - 90-day action plan
20832 |   19 |    - Full printable report view
20833 |   20 |    - Raw JSON data view
20834 |   21 | 4. **Supabase Storage** â€” Every submission (user details + all answers + full analysis) is saved to your Supabase database
20835 |   22 | 
20836 |   23 | ---
20837 |   24 | 
20838 |   25 | ## Prerequisites
20839 |   26 | 
20840 |   27 | - Node.js 18+
20841 |   28 | - A free [Gemini API key](https://aistudio.google.com) (already in `server.js`)
20842 |   29 | - A free [Supabase](https://supabase.com) project
20843 |   30 | 
20844 |   31 | ---
20845 |   32 | 
20846 |   33 | ## Quick Start
20847 |   34 | 
20848 |   35 | ### Step 1 â€” Set up Supabase
20849 |   36 | 
20850 |   37 | 1. Create a free project at [supabase.com](https://supabase.com)
20851 |   38 | 2. Go to **SQL Editor** and paste + run the contents of `supabase_setup.sql`
20852 |   39 | 3. Go to **Settings â†’ API** and copy:
20853 |   40 |    - **Project URL** (looks like `https://xxxx.supabase.co`)
20854 |   41 |    - **anon / public key** (long JWT string)
20855 |   42 | 
20856 |   43 | ### Step 2 â€” Configure environment
20857 |   44 | 
20858 |   45 | ```bash
20859 |   46 | cp .env.example .env
20860 |   47 | ```
20861 |   48 | 
20862 |   49 | Edit `.env` and fill in your values:
20863 |   50 | 
20864 |   51 | ```env
20865 |   52 | VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://YOUR_PROJECT_ID.supabase.co
20866 |   53 | VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=YOUR_ANON_PUBLIC_KEY
20867 |   54 | ```
20868 |   55 | 
20869 |   56 | ### Step 3 â€” Install dependencies
20870 |   57 | 
20871 |   58 | ```bash
20872 |   59 | npm install
20873 |   60 | ```
20874 |   61 | 
20875 |   62 | ### Step 4 â€” Run the app (two terminals)
20876 |   63 | 
20877 |   64 | **Terminal 1** â€” Start the Gemini proxy server (port 4000):
20878 |   65 | ```bash
20879 |   66 | node server.js
20880 |   67 | ```
20881 |   68 | 
20882 |   69 | **Terminal 2** â€” Start the React dev server (port 3000):
20883 |   70 | ```bash
20884 |   71 | npm run dev
20885 |   72 | ```
20886 |   73 | 
20887 |   74 | Open **http://localhost:3000**
20888 |   75 | 
20889 |   76 | The Vite dev server automatically proxies `/api` requests to `server.js` on port 4000.
20890 |   77 | 
20891 |   78 | ---
20892 |   79 | 
20893 |   80 | ## Project Structure
20894 |   81 |

20923 |  110 | ---
20924 |  111 | 
20925 |  112 | ## Data Saved to Supabase
20926 |  113 | 
20927 |  114 | Every completed assessment saves one row to the `submissions` table:
20928 |  115 | 
20929 |  116 | | Column | Type | Description |
20930 |  117 | |---|---|---|
20931 |  118 | | `id` | uuid | Auto-generated primary key |
20932 |  119 | | `name` | text | Full name |
20933 |  120 | | `email` | text | Email address |
20934 |  121 | | `phone` | text | Phone number |
20935 |  122 | | `organization` | text | Company name |
20936 |  123 | | `role` | text | Job role |
20937 |  124 | | `website` | text | Website URL |
20938 |  125 | | `linkedin` | text | LinkedIn URL |
20939 |  126 | | `team_size` | text | Team size bracket |
20940 |  127 | | `sector` | text | e.g. "HealthTech", "B2B SaaS" |
20941 |  128 | | `geography` | text | e.g. "PI" (Pan India), "GL" (Global) |
20942 |  129 | | `problem` | text | Problem statement |
20943 |  130 | | `stage` | text | Business stage (1â€“5) |
20944 |  131 | | `answers` | jsonb | All question answers keyed by question ID |
20945 |  132 | | `overall_score` | integer | Final market score (0â€“100) |
20946 |  133 | | `grade` | text | e.g. "A", "B+", "C" |
20947 |  134 | | `dimensions` | jsonb | Six dimension scores |
20948 |  135 | | `analysis_json` | jsonb | Complete AI analysis (TAM/SAM/SOM, competitors, insights, action plan, projections) |
20949 |  136 | | `created_at` | timestamptz | Submission timestamp |
20950 |  137 | 
20951 |  138 | ---
20952 |  139 | 
20953 |  140 | ## Production Deployment
20954 |  141 | 
20955 |  142 | ### Build the React app
20956 |  143 | 
20957 |  144 | ```bash
20958 |  145 | npm run build
20959 |  146 | ```
20960 |  147 | 
20961 |  148 | This creates a `dist/` folder.
20962 |  149 | 
20963 |  150 | ### Serve with server.js
20964 |  151 | 
20965 |  152 | Update `server.js` to serve the `dist/` folder as static files. Replace the static file section at the bottom of `server.js` with:
20966 |  153 | 
20967 |  154 | ```javascript
20968 |  155 | // Serve React build
20969 |  156 | let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
20970 |  157 | 
20971 |  158 | // For React Router â€” serve index.html for unknown routes
20972 |  159 | const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', fp);
20973 |  160 | fs.readFile(fullPath, (err, data) => {
20974 |  161 |   if (err) {
20975 |  162 |     // Fallback to index.html for client-side routing
20976 |  163 |     fs.readFile(path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', 'index.html'), (e2, d2) => {
20977 |  164 |       if (e2) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
20978 |  165 |       res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'text/html' });
20979 |  166 |       res.end(d2);
20980 |  167 |     });
20981 |  168 |     return;
20982 |  169 |   }
20983 |  170 |   res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fullPath)] || 'text/plain' });
20984 |  171 |   res.end(data);
20985 |  172 | });
20986 |  173 | ```
20987 |  174 | 
20988 |  175 | Then run just `node server.js` â€” it serves both the API and the React app on port 4000.
20989 |  176 | 
20990 |  177 | ### Deploy options
20991 |  178 | 
20992 |  179 | - **Railway / Render / Fly.io** â€” push repo, set env vars, run `node server.js`
20993 |  180 | - **Vercel** â€” deploy React app, add serverless function wrapping Gemini calls
20994 |  181 | - **VPS** â€” clone repo, `npm run build`, run with `pm2 start server.js`
20995 |  182 | 
20996 |  183 | ---
20997 |  184 | 
20998 |  185 | ## Customisation
20999 |  186 | 
21000 |  187 | ### Change sectors / geographies
21001 |  188 | Edit the `SECTORS` and `GEO` arrays at the top of `src/pages/OnboardingForm.jsx`.
21002 |  189 | 
21003 |  190 | ### Change AI models
21004 |  191 | Edit `MODEL_FAST` and `MODEL_SMART` constants in `server.js`.
21005 |  192 | 
21006 |  193 | ### Change question count
21007 |  194 | Edit the prompt in `src/lib/gemini.js` â†’ `generateQuestions()`.
21008 |  195 | 
21009 |  196 | ### Add email notifications
21010 |  197 | After `saveSubmission()` in `AssessmentShell.jsx`, call a Supabase Edge Function or a service like Resend/SendGrid.
21011 |  198 | 
21012 |  199 | ---
21013 |  200 | 
21014 |  201 | ## Troubleshooting
21015 |  202 | 
21016 |  203 | | Problem | Fix |
21017 |  204 | |---|---|
21018 |  205 | | `/api` returns 500 | Check Gemini API key on line 8 of `server.js` |
21019 |  206 | | Supabase save fails | Verify `.env` values and that `supabase_setup.sql` was run |
21020 |  207 | | Questions don't load | Gemini API key may be rate-limited; fallback questions will show |
21021 |  208 | | Blank dashboard | Open browser console â€” look for JSON parse errors in analysis response |
21022 |  209 |

21039 |    7 | // ================================================================
21040 |    8 | 
21041 |    9 | const API_KEY = 'AIzaSyAAYHBlfh9Jh42dyjKHlQfU3dzqvUOOhHc'; // â† paste your Gemini key here
21042 |   10 | 
21043 |   11 | // â”€â”€ Models â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
21044 |   12 | // Flash = fast + free (question generation)
21045 |   13 | // Pro   = smart + free (dashboard analysis)
21046 |   14 | const MODEL_FAST = 'gemini-2.5-flash';
21047 |   15 | const MODEL_SMART = 'gemini-2.5-flash';  // both use flash on free tier
21048 |   16 | 
21049 |   17 | // â”€â”€ No edits needed below â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
21050 |   18 | const http  = require('http');
21051 |   19 | const https = require('https');
21052 |   20 | const fs    = require('fs');
21053 |   21 | const path  = require('path');
21054 |   22 | const PORT  = 4000;
21055 |   23 | 
21056 |   24 | const MIME = {
21057 |   25 |   '.html':'text/html', '.js':'application/javascript',
21058 |   26 |   '.css':'text/css',   '.json':'application/json',
21059 |   27 |   '.png':'image/png',  '.ico':'image/x-icon', '.txt':'text/plain'
21060 |   28 | };
21061 |   29 | 
21062 |   30 | function geminiRequest(model, promptText, callback) {
21063 |   31 |   const payload = JSON.stringify({
21064 |   32 |     contents: [{ parts: [{ text: promptText }] }],
21065 |   33 |     generationConfig: {
21066 |   34 |       temperature: 0.7,
21067 |   35 |       maxOutputTokens: 8192,
21068 |   36 |       responseMimeType: 'text/plain'
21069 |   37 |     }
21070 |   38 |   });
21071 |   39 | 
21072 |   40 |   const options = {
21073 |   41 |     hostname: 'generativelanguage.googleapis.com',
21074 |   42 |     path: `/v1beta/models/${model}:generateContent?key=${API_KEY}`,
21075 |   43 |     method: 'POST',
21076 |   44 |     headers: {
21077 |   45 |       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
21078 |   46 |       'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(payload)
21079 |   47 |     }
21080 |   48 |   };
21081 |   49 | 
21082 |   50 |   const req = https.request(options, res => {
21083 |   51 |     let body = '';
21084 |   52 |     res.on('data', c => body += c);
21085 |   53 |     res.on('end', () => callback(null, res.statusCode, body));
21086 |   54 |   });
21087 |   55 |   req.on('error', e => callback(e, null, null));
21088 |   56 |   req.write(payload);
21089 |   57 |   req.end();
21090 |   58 | }
21091 |   59 | 
21092 |   60 | http.createServer((req, res) => {
21093 |   61 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*');
21094 |   62 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, OPTIONS');
21095 |   63 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type');
21096 |   64 |   if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') { res.writeHead(204); res.end(); return; }
21097 |   65 | 
21098 |   66 |   // â”€â”€ /api â†’ Gemini proxy â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
21099 |   67 |   if (req.url === '/api' && req.method === 'POST') {
21100 |   68 |     if (!API_KEY || API_KEY === 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE') {
21101 |   69 |       res.writeHead(500, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
21102 |   70 |       res.end(JSON.stringify({error:'Gemini API key not set. Edit line 8 of server.js'}));
21103 |   71 |       return;
21104 |   72 |     }
21105 |   73 | 
21106 |   74 |     let body = '';
21107 |   75 |     req.on('data', c => body += c);
21108 |   76 |     req.on('end', () => {
21109 |   77 |       let payload;
21110 |   78 |       try { payload = JSON.parse(body); }
21111 |   79 |       catch(e) { res.writeHead(400); res.end('bad json'); return; }
21112 |   80 | 
21113 |   81 |       const type   = payload._type || 'analysis';
21114 |   82 |       const prompt = payload.prompt || '';
21115 |   83 |       const model  = type === 'questions' ? MODEL_FAST : MODEL_SMART;
21116 |   84 | 
21117 |   85 |       console.log('  â†’  ' + type + ' (' + model + ')');
21118 |   86 | 
21119 |   87 |       geminiRequest(model, prompt, (err, status, respBody) => {
21120 |   88 |         if (err) {
21121 |   89 |           console.log('  âŒ Network error:', err.message);
21122 |   90 |           res.writeHead(502, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
21123 |   91 |           res.end(JSON.stringify({error: err.message}));
21124 |   92 |           return;
21125 |   93 |         }
21126 |   94 | 
21127 |   95 |         const icon = status < 300 ? 'âœ…' : 'âŒ';
21128 |   96 |         console.log('  ' + icon + '  ' + status + '  ' + type);
21129 |   97 | 
21130 |   98 |         if (status !== 200) {
21131 |   99 |           try {
21132 |  100 |             const e = JSON.parse(respBody);
21133 |  101 |             console.log('      Error:', e.error?.message || respBody.slice(0,120));
21134 |  102 |           } catch(_) { console.log('      Raw:', respBody.slice(0,120)); }
21135 |  103 |         }
21136 |  104 | 
21137 |  105 |         // Convert Gemini response â†’ Anthropic-style response
21138 |  106 |         // so the HTML parsing code works without changes
21139 |  107 |         let anthropicStyle;
21140 |  108 |         try {
21141 |  109 |           const geminiData = JSON.parse(respBody);
21142 |  110 |           const text = (geminiData?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts||[])
21143 |  111 |             .map(p => p.text||'').join('');
21144 |  112 |           // Wrap in Anthropic content format
21145 |  113 |           anthropicStyle = JSON.stringify({
21146 |  114 |             candidates: geminiData.candidates,
21147 |  115 |             content: [{ type: 'text', text: text }]
21148 |  116 |           });
21149 |  117 |         } catch(_) {
21150 |  118 |           anthropicStyle = respBody;
21151 |  119 |         }
21152 |  120 | 
21153 |  121 |         res.writeHead(status, {
21154 |  122 |           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
21155 |  123 |           'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'
21156 |  124 |         });
21157 |  125 |         res.end(anthropicStyle);
21158 |  126 |       });
21159 |  127 |     });
21160 |  128 |     return;
21161 |  129 |   }
21162 |  130 | 
21163 |  131 |   // â”€â”€ Static files â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
21164 |  132 |   let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
21165 |  133 |   fp = path.join(process.cwd(), fp);
21166 |  134 |   fs.readFile(fp, (err, data) => {
21167 |  135 |     if (err) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
21168 |  136 |     res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fp)] || 'text/plain'});
21169 |  137 |     res.end(data);
21170 |  138 |   });
21171 |  139 |

21263 |    3 | export async function saveSubmission({ userData, answers, result }) {
21264 |    4 |   const { data, error } = await supabase
21265 |    5 |     .from("submissions")
21266 |    6 |     .insert([
21267 |    7 |       {
21268 |    8 |         name: userData.name,
21269 |    9 |         email: userData.email,
21270 |   10 |         phone: userData.phone,
21271 |   11 |         organization: userData.organization,
21272 |   12 |         role: userData.role,
21273 |   13 |         website: userData.website || null,
21274 |   14 |         linkedin: userData.linkedin || null,
21275 |   15 |         team_size: userData.teamSize || null,
21276 |   16 |         sector: userData.sector,
21277 |   17 |         geography: userData.geography,
21278 |   18 |         problem: userData.problem,
21279 |   19 |         stage: userData.stage,
21280 |   20 |         answers: answers,
21281 |   21 |         overall_score: result.overallScore,
21282 |   22 |         grade: result.grade,
21283 |   23 |         dimensions: result.dimensions,
21284 |   24 |         analysis_json: result,
21285 |   25 |         created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
21286 |   26 |       },
21287 |   27 |     ])
21288 |   28 |     .select()
21289 |   29 |     .single();
21290 |   30 | 
21291 |   31 |   if (error) {
21292 |   32 |     console.error("Supabase save error:", error);
21293 |   33 |     throw error;
21294 |   34 |   }
21295 |   35 |   return data;
21296 |   36 | }
21297 |   37 | 
21298 |   38 | export async function getAllSubmissions() {
21299 |   39 |   const { data, error } = await supabase
21300 |   40 |     .from("submissions")
21301 |   41 |     .select("*")
21302 |   42 |     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
21303 |   43 |   if (error) throw error;
21304 |   44 |   return data;
21305 |   45 | }

21309 | FILE: src\lib\gemini.js
21310 | ============================================================
21311 |    1 | // Gemini API helper â€” calls the proxy server (server.js) at /api
21312 |    2 | export async function geminiCall(prompt, type = "analysis") {
21313 |    3 |   const res = await fetch("/api", {
21314 |    4 |     method: "POST",
21315 |    5 |     headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
21316 |    6 |     body: JSON.stringify({ prompt, _type: type }),
21317 |    7 |   });
21318 |    8 |   if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`API error: ${res.status}`);
21319 |    9 |   const data = await res.json();
21320 |   10 |   // Extract text from Anthropic-style wrapper (server.js converts it)
21321 |   11 |   return data?.content?.[0]?.text || "";
21322 |   12 | }
21323 |   13 | 
21324 |   14 | export async function generateQuestions(sector, geography, problem) {
21325 |   15 |   const prompt = `You are an expert market intelligence analyst. Generate exactly 8 groups of 3â€“4 assessment questions for a ${sector} startup targeting ${geography}. 
21326 |   16 | Problem they solve: "${problem}"
21327 |   17 | 
21328 |   18 | Each group covers one of: Market Size, Audience Quality, Competition Edge, Revenue Potential, Risk Profile, Sector Fit, Growth Levers, Strategic Differentiation.
21329 |   19 | 
21330 |   20 | Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format:
21331 |   21 | {
21332 |   22 |   "groups": [
21333 |   23 |     {
21334 |   24 |       "title": "Market Size",
21335 |   25 |       "icon": "ðŸ“Š",
21336 |   26 |       "questions": [
21337 |   27 |         { "id": "q1_1", "text": "...", "type": "scale", "min": 1, "max": 10 },
21338 |   28 |         { "id": "q1_2", "text": "...", "type": "choice", "options": ["Option A","Option B","Option C"] },
21339 |   29 |         { "id": "q1_3", "text": "...", "type": "text" }
21340 |   30 |       ]
21341 |   31 |     }
21342 |   32 |   ]
21343 |   33 | }
21344 |   34 | Types: "scale" (1-10), "choice" (multiple choice), "text" (free text), "multiselect" (array of options).`;
21345 |   35 |   return JSON.parse(await geminiCall(prompt, "questions"));
21346 |   36 | }

21348 |   38 | export async function generateAnalysis(userData, answers) {
21349 |   39 |   const GEO_LABELS = {
21350 |   40 |     PI: "Pan India", SA: "South Asia (SAARC)", SE: "Southeast Asia",
21351 |   41 |     MEA: "Middle East & Africa", EU: "Europe", NA: "North America", GL: "Global",
21352 |   42 |   };

21355 |   45 |   const biz = userData.organization || "Your Venture";

21358 |   48 |     .filter(([, v]) => v && v !== "")
21359 |   49 |     .map(([k, v]) => `  - ${k}: ${Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : v}`)
21360 |   50 |     .join("\n") || "(no answers provided)";

21433 |  123 |   "trend": "<2 sentences on trajectory and inflection point>",
21434 |  124 |   "geomap": "<2 sentences on geographic focus rationale>"
21435 |  125 | }
21436 |  126 | }`;
21437 |  127 | 
21438 |  128 |   const text = await geminiCall(prompt, "analysis");
21439 |  129 |   let raw = text.trim();
21440 |  130 |   const fm = raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
21441 |  131 |   if (fm) raw = fm[1].trim();
21442 |  132 |   const s0 = raw.indexOf("{"), e0 = raw.lastIndexOf("}");
21443 |  133 |   if (s0 === -1 || e0 === -1) throw new Error("No JSON in response");
21444 |  134 |   raw = raw.slice(s0, e0 + 1);
21445 |  135 |   try { return JSON.parse(raw); }
21446 |  136 |   catch (_) {
21447 |  137 |     // best-effort repair for truncated responses
21448 |  138 |     let s = raw.replace(/,\s*$/, "");
21449 |  139 |     const opens = [];
21450 |  140 |     for (const ch of s) {
21451 |  141 |       if (ch === "{" || ch === "[") opens.push(ch === "{" ? "}" : "]");
21452 |  142 |       else if (ch === "}" || ch === "]") opens.pop();
21453 |  143 |     }
21454 |  144 |     return JSON.parse(s + opens.reverse().join(""));
21455 |  145 |   }
21456 |  146 | }

21486 | FILE: src\pages\AssessmentAndDashboard.jsx
21487 | ============================================================
21488 |    1 | import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
21489 |    2 | import { generateAnalysis } from "../lib/gemini";
21490 |    3 | import { saveSubmission } from "../lib/db";
21491 |    4 | 
21492 |    5 | // Maps React onboarding userData â†’ the field codes dashboard.html expects
21493 |    6 | function buildPrefill(userData) {
21494 |    7 |   const SECTOR_MAP = {
21495 |    8 |     "HealthTech": "HC", "EdTech": "ED", "FinTech": "FS",
21496 |    9 |     "AgriTech": "AG", "CleanTech": "EN", "B2B SaaS": "IT",
21497 |   10 |     "D2C / Consumer": "EC", "Logistics / Supply Chain": "LG",
21498 |   11 |     "HR Tech": "IT", "LegalTech": "OT", "PropTech": "RE",
21499 |   12 |     "Manufacturing / DeepTech": "MF", "Media / Content": "ME",
21500 |   13 |     "RetailTech": "EC", "GovTech": "OT", "Other": "OT",
21501 |   14 |   };
21502 |   15 |   const ROLE_BIZ_TYPE_MAP = {
21503 |   16 |     "Founder / Co-Founder": "B2B_SME", "CEO / MD": "B2B_ENT",
21504 |   17 |     "CTO / CPO": "B2B_SME", "CMO / VP Marketing": "B2C_MASS",
21505 |   18 |     "Business Development": "B2B_SME", "Product Manager": "B2B_SME",
21506 |   19 |     "Investor / VC": "B2B_ENT", "Consultant / Advisor": "B2B_SME", "Other": "B2B_SME",
21507 |   20 |   };
21508 |   21 |   const GEO_MAP = {
21509 |   22 |     PI: "PI", SA: "SA", SE: "SE", MEA: "MEA", EU: "EU", NA: "NA", GL: "GL",
21510 |   23 |   };
21511 |   24 | 
21512 |   25 |   return {
21513 |   26 |     organization: userData.organization,
21514 |   27 |     sectorCode: SECTOR_MAP[userData.sector] || "OT",
21515 |   28 |     bizTypeCode: ROLE_BIZ_TYPE_MAP[userData.role] || "B2B_SME",
21516 |   29 |     geoCode: GEO_MAP[userData.geography] || "PI",
21517 |   30 |     problem: userData.problem,
21518 |   31 |     stage: userData.stage,
21519 |   32 |   };
21520 |   33 | }
21521 |   34 | 
21522 |   35 | const LOADER_STEPS = [
21523 |   36 |   { n: 1, msg: "Reading your inputsâ€¦", pct: 8 },
21524 |   37 |   { n: 2, msg: "Searching live market data & sector sizingâ€¦", pct: 25 },
21525 |   38 |   { n: 3, msg: "Fetching real-time competitor profiles & funding dataâ€¦", pct: 48 },
21526 |   39 |   { n: 4, msg: "Calculating TAM/SAM/SOM, scores & 12-month projectionsâ€¦", pct: 75 },
21527 |   40 |   { n: 5, msg: "Assembling your market intelligence dashboardâ€¦", pct: 95 },
21528 |   41 | ];
21529 |   42 | 
21530 |   43 | export default function AssessmentAndDashboard({ userData, onRestart }) {
21531 |   44 |   const iframeRef = useRef(null);
21532 |   45 |   const prefillSentRef = useRef(false);
21533 |   46 | 
21534 |   47 |   function postToIframe(msg) {
21535 |   48 |     iframeRef.current?.contentWindow?.postMessage(msg, "*");
21536 |   49 |   }
21537 |   50 | 
21538 |   51 |   async function handleSubmit(fd) {
21539 |   52 |     // Drive the loader steps in the iframe
21540 |   53 |     for (const s of LOADER_STEPS) {
21541 |   54 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: s.n, msg: s.msg, pct: s.pct });
21542 |   55 |       await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, s.n === 3 ? 150 : 300));
21543 |   56 |     }
21544 |   57 | 
21545 |   58 |     try {
21546 |   59 |       const result = await generateAnalysis(userData, fd.answers || {});
21547 |   60 | 
21548 |   61 |       // Save to Supabase (non-blocking)
21549 |   62 |       saveSubmission({ userData, answers: fd.answers || {}, result })
21550 |   63 |         .catch(e => console.warn("DB save failed:", e.message));
21551 |   64 | 
21552 |   65 |       // Send result to iframe to render the dashboard
21553 |   66 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: result });
21554 |   67 | 
21555 |   68 |     } catch (err) {
21556 |   69 |       console.error("Analysis failed:", err);
21557 |   70 |       // Let iframe show error via its own fallback
21558 |   71 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: 5, msg: "Running offline analysisâ€¦", pct: 95 });
21559 |   72 |       setTimeout(() => {
21560 |   73 |         // Trigger iframe's own offline fallback by sending empty analysis
21561 |   74 |         postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: {} });
21562 |   75 |       }, 800);
21563 |   76 |     }
21564 |   77 |   }
21565 |   78 | 
21566 |   79 |   useEffect(() => {
21567 |   80 |     function handleMessage(event) {
21568 |   81 |       if (!event.data) return;
21569 |   82 | 
21570 |   83 |       // Iframe loaded â€” send prefill data
21571 |   84 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_LOADED") {
21572 |   85 |         if (!prefillSentRef.current) {
21573 |   86 |           prefillSentRef.current = true;
21574 |   87 |           const prefill = buildPrefill(userData);
21575 |   88 |           postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_PREFILL", userData: prefill });
21576 |   89 |         }
21577 |   90 |       }
21578 |   91 | 
21579 |   92 |       // User clicked "Generate Dashboard" â€” run analysis
21580 |   93 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_SUBMIT") {
21581 |   94 |         handleSubmit(event.data.fd);
21582 |   95 |       }
21583 |   96 | 
21584 |   97 |       // "New Assessment" clicked inside dashboard
21585 |   98 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_RESET") {
21586 |   99 |         onRestart();
21587 |  100 |       }
21588 |  101 |     }
21589 |  102 | 
21590 |  103 |     window.addEventListener("message", handleMessage);
21591 |  104 |     return () => window.removeEventListener("message", handleMessage);
21592 |  105 |   }, [userData]);
21593 |  106 | 
21594 |  107 |   return (
21595 |  108 |     <iframe
21596 |  109 |       ref={iframeRef}
21597 |  110 |       src="/dashboard.html"
21598 |  111 |       style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, border: "none", width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
21599 |  112 |       title="Infopace Assessment"
21600 |  113 |       sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups allow-downloads"
21601 |  114 |     />
21602 |  115 |   );
21603 |  116 | }

21640 |   32 |   const clearErr = (k) => setErrors((e) => { const n = { ...e }; delete n[k]; return n; });

21647 |   39 |     if (!form.organization.trim()) { err("organization", "Required"); ok = false; }
21648 |   40 |     if (!form.role) { err("role", "Required"); ok = false; }
21649 |   41 |     return ok;

21657 |   49 |     if (!form.stage) { err("stage", "Required"); ok = false; }
21658 |   50 |     return ok;
21659 |   51 |   }

21894 | ============================================================
21895 | FILE: supabase_setup.sql
21896 | ============================================================
21897 |    1 | -- ================================================================
21898 |    2 | --  Infopace â€” Supabase Database Setup
21899 |    3 | --  Run this entire file in: Supabase â†’ SQL Editor â†’ Run
21900 |    4 | -- ================================================================
21901 |    5 | 
21902 |    6 | -- 1. Create the submissions table
21903 |    7 | create table if not exists public.submissions (
21904 |    8 |   id            uuid        default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
21905 |    9 |   name          text        not null,
21906 |   10 |   email         text        not null,
21907 |   11 |   phone         text,
21908 |   12 |   organization  text,
21909 |   13 |   role          text,
21910 |   14 |   website       text,
21911 |   15 |   linkedin      text,
21912 |   16 |   team_size     text,
21913 |   17 |   sector        text,
21914 |   18 |   geography     text,
21915 |   19 |   problem       text,
21916 |   20 |   stage         text,
21917 |   21 |   answers       jsonb,
21918 |   22 |   overall_score integer,
21919 |   23 |   grade         text,
21920 |   24 |   dimensions    jsonb,
21921 |   25 |   analysis_json jsonb,
21922 |   26 |   created_at    timestamptz default now()
21923 |   27 | );
21924 |   28 | 
21925 |   29 | -- 2. Enable Row Level Security
21926 |   30 | alter table public.submissions enable row level security;
21927 |   31 | 
21928 |   32 | -- 3. Policy: anyone can INSERT (submit assessment)
21929 |   33 | create policy "Allow public inserts"
21930 |   34 |   on public.submissions
21931 |   35 |   for insert
21932 |   36 |   with check (true);
21933 |   37 | 
21934 |   38 | -- 4. Policy: anyone can SELECT (view results in-app)
21935 |   39 | --    Tighten this later if you add auth
21936 |   40 | create policy "Allow public reads"
21937 |   41 |   on public.submissions
21938 |   42 |   for select
21939 |   43 |   using (true);
21940 |   44 | 
21941 |   45 | -- 5. Optional: index on email for fast lookups
21942 |   46 | create index if not exists submissions_email_idx
21943 |   47 |   on public.submissions (email);
21944 |   48 | 
21945 |   49 | -- 6. Optional: index on created_at for dashboard sorting
21946 |   50 | create index if not exists submissions_created_at_idx
21947 |   51 |   on public.submissions (created_at desc);
21948 |   52 | 
21949 |   53 | -- ================================================================
21950 |   54 | --  DONE. You should see the `submissions` table in Table Editor.
21951 |   55 | -- ================================================================
21952 |   56 | 
21953 | 
21954 | ============================================================
21955 | FILE: tailwind.config.js

21987 | ===== C:\Users\admin\Downloads\infopace-react (1)\infopace-react\README.md =====
21988 | # Infopace â€” React + Supabase Edition
21989 | 
21990 | > AI-powered market intelligence assessment platform.
21991 | > Built with React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Gemini AI + Supabase.
21992 | 
21993 | ---
21994 | 
21995 | ## What This App Does
21996 | 
21997 | 1. **Onboarding Form** â€” Collects user details (name, email, phone, organization, role, website, LinkedIn, team size, sector, geography, problem statement, stage)
21998 | 2. **AI Assessment** â€” Generates 8 tailored question groups using Gemini AI, with a live market score panel updating as you answer
21999 | 3. **Results Dashboard** â€” Full market intelligence dashboard with:
22000 |    - Score donut + dimension bars + capability radar
22001 |    - Revenue projection chart (conservative / base / optimistic)
22002 |    - TAM / SAM / SOM estimates
22003 |    - Competitor analysis
22004 |    - Key AI-generated insights
22005 |    - 90-day action plan
22006 |    - Full printable report view
22007 |    - Raw JSON data view
22008 | 4. **Supabase Storage** â€” Every submission (user details + all answers + full analysis) is saved to your Supabase database
22009 | 
22010 | ---
22011 | 
22012 | ## Prerequisites
22013 | 
22014 | - Node.js 18+
22015 | - A free [Gemini API key](https://aistudio.google.com) (already in `server.js`)
22016 | - A free [Supabase](https://supabase.com) project
22017 | 
22018 | ---
22019 | 
22020 | ## Quick Start
22021 | 
22022 | ### Step 1 â€” Set up Supabase
22023 | 
22024 | 1. Create a free project at [supabase.com](https://supabase.com)
22025 | 2. Go to **SQL Editor** and paste + run the contents of `supabase_setup.sql`
22026 | 3. Go to **Settings â†’ API** and copy:
22027 |    - **Project URL** (looks like `https://xxxx.supabase.co`)
22028 |    - **anon / public key** (long JWT string)
22029 | 
22030 | ### Step 2 â€” Configure environment
22031 | 
22032 | ```bash
22033 | cp .env.example .env
22034 | ```
22035 | 
22036 | Edit `.env` and fill in your values:
22037 | 
22038 | ```env
22039 | VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://YOUR_PROJECT_ID.supabase.co
22040 | VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=YOUR_ANON_PUBLIC_KEY
22041 | ```
22042 | 
22043 | ### Step 3 â€” Install dependencies
22044 | 
22045 | ```bash
22046 | npm install
22047 | ```
22048 | 
22049 | ### Step 4 â€” Run the app (two terminals)
22050 | 
22051 | **Terminal 1** â€” Start the Gemini proxy server (port 4000):
22052 | ```bash
22053 | node server.js
22054 | ```
22055 | 
22056 | **Terminal 2** â€” Start the React dev server (port 3000):
22057 | ```bash
22058 | npm run dev
22059 | ```
22060 | 
22061 | Open **http://localhost:3000**
22062 | 
22063 | The Vite dev server automatically proxies `/api` requests to `server.js` on port 4000.
22064 |

22098 | 
22099 | ## Data Saved to Supabase
22100 | 
22101 | Every completed assessment saves one row to the `submissions` table:
22102 | 
22103 | | Column | Type | Description |
22104 | |---|---|---|
22105 | | `id` | uuid | Auto-generated primary key |
22106 | | `name` | text | Full name |
22107 | | `email` | text | Email address |
22108 | | `phone` | text | Phone number |
22109 | | `organization` | text | Company name |
22110 | | `role` | text | Job role |
22111 | | `website` | text | Website URL |
22112 | | `linkedin` | text | LinkedIn URL |
22113 | | `team_size` | text | Team size bracket |
22114 | | `sector` | text | e.g. "HealthTech", "B2B SaaS" |
22115 | | `geography` | text | e.g. "PI" (Pan India), "GL" (Global) |
22116 | | `problem` | text | Problem statement |
22117 | | `stage` | text | Business stage (1â€“5) |
22118 | | `answers` | jsonb | All question answers keyed by question ID |
22119 | | `overall_score` | integer | Final market score (0â€“100) |
22120 | | `grade` | text | e.g. "A", "B+", "C" |
22121 | | `dimensions` | jsonb | Six dimension scores |
22122 | | `analysis_json` | jsonb | Complete AI analysis (TAM/SAM/SOM, competitors, insights, action plan, projections) |
22123 | | `created_at` | timestamptz | Submission timestamp |
22124 | 
22125 | ---
22126 | 
22127 | ## Production Deployment
22128 | 
22129 | ### Build the React app
22130 | 
22131 | ```bash
22132 | npm run build
22133 | ```
22134 | 
22135 | This creates a `dist/` folder.
22136 | 
22137 | ### Serve with server.js
22138 | 
22139 | Update `server.js` to serve the `dist/` folder as static files. Replace the static file section at the bottom of `server.js` with:
22140 | 
22141 | ```javascript
22142 | // Serve React build
22143 | let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
22144 | 
22145 | // For React Router â€” serve index.html for unknown routes
22146 | const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', fp);
22147 | fs.readFile(fullPath, (err, data) => {
22148 |   if (err) {
22149 |     // Fallback to index.html for client-side routing
22150 |     fs.readFile(path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', 'index.html'), (e2, d2) => {
22151 |       if (e2) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
22152 |       res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'text/html' });
22153 |       res.end(d2);
22154 |     });
22155 |     return;
22156 |   }
22157 |   res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fullPath)] || 'text/plain' });
22158 |   res.end(data);
22159 | });
22160 | ```
22161 | 
22162 | Then run just `node server.js` â€” it serves both the API and the React app on port 4000.
22163 | 
22164 | ### Deploy options
22165 | 
22166 | - **Railway / Render / Fly.io** â€” push repo, set env vars, run `node server.js`
22167 | - **Vercel** â€” deploy React app, add serverless function wrapping Gemini calls
22168 | - **VPS** â€” clone repo, `npm run build`, run with `pm2 start server.js`
22169 | 
22170 | ---
22171 | 
22172 | ## Customisation
22173 | 
22174 | ### Change sectors / geographies
22175 | Edit the `SECTORS` and `GEO` arrays at the top of `src/pages/OnboardingForm.jsx`.
22176 | 
22177 | ### Change AI models
22178 | Edit `MODEL_FAST` and `MODEL_SMART` constants in `server.js`.
22179 | 
22180 | ### Change question count
22181 | Edit the prompt in `src/lib/gemini.js` â†’ `generateQuestions()`.
22182 | 
22183 | ### Add email notifications
22184 | After `saveSubmission()` in `AssessmentShell.jsx`, call a Supabase Edge Function or a service like Resend/SendGrid.
22185 | 
22186 | ---
22187 | 
22188 | ## Troubleshooting
22189 | 
22190 | | Problem | Fix |
22191 | |---|---|
22192 | | `/api` returns 500 | Check Gemini API key on line 8 of `server.js` |
22193 | | Supabase save fails | Verify `.env` values and that `supabase_setup.sql` was run |
22194 | | Questions don't load | Gemini API key may be rate-limited; fallback questions will show |
22195 | | Blank dashboard | Open browser console â€” look for JSON parse errors in analysis response |
22196 |

22216 | // Flash = fast + free (question generation)
22217 | // Pro   = smart + free (dashboard analysis)
22218 | const MODEL_FAST = 'gemini-2.5-flash';
22219 | const MODEL_SMART = 'gemini-2.5-flash';  // both use flash on free tier
22220 | 
22221 | // â”€â”€ No edits needed below â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

22223 | const https = require('https');
22224 | const fs    = require('fs');
22225 | const path  = require('path');
22226 | const PORT  = 4000;
22227 | 
22228 | const MIME = {
22229 |   '.html':'text/html', '.js':'application/javascript',
22230 |   '.css':'text/css',   '.json':'application/json',
22231 |   '.png':'image/png',  '.ico':'image/x-icon', '.txt':'text/plain'
22232 | };
22233 | 
22234 | function geminiRequest(model, promptText, callback) {
22235 |   const payload = JSON.stringify({
22236 |     contents: [{ parts: [{ text: promptText }] }],
22237 |     generationConfig: {
22238 |       temperature: 0.7,
22239 |       maxOutputTokens: 8192,
22240 |       responseMimeType: 'text/plain'
22241 |     }
22242 |   });
22243 | 
22244 |   const options = {
22245 |     hostname: 'generativelanguage.googleapis.com',
22246 |     path: `/v1beta/models/${model}:generateContent?key=${API_KEY}`,
22247 |     method: 'POST',
22248 |     headers: {
22249 |       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
22250 |       'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(payload)
22251 |     }
22252 |   };
22253 | 
22254 |   const req = https.request(options, res => {
22255 |     let body = '';
22256 |     res.on('data', c => body += c);
22257 |     res.on('end', () => callback(null, res.statusCode, body));
22258 |   });
22259 |   req.on('error', e => callback(e, null, null));
22260 |   req.write(payload);
22261 |   req.end();
22262 | }
22263 | 
22264 | http.createServer((req, res) => {
22265 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*');
22266 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, OPTIONS');
22267 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type');
22268 |   if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') { res.writeHead(204); res.end(); return; }
22269 | 
22270 |   // â”€â”€ /api â†’ Gemini proxy â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
22271 |   if (req.url === '/api' && req.method === 'POST') {
22272 |     if (!API_KEY || API_KEY === 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE') {
22273 |       res.writeHead(500, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
22274 |       res.end(JSON.stringify({error:'Gemini API key not set. Edit line 8 of server.js'}));
22275 |       return;
22276 |     }
22277 | 
22278 |     let body = '';
22279 |     req.on('data', c => body += c);
22280 |     req.on('end', () => {
22281 |       let payload;
22282 |       try { payload = JSON.parse(body); }
22283 |       catch(e) { res.writeHead(400); res.end('bad json'); return; }
22284 | 
22285 |       const type   = payload._type || 'analysis';
22286 |       const prompt = payload.prompt || '';
22287 |       const model  = type === 'questions' ? MODEL_FAST : MODEL_SMART;
22288 | 
22289 |       console.log('  â†’  ' + type + ' (' + model + ')');
22290 | 
22291 |       geminiRequest(model, prompt, (err, status, respBody) => {
22292 |         if (err) {
22293 |           console.log('  âŒ Network error:', err.message);
22294 |           res.writeHead(502, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
22295 |           res.end(JSON.stringify({error: err.message}));
22296 |           return;
22297 |         }
22298 | 
22299 |         const icon = status < 300 ? 'âœ…' : 'âŒ';
22300 |         console.log('  ' + icon + '  ' + status + '  ' + type);
22301 | 
22302 |         if (status !== 200) {
22303 |           try {
22304 |             const e = JSON.parse(respBody);
22305 |             console.log('      Error:', e.error?.message || respBody.slice(0,120));
22306 |           } catch(_) { console.log('      Raw:', respBody.slice(0,120)); }
22307 |         }
22308 | 
22309 |         // Convert Gemini response â†’ Anthropic-style response
22310 |         // so the HTML parsing code works without changes
22311 |         let anthropicStyle;
22312 |         try {
22313 |           const geminiData = JSON.parse(respBody);
22314 |           const text = (geminiData?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts||[])
22315 |             .map(p => p.text||'').join('');
22316 |           // Wrap in Anthropic content format
22317 |           anthropicStyle = JSON.stringify({
22318 |             candidates: geminiData.candidates,
22319 |             content: [{ type: 'text', text: text }]
22320 |           });
22321 |         } catch(_) {
22322 |           anthropicStyle = respBody;
22323 |         }
22324 | 
22325 |         res.writeHead(status, {
22326 |           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
22327 |           'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'
22328 |         });
22329 |         res.end(anthropicStyle);
22330 |       });
22331 |     });
22332 |     return;
22333 |   }
22334 | 
22335 |   // â”€â”€ Static files â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
22336 |   let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
22337 |   fp = path.join(process.cwd(), fp);
22338 |   fs.readFile(fp, (err, data) => {
22339 |     if (err) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
22340 |     res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fp)] || 'text/plain'});

22345 |   const ok = API_KEY && API_KEY !== 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE';
22346 |   console.log('');

22362 | ===== C:\Users\admin\Downloads\infopace-react (1)\infopace-react\supabase_setup.sql =====
22363 | -- ================================================================
22364 | --  Infopace â€” Supabase Database Setup
22365 | --  Run this entire file in: Supabase â†’ SQL Editor â†’ Run
22366 | -- ================================================================
22367 | 
22368 | -- 1. Create the submissions table
22369 | create table if not exists public.submissions (
22370 |   id            uuid        default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
22371 |   name          text        not null,
22372 |   email         text        not null,
22373 |   phone         text,
22374 |   organization  text,
22375 |   role          text,
22376 |   website       text,
22377 |   linkedin      text,
22378 |   team_size     text,
22379 |   sector        text,
22380 |   geography     text,
22381 |   problem       text,
22382 |   stage         text,
22383 |   answers       jsonb,
22384 |   overall_score integer,
22385 |   grade         text,
22386 |   dimensions    jsonb,
22387 |   analysis_json jsonb,
22388 |   created_at    timestamptz default now()
22389 | );
22390 | 
22391 | -- 2. Enable Row Level Security
22392 | alter table public.submissions enable row level security;
22393 | 
22394 | -- 3. Policy: anyone can INSERT (submit assessment)
22395 | create policy "Allow public inserts"
22396 |   on public.submissions
22397 |   for insert
22398 |   with check (true);
22399 | 
22400 | -- 4. Policy: anyone can SELECT (view results in-app)
22401 | --    Tighten this later if you add auth
22402 | create policy "Allow public reads"
22403 |   on public.submissions
22404 |   for select
22405 |   using (true);
22406 | 
22407 | -- 5. Optional: index on email for fast lookups
22408 | create index if not exists submissions_email_idx
22409 |   on public.submissions (email);
22410 | 
22411 | -- 6. Optional: index on created_at for dashboard sorting
22412 | create index if not exists submissions_created_at_idx
22413 |   on public.submissions (created_at desc);
22414 | 
22415 | -- ================================================================
22416 | --  DONE. You should see the `submissions` table in Table Editor.
22417 | -- ================================================================

23229 | function pickPill(el,gid){
23230 |   const grp=gid?document.getElementById(gid):el.closest('.pills');
23231 |   grp.querySelectorAll('.pill').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('on'));
23232 |   el.classList.add('on');
23233 |   userTouched.add(grp.id||gid);
23234 |   calcLive();
23235 | }
23236 | function pickAIPill(el){
23237 |   el.closest('.pills').querySelectorAll('.pill').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('on'));
23238 |   el.classList.add('on');
23239 |   calcLive();

23242 | function goTo(s){
23243 |   document.querySelectorAll('.sec').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active'));
23244 |   document.getElementById('sec'+s).classList.add('active');
23245 |   for(let i=0;i<9;i++){const b=document.getElementById('sb'+i);if(!b)continue;b.classList.remove('active','done');if(i<s)b.classList.add('done');}
23246 |   document.getElementById('sb'+s).classList.add('active');
23247 |   step=s;
23248 |   document.getElementById('prevBtn').style.visibility=s===0?'hidden':'visible';
23249 |   document.getElementById('nextBtn').textContent=s===8?'Generate Dashboard â†’':'Next â†’';
23250 |   document.getElementById('nextBtn').className=s===8?'btn btn-go':'btn btn-primary';
23251 |   document.getElementById('slbl').textContent=`Step ${s+1} of 9`;
23252 |   document.getElementById('progBar').style.width=((s+1)/9*100)+'%';
23253 | }
23254 | 
23255 | function navigate(d){
23256 |   const n=step+d;
23257 |   if(n<0)return;
23258 |   if(n>8){buildDashboard();return;}
23259 |   if(step===0&&n===1&&ctxReady()){
23260 |     generateAIQuestions().then(()=>goTo(1));
23261 |   }else{
23262 |     goTo(n);
23263 |   }
23264 | }

23268 | function onCtxChange(){
23269 |   const s=document.getElementById('sector');
23270 |   const tag=document.getElementById('sectorTag');
23271 |   if(s.value){tag.textContent=s.options[s.selectedIndex].text.split('/')[0].trim();tag.classList.add('active');}
23272 |   else{tag.textContent='All Sectors';tag.classList.remove('active');}
23273 |   calcLive();

23276 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
23277 |    LIVE SCORING
23278 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
23279 | function calcLive(){
23280 |   // â”€â”€ Step 0 context fields â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
23281 |   const hasSector  = document.getElementById('sector').value?1:0;
23282 |   const hasBizType = document.getElementById('bizType').value?1:0;
23283 |   const hasGeo     = document.getElementById('geo').value?1:0;
23284 |   const probLen    = document.getElementById('problem').value.length;
23285 |   const probScore  = probLen>120?5:probLen>60?3:probLen>20?1:0;
23286 |   const stageVal   = +(document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.dataset.val)||0;
23287 | 
23288 |   // Only score if context is filled
23289 |   const contextFilled = hasSector&&hasBizType&&hasGeo;
23290 | 
23291 |   // â”€â”€ Read actual selected values from AI questions â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
23292 |   // Each select has data-w (weight) and returns v (1-5)
23293 |   // We track which section each question belongs to via ID prefix
23294 |   const selScores={d1:[],d2:[],d3:[],d4:[],d5:[],d6:[]};
23295 | 
23296 |   // Map question IDs to dimensions
23297 |   // s1=Market Size(d1), s2=Audience(d2), s3=Competition(d3),
23298 |   // s4=Revenue(d4), s5=Risk(d5), s6=GTM(d4), s7=PMF(d2), s8=SectorFit(d6)
23299 |   const dimMap={'s1':'d1','s2':'d2','s3':'d3','s4':'d4','s5':'d5','s6':'d4','s7':'d2','s8':'d6','f1':'d1','f2':'d2','f3':'d3','f4':'d4','f5':'d5','f6':'d4','f7':'d2','f8':'d6'};
23300 | 
23301 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{
23302 |     if(!el.value)return;
23303 |     const v=+(el.value)||0;          // actual selected value 1-5
23304 |     const w=+(el.dataset.w)||2;      // weight of this question
23305 |     const prefix=el.id.replace(/q\d+$/,'').replace(/^s/,'s').slice(0,2); // e.g. s1, s2
23306 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||dimMap[el.id.slice(0,2)]||'d1';
23307 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w});
23308 |   });
23309 | 
23310 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{
23311 |     const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');
23312 |     if(!on)return;
23313 |     const v=+(on.dataset.val)||3;
23314 |     const id=grp.id||'';
23315 |     const prefix=id.slice(0,2);
23316 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||'d1';
23317 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w:2});
23318 |   });
23319 | 
23320 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{
23321 |     const section=el.closest('.sec');
23322 |     const secId=section?.id||'sec1';
23323 |     const secNum=+secId.replace('sec','')||1;
23324 |     const dimKeys=['d1','d2','d3','d4','d5','d4','d2','d6'];
23325 |     const dim=dimKeys[secNum-1]||'d6';
23326 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v:4,w:1}); // checkboxes = moderate positive
23327 |   });
23328 | 
23329 |   // â”€â”€ Calculate each dimension score (0-100) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
23330 |   function dimScore(key){
23331 |     const items=selScores[key]||[];
23332 |     if(!items.length)return null; // not yet answered
23333 |     const totalW=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.w,0);
23334 |     const weighted=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.v*i.w),0);
23335 |     // weighted average on 1-5 scale â†’ convert to 0-100
23336 |     return Math.round(((weighted/totalW)-1)/4*100);
23337 |   }
23338 | 
23339 |   const d1=dimScore('d1'); // Market Size
23340 |   const d2=dimScore('d2'); // Audience Quality
23341 |   const d3=dimScore('d3'); // Competition Edge
23342 |   const d4=dimScore('d4'); // Revenue Potential
23343 |   const d5=dimScore('d5'); // Risk Profile
23344 |   const d6=dimScore('d6'); // Sector Fit
23345 | 
23346 |   // â”€â”€ Context bonus (filling basics) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
23347 |   // Max 15 points for context â€” NOT for just having a sector selected
23348 |   const contextBonus=contextFilled?(hasSector*3+hasBizType*3+hasGeo*2+probScore+Math.min(stageVal,5)):0;
23349 | 
23350 |   // â”€â”€ Overall score = weighted average of dims + context â”€
23351 |   // Dims that haven't been answered yet are excluded from average
23352 |   const answeredDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6].filter(v=>v!==null);
23353 |   let overall=0;
23354 |   if(!contextFilled||answeredDims.length===0){
23355 |     // Nothing meaningful answered â€” score is 0
23356 |     overall=0;
23357 |   } else {
23358 |     // Weighted: competition(d3) and revenue(d4) matter most
23359 |     const weights=[15,20,25,25,10,5]; // d1 d2 d3 d4 d5 d6
23360 |     const allDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
23361 |     let wSum=0, wTotal=0;
23362 |     allDims.forEach((v,i)=>{
23363 |       if(v!==null){wSum+=v*weights[i];wTotal+=weights[i];}
23364 |     });
23365 |     const dimAvg=wTotal>0?wSum/wTotal:0;
23366 | 
23367 |     // Context bonus adds up to 15 points on top of dim average
23368 |     // But only if at least 2 sections answered
23369 |     const bonus=answeredDims.length>=2?Math.round(contextBonus/15*15):0;
23370 |     overall=Math.min(100,Math.round(dimAvg*0.85+bonus));
23371 | 
23372 |     // Penalty: if less than 3 sections answered, cap score at 60
23373 |     if(answeredDims.length<3)overall=Math.min(overall,60);
23374 |     // Penalty: if problem statement too short, cap at 70
23375 |     if(probLen<40&&overall>70)overall=70;
23376 |   }
23377 |

23379 |   const lsEl=document.getElementById('liveScore');
23380 |   const lgEl=document.getElementById('liveGrade');

23399 |   const dimVals=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];

23427 |   else if(t>=30)items.push('Several dimensions are weak â€” fill more steps to get precise guidance.');

23513 |     if(el)el.innerHTML='<div class="ql-skeleton"><div class="ql-skel-item"></div><div class="ql-skel-item"></div><div class="ql-skel-item"></div></div>';
23514 |   });

23516 |   try{
23517 |     // Retry with long wait for Gemini 429 rate limits (free tier = 15 req/min)
23518 |     const fetchWithRetry=async(url,opts,maxTries=2)=>{
23519 |       for(let attempt=1;attempt<=maxTries;attempt++){
23520 |         const r=await fetch(url,opts);
23521 |         if(r.status===429||r.status===529){
23522 |           if(attempt===maxTries) return r;
23523 |           const wait=62000; // Gemini free tier resets every 60s â€” wait 62s
23524 |           [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
23525 |             const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
23526 |             if(el)el.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:16px;font-size:12px;color:#627289;text-align:center">â³ Rate limit reached â€” waiting 62s for Gemini free tier resetâ€¦<br><br><span style="font-size:10px;color:#9BAABB">(Free tier: 15 requests/min. This is normal.)</span></div>`;
23527 |           });
23528 |           // Countdown display
23529 |           let remaining=62;
23530 |           const timer=setInterval(()=>{
23531 |             remaining--;
23532 |             [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
23533 |               const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
23534 |               if(el)el.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:16px;font-size:12px;color:#627289;text-align:center">â³ Rate limit â€” retrying in <strong style="color:#00338D">${remaining}s</strong>â€¦<br><br><span style="font-size:10px;color:#9BAABB">Gemini free tier resets every 60 seconds.</span></div>`;
23535 |             });
23536 |             if(remaining<=0)clearInterval(timer);
23537 |           },1000);
23538 |           await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,wait));
23539 |           clearInterval(timer);
23540 |           continue;
23541 |         }
23542 |         if(r.status>=500&&attempt<maxTries){
23543 |           await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000));
23544 |           continue;
23545 |         }
23546 |         return r;
23547 |       }
23548 |     };
23549 |

23589 |     if(fenceMatch) raw=fenceMatch[1].trim();
23590 | 
23591 |     // Find the outermost { â€¦ } â€” handles leading prose
23592 |     const start=raw.indexOf('{');
23593 |     const end=raw.lastIndexOf('}');
23594 |     if(start===-1||end===-1) throw new Error('No JSON object found in response');
23595 |     raw=raw.slice(start,end+1);
23596 | 
23597 |     // Attempt parse; on failure try to repair truncated JSON
23598 |     let parsed;
23599 |     try{
23600 |       parsed=JSON.parse(raw);
23601 |     }catch(parseErr){
23602 |       // Repair: truncate to last complete section by finding last complete "}]}" pattern
23603 |       const repaired=repairTruncatedJSON(raw);
23604 |       parsed=JSON.parse(repaired);
23605 |     }
23606 |

23608 |     if(aiQs.sb8txt)document.getElementById('sb8txt').textContent=aiQs.sb8txt;

23610 |     if(aiQs.realTimeData)window._rtData=aiQs.realTimeData;
23611 | 
23612 |     if(!Array.isArray(aiQs.sections)||aiQs.sections.length===0) throw new Error('No sections in parsed JSON');
23613 |     aiQs.sections.forEach((sec,i)=>renderSection(i+1,sec));
23614 | 
23615 |   }catch(e){
23616 |     console.warn('AI question gen failed, using fallback:',e.message);
23617 |     useFallbackQuestions(sector,bizType,geo);
23618 |   }
23619 | }
23620 | 
23621 | /* Repair a truncated JSON string by closing any open structures */
23622 | function repairTruncatedJSON(s){
23623 |   // Walk the string tracking depth; truncate at last complete top-level section
23624 |   // Strategy: find the last occurrence of "}]}" or "}]," and close from there
23625 |   let best=s;
23626 |   // Try progressively shorter slices to find parseable JSON
23627 |   for(let i=s.length-1;i>s.length*0.4;i--){
23628 |     const c=s[i];
23629 |     if(c==='}'){
23630 |       try{
23631 |         const candidate=closeJSON(s.slice(0,i+1));
23632 |         JSON.parse(candidate);
23633 |         best=candidate;
23634 |         break;
23635 |       }catch(_){}
23636 |     }
23637 |   }
23638 |   return best;
23639 | }
23640 | 
23641 | function closeJSON(s){
23642 |   // Count open brackets/braces
23643 |   let depth=0; const stack=[];
23644 |   for(const c of s){
23645 |     if(c==='{'){stack.push('}');}
23646 |     else if(c==='['){stack.push(']');}
23647 |     else if(c==='}'||c===']'){stack.pop();}
23648 |   }
23649 |   // Close any trailing comma before we close
23650 |   let result=s.replace(/,\s*$/,'');
23651 |   return result+stack.reverse().join('');
23652 | }
23653 | 
23654 | function renderSection(idx,sec){
23655 |   const el=document.getElementById('q'+idx);
23656 |   if(!el||!sec)return;
23657 |   let html=`<div class="sec-hd"><div class="sec-icon">${sec.icon||'ðŸ“‹'}</div><div><div class="sec-ttl">${sec.title}</div><div class="sec-sub">${sec.subtitle||''}</div></div></div><div class="fg">`;
23658 |   (sec.questions||[]).forEach(q=>{
23659 |     const wide=q.type==='checks'||q.type==='textarea';
23660 |     html+=`<div class="fd ${wide?'s2':''}">`;
23661 |     html+=`<label>${q.label}</label>`;
23662 |     if(q.hint)html+=`<div class="hint">ðŸ’¡ ${q.hint}</div>`;
23663 |     if(q.type==='select'){
23664 |       html+=`<select class="ai-sel" id="${q.id}" data-w="${q.w||2}" onchange="calcLive()"><option value="">Selectâ€¦</option>`;
23665 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<option value="${o.v}">${o.t}</option>`;});
23666 |       html+=`</select>`;
23667 |     }else if(q.type==='pills'){
23668 |       html+=`<div class="pills ai-pills" id="${q.id}_pills">`;
23669 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<span class="pill" data-val="${o.v||3}" onclick="pickAIPill(this)">${o.t}</span>`;});
23670 |       html+=`</div>`;
23671 |     }else if(q.type==='checks'){
23672 |       html+=`<div class="ckg">`;
23673 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<label class="cki"><input type="checkbox" class="ai-chk" onchange="calcLive()"> ${o.t}</label>`;});
23674 |       html+=`</div>`;
23675 |     }else if(q.type==='text'){
23676 |       html+=`<input type="text" class="ai-txt" id="${q.id}" placeholder="${q.placeholder||'Enter valueâ€¦'}" oninput="calcLive()"/>`;
23677 |     }
23678 |     html+=`</div>`;
23679 |   });
23680 |   html+=`</div>`;
23681 |   el.innerHTML=html;
23682 | }

23747 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
23748 |    COLLECT FORM DATA
23749 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
23750 | function collectData(){
23751 |   const gopt=id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);return el?.options[el.selectedIndex]?.text||'';};
23752 |   const getv=id=>document.getElementById(id)?.value||'';
23753 |   const answers={};
23754 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{answers[el.id]=el.options[el.selectedIndex]?.text||'';});
23755 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');if(on)answers[grp.id]=on.textContent;});
23756 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-txt').forEach(el=>{if(el.value)answers[el.id]=el.value;});
23757 |   const chkGroups={};
23758 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{const g=el.closest('.ckg')?.parentElement?.querySelector('label')?.textContent||'checks';chkGroups[g]=(chkGroups[g]||[]);chkGroups[g].push(el.parentElement.textContent.trim());});
23759 |   Object.assign(answers,chkGroups);
23760 |   return {
23761 |     bizName:getv('bizName')||'Unnamed Business',
23762 |     sector:gopt('sector'),sectorCode:getv('sector'),
23763 |     bizType:gopt('bizType'),bizTypeCode:getv('bizType'),
23764 |     geo:gopt('geo'),geoCode:getv('geo'),
23765 |     problem:getv('problem')||'Not described',
23766 |     stage:document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.textContent||'Not specified',
23767 |     answers,
23768 |   };
23769 | }
23770 | 
23771 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
23772 |    LOADER
23773 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
23774 | function setLoader(n,msg,pct){
23775 |   for(let i=1;i<=5;i++){const el=document.getElementById('ls'+i);if(!el)continue;el.className='ld-step'+(i<n?' done':i===n?' active':'');}
23776 |   document.getElementById('ldStatus').textContent=msg||'';
23777 |   document.getElementById('ldBar').style.width=(pct||0)+'%';
23778 | }
23779 | function showLoader(){document.getElementById('assessShell').style.display='none';document.getElementById('loaderShell').style.display='flex';}
23780 | function hideLoader(){document.getElementById('loaderShell').style.display='none';}
23781 | 
23782 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
23783 |    MAIN BUILD
23784 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
23785 | async function buildDashboard(){
23786 |   const fd=collectData();
23787 |   showLoader();
23788 |   setLoader(1,'Reading your inputsâ€¦',8);
23789 |   await tick(200);
23790 |   let analysis;
23791 |   try{
23792 |     setLoader(2,`Searching live ${fd.sector} market data in ${fd.geo}â€¦`,25);
23793 |     await tick(150);
23794 |     setLoader(3,'Fetching real-time competitor profiles & funding dataâ€¦',48);
23795 |     analysis=await callAPI(fd);
23796 |     setLoader(4,'Calculating TAM/SAM/SOM, scores & 12-month projectionsâ€¦',75);
23797 |     await tick(300);
23798 |     setLoader(5,'Assembling your market intelligence dashboardâ€¦',95);
23799 |     await tick(400);
23800 |   }catch(e){
23801 |     console.warn('API failed, using fallback:',e.message);
23802 |     setLoader(5,'Running offline analysisâ€¦',95);

23804 |     await tick(600);
23805 |   }
23806 |   renderDash(fd,analysis);
23807 | }

23914 |   // Exponential backoff helper (shared pattern)
23915 |   const fetchWithRetry=async(url,opts,maxTries=3)=>{
23916 |     for(let attempt=1;attempt<=maxTries;attempt++){
23917 |       const r=await fetch(url,opts);
23918 |       if((r.status===429||r.status===529||r.status>=500)&&attempt<maxTries){
23919 |         await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,Math.min(2000*Math.pow(2,attempt-1),16000)));
23920 |         continue;
23921 |       }
23922 |       return r;
23923 |     }
23924 |   };

23928 |     _type:'analysis',

23931 |   if(!resp.ok) throw new Error('HTTP '+resp.status);
23932 |   const data=await resp.json();

23934 |   if(!allText) throw new Error('Empty API response');

23938 |   const fm=raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
23939 |   if(fm) raw=fm[1].trim();
23940 | 
23941 |   // Find outermost JSON object
23942 |   const s0=raw.indexOf('{'), e0=raw.lastIndexOf('}');
23943 |   if(s0===-1||e0===-1) throw new Error('No JSON in response');
23944 |   raw=raw.slice(s0,e0+1);
23945 | 
23946 |   // Parse with truncation repair fallback
23947 |   let parsed;
23948 |   try{ parsed=JSON.parse(raw); }
23949 |   catch(_){
23950 |     try{ parsed=JSON.parse(repairTruncatedJSON(raw)); }
23951 |     catch(e2){ throw new Error('JSON parse failed: '+e2.message); }
23952 |   }
23953 |   // Merge Gemini response with offline fallback for any missing fields
23954 |   // This ensures we ALWAYS use real AI data where available, fill gaps from fallback
23955 |   if(!parsed||typeof parsed!=='object'){
23956 |     throw new Error('No valid JSON from Gemini');

23959 |   // Return what we got â€” renderDash has guards for missing fields
