23966 | function offlineAnalysis(fd){
23967 |   const sc=fd.sectorCode;
23968 |   const gc=fd.geoCode;
23969 |   const isIndia=['T1','T2','PI'].includes(gc);
23970 |   const TAM={IT:2800,HC:1400,FS:3500,EC:8000,ED:650,MF:12000,RE:6000,LG:4500,ME:1200,AG:900,EN:2200,OT:500};
23971 |   const GR={IT:28,HC:22,FS:25,EC:35,ED:30,MF:15,RE:12,LG:14,ME:18,AG:20,EN:32,OT:18};
23972 |   const tamC=(TAM[sc]||500)*(isIndia?0.18:1.0);
23973 |   const gr=GR[sc]||20;
23974 |   const t=+document.getElementById('liveScore').textContent||50;
23975 |   const tgtPct=Math.round(2+t/100*8);
23976 | 
23977 |   // Always use sector default competitors â€” never fall back to empty
23978 |   const defComps={
23979 |     IT:['Zoho','Freshworks','LeadSquared'],
23980 |     HC:['Practo','Mfine','Portea'],
23981 |     FS:['Razorpay','Zerodha','PayU'],
23982 |     EC:['Meesho','Flipkart','Nykaa'],
23983 |     ED:["BYJU'S",'Unacademy','upGrad'],
23984 |     MF:['Tata Technologies','L&T','Mahindra'],
23985 |     RE:['NoBroker','MagicBricks','99acres'],
23986 |     LG:['Delhivery','Ecom Express','Shiprocket'],
23987 |     ME:['Zee5','SonyLiv','MXPlayer'],
23988 |     AG:['DeHaat','Ninjacart','Agristack'],
23989 |     EN:['ReNew Power','Greenko','Adani Green'],
23990 |     OT:['Competitor A','Competitor B','Competitor C']
23991 |   };
23992 |   const compList=(defComps[sc]||['Competitor A','Competitor B','Competitor C']).slice(0,3);
23993 | 
23994 |   const rem=100-tgtPct;
23995 |   const spl=[0.35,0.27,0.20,0.12];
23996 | 
23997 |   // Market share â€” always 5 entries: product + 3 competitors + Others
23998 |   const mshare=[
23999 |     {name:fd.bizName, pct:tgtPct, val:'â‚¹'+Math.round(tamC*tgtPct/100)+'Cr'},
24000 |     {name:compList[0], pct:Math.round(rem*spl[0]), val:'â‚¹'+Math.round(tamC*rem*spl[0]/100)+'Cr'},

24122 | function renderDash(fd,a){

24488 |     const validVals=data.filter(v=>typeof v==='number'&&!isNaN(v));
24489 |     const mx=validVals.length?Math.max(...validVals):0;
24490 |     const mn=validVals.length?Math.min(...validVals):0;
24491 |     const spread=mx-mn;
24492 |

24756 |   function renderMap(world){
24757 |     const wrap=document.getElementById('mapWrap');
24758 |     const tip=document.getElementById('mapTT');
24759 |     const W=wrap.offsetWidth,H=wrap.offsetHeight;
24760 |     if(W<50||H<30){setTimeout(()=>renderMap(world),150);return;}
24761 |     const svgEl=document.getElementById('worldMap');
24762 |     svgEl.setAttribute('width',W);svgEl.setAttribute('height',H);
24763 |     svgEl.setAttribute('viewBox',`0 0 ${W} ${H}`);
24764 |     svgEl.style.width=W+'px';svgEl.style.height=H+'px';
24765 |     const svg=d3.select(svgEl);svg.selectAll('*').remove();
24766 |     const proj=d3.geoEquirectangular().fitSize([W,H],{type:'Sphere'});
24767 |     const pathFn=d3.geoPath().projection(proj);
24768 |     const countries=topojson.feature(world,world.objects.countries);
24769 |     const borders=topojson.mesh(world,world.objects.countries,(a,b)=>a!==b);
24770 |     // Dark ocean
24771 |     svg.append('rect').attr('width',W).attr('height',H).attr('fill','#C8D8F0');
24772 |     svg.append('path').datum(d3.geoGraticule().step([30,30])()).attr('d',pathFn).attr('fill','none').attr('stroke','rgba(0,145,218,0.04)').attr('stroke-width','0.4');
24773 |     svg.selectAll('.ctry').data(countries.features).join('path').attr('class','ctry').attr('d',pathFn)
24774 |       .attr('fill',d=>{
24775 |         const r=getRegion(d.id);
24776 |         if(!r)return '#A8C0D8';
24777 |         const rd=RDATA_D[r];
24778 |         // Zero/untargeted regions get a muted version of their color
24779 |         return rd&&rd.zero?rga(RCOL_D[r],0.25):RCOL_D[r];
24780 |       })
24781 |       .attr('stroke','rgba(0,20,50,0.5)').attr('stroke-width','0.3').style('cursor','pointer')
24782 |       .attr('opacity',d=>{const r=getRegion(d.id);return r&&RDATA_D[r]?.zero?0.5:1;})
24783 |       .on('mouseover',function(ev,d){

24787 |         tip.innerHTML=`<strong style="color:#fff">${r}</strong>${isIndia?' <span style="color:#7FDEBD;font-size:9px">Â· Click for India drill-down</span>':''}<br>${rd.zero?'<span style="color:#9BAABB;font-size:10px">Outside target geography â€” global sector opportunity shown</span>':`Rev: <span style="color:#7FDEBD">${rd.v}</span> &nbsp;Â·&nbsp; Share: <span style="color:#BDD0EC">${rd.p}</span>`}`;

25124 |     // Score gauge â€” clean minimal
25125 |     function scoreGaugeSVG(score,W,H){
25126 |       const cx=W/2, cy=100, R=72, sw=12;
25127 |       const pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,score))/100;
25128 |       const arcColor=score>=70?'#10B981':score>=50?'#F59E0B':'#EF4444';
25129 |       const gradId='g'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,6);
25130 |       // Arc endpoints: left=180deg, right=0deg, going clockwise (bottom open)
25131 |       const sx=cx-R, sy=cy;
25132 |       const ex=cx+R, ey=cy;
25133 |       const scX=cx+R*Math.cos(Math.PI*(1-pct));
25134 |       const scY=cy-R*Math.sin(Math.PI*pct);
25135 |       const lg=pct>0.5?1:0;
25136 |       // Grade label
25137 |       const grade=score>=70?'Strong':score>=50?'Moderate':'Needs Work';
25138 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="118" viewBox="0 0 ${W} 118" style="display:block;overflow:visible;">
25139 |         <defs>
25140 |           <linearGradient id="${gradId}" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
25141 |             <stop offset="0%" stop-color="${arcColor}" stop-opacity="0.4"/>
25142 |             <stop offset="100%" stop-color="${arcColor}"/>
25143 |           </linearGradient>
25144 |         </defs>
25145 |         <!-- Grey track -->
25146 |         <path d="M${sx},${sy} A${R},${R} 0 0,1 ${ex},${ey}"
25147 |               fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"/>
25148 |         <!-- Coloured score arc -->
25149 |         <path d="M${sx},${sy} A${R},${R} 0 ${lg},1 ${scX},${scY}"
25150 |               fill="none" stroke="url(#${gradId})" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"/>
25151 |         <!-- 0 and 100 end labels -->
25152 |         <text x="${sx-8}" y="${sy+5}" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">0</text>
25153 |         <text x="${ex+8}" y="${ey+5}" text-anchor="start" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">100</text>
25154 |         <!-- Centre tick at 50 -->
25155 |         <line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy-R-sw/2-2}" x2="${cx}" y2="${cy-R+sw/2+2}" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
25156 |         <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-R-sw/2-6}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">50</text>
25157 |         <!-- Needle -->
25158 |         <line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy}" x2="${scX}" y2="${scY}"
25159 |               stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.7)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
25160 |         <circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" stroke-width="1"/>
25161 |         <circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="2.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)"/>
25162 |         <!-- Score -->
25163 |         <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-18}" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace"
25164 |               font-size="34" font-weight="700" fill="${arcColor}">${score}</text>
25165 |         <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-3}" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
25166 |               font-size="8.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.35)" letter-spacing=".12em">OUT OF 100</text>
25167 |       </svg>`;
25168 |     }

25170 |     // Funnel â€” proper trapezoid shape + side descriptions
25171 |     function funnelSVG(){
25172 |       const tam = +(a.tamCrore)||100;
25173 |       const sam = +(a.samCrore)||30;
25174 |       const som = +(a.somCrore)||5;
25175 |       const fmtV = v => v >= 1000 ? 'â‚¹' + (v/1000).toFixed(1) + 'K Cr' : 'â‚¹' + Math.round(v) + 'Cr';
25176 | 
25177 |       // Layout â€” funnel on left, labels on right
25178 |       const SVG_W = 480;
25179 |       const FW = 200;   // funnel column width
25180 |       const LX = 224;   // label column starts here
25181 |       const SEG = 64;   // height of each segment
25182 |       const GAP = 4;    // gap between segments
25183 |       const SVG_H = SEG * 3 + GAP * 2 + 12;
25184 | 
25185 |       const steps = [
25186 |         {
25187 |           v: tam, l: 'TAM', pct: 100,
25188 |           c: '#1A56B0',
25189 |           title: 'Total Addressable Market',
25190 |           desc: 'The entire market demand for your product category in the target geography.',
25191 |           tw: FW, bw: Math.round(FW * 0.68)
25192 |         },
25193 |         {
25194 |           v: sam, l: 'SAM', pct: Math.round(sam/tam*100),
25195 |           c: '#0891B2',
25196 |           title: 'Serviceable Available Market',
25197 |           desc: 'The segment you can realistically reach with your current model and channels.',
25198 |           tw: Math.round(FW * 0.68), bw: Math.round(FW * 0.38)
25199 |         },
25200 |         {
25201 |           v: som, l: 'SOM', pct: Math.round(som/tam*100),
25202 |           c: '#059669',
25203 |           title: '3-Year Revenue Target',
25204 |           desc: 'Your realistic capture target â€” typically 2-8% of SAM at early stage.',
25205 |           tw: Math.round(FW * 0.38), bw: Math.round(FW * 0.16)
25206 |         }
25207 |       ];
25208 | 
25209 |       const parts = steps.map((s, i) => {
25210 |         const y = 6 + i * (SEG + GAP);
25211 |         const cx = FW / 2;
25212 |         // Trapezoid: top-left, top-right, bottom-right, bottom-left
25213 |         const tlx = cx - s.tw/2, trx = cx + s.tw/2;
25214 |         const blx = cx - s.bw/2, brx = cx + s.bw/2;
25215 |         const path = `M${tlx},${y} L${trx},${y} L${brx},${y+SEG} L${blx},${y+SEG} Z`;
25216 |         const my = y + SEG/2;
25217 | 
25218 |         // Label block on the right
25219 |         const lmy = my;
25220 |         const labelLines = s.desc.match(/.{1,44}(\s|$)/g) || [s.desc];
25221 | 
25222 |         return `
25223 |           <!-- segment ${i} -->
25224 |           <path d="${path}" fill="${s.c}" opacity="0.85"/>
25225 |           <path d="${path}" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" stroke-width="1.2"/>
25226 |           <!-- value -->
25227 |           <text x="${cx}" y="${my - 9}" text-anchor="middle"
25228 |                 font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#fff">${fmtV(s.v)}</text>
25229 |           <!-- label + pct -->
25230 |           <text x="${cx}" y="${my + 8}" text-anchor="middle"
25231 |                 font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)">${s.l} &nbsp;Â·&nbsp; ${s.pct}% of TAM</text>
25232 |           <!-- connector dot + line -->
25233 |           <circle cx="${FW + 6}" cy="${lmy}" r="4" fill="${s.c}"/>
25234 |           <line x1="${FW + 10}" y1="${lmy}" x2="${LX - 4}" y2="${lmy}" stroke="${s.c}" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
25235 |           <!-- right label -->
25236 |           <text x="${LX}" y="${lmy - 14}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
25237 |                 font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="${s.c}">${s.title}</text>
25238 |           ${labelLines.slice(0,2).map((ln, li) =>
25239 |             `<text x="${LX}" y="${lmy + li * 12}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
25240 |                    font-size="8.5" fill="#6B7280">${ln.trim()}</text>`
25241 |           ).join('')}
25242 |         `;
25243 |       }).join('');
25244 | 
25245 |       // Divider lines between segments
25246 |       const dividers = [1,2].map(i => {
25247 |         const y = 6 + i * (SEG + GAP) - GAP;
25248 |         return `<line x1="2" y1="${y}" x2="${FW-2}" y2="${y}"
25249 |                       stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>`;
25250 |       }).join('');
25251 | 
25252 |       return `<svg width="${SVG_W}" height="${SVG_H}"
25253 |                    viewBox="0 0 ${SVG_W} ${SVG_H}"
25254 |                    style="display:block;width:100%;max-width:${SVG_W}px;overflow:visible;">
25255 |         ${parts}
25256 |         ${dividers}
25257 |       </svg>`;
25258 |     }

25260 |     // Donut chart â€” pure SVG
25261 |     function donutSVG(data,W,cx,cy,OR,IR){
25262 |       const tot=data.reduce((s,d)=>s+(+d.v||0),0)||100;
25263 |       let ang=-Math.PI/2;
25264 |       return data.map((d,i)=>{
25265 |         const sw=(+d.v||0)/tot*2*Math.PI;
25266 |         if(sw<0.02){ang+=sw;return '';}
25267 |         const x1=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang),y1=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang);
25268 |         const x2=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y2=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
25269 |         const x3=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y3=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
25270 |         const x4=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang),y4=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang);
25271 |         const lg=sw>Math.PI?1:0;
25272 |         const mx=cx+(OR+IR)/2*Math.cos(ang+sw/2),my=cy+(OR+IR)/2*Math.sin(ang+sw/2);
25273 |         const pct=Math.round((+d.v||0)/tot*100);
25274 |         const lbl2=pct>=6?`<text x="${mx}" y="${my+3.5}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.95)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${pct}%</text>`:'';
25275 |         ang+=sw;
25276 |         return `<path d="M${x1},${y1} A${OR},${OR} 0 ${lg},1 ${x2},${y2} L${x3},${y3} A${IR},${IR} 0 ${lg},0 ${x4},${y4} Z" fill="${d.c}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5"/>${lbl2}`;
25277 |       }).join('');
25278 |     }

25284 |         const v=dim[d.k]||0, y=8+i*36;
25285 |         const bw=Math.max(4,(W-lw-40)*v/100);
25286 |         const statusC=colfn(v);
25287 |         return `<text x="${lw-8}" y="${y+16}" text-anchor="end" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#374151" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${d.l}</text>
25288 |           <rect x="${lw}" y="${y+6}" width="${W-lw-40}" height="16" rx="3" fill="#F3F4F6"/>
25289 |           <rect x="${lw}" y="${y+6}" width="${bw}" height="16" rx="3" fill="${d.c}" opacity="0.85"/>
25290 |           <text x="${lw+bw+5}" y="${y+17}" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="${d.c}" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${v}</text>
25291 |           <text x="${W-2}" y="${y+17}" text-anchor="end" font-size="8" font-weight="600" fill="${statusC}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${lblfn(v)}</text>`;
25292 |       }).join('');
25293 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="${H}" viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" style="max-width:100%;">${rows}</svg>`;
25294 |     }

25357 |     // Risk heatmap â€” improved
25358 |     function riskSVG(){
25359 |       const risks2=a.topRisks||[];
25360 |       const items=[
25361 |         {l:'Competitive Response',p:2,i:3},
25362 |         {l:'Regulatory Risk',p:1,i:3},
25363 |         {l:risks2[0]?risks2[0].slice(0,18):'Execution Risk',p:2,i:2},
25364 |         {l:risks2[1]?risks2[1].slice(0,18):'Market Timing',p:3,i:2},
25365 |         {l:'Tech Disruption',p:1,i:2},
25366 |         {l:'Talent Shortage',p:1,i:1},
25367 |       ];
25368 |       const W=280,H=220,lx=52,ty=28,cw=(W-lx)/3,ch=(H-ty-20)/3;
25369 |       const heatfill=(p,iv)=>{const v=p*iv;return v>=6?'rgba(239,68,68,0.12)':v>=4?'rgba(245,158,11,0.12)':v>=2?'rgba(59,130,246,0.08)':'rgba(16,185,129,0.07)';};
25370 |       const cells=[];
25371 |       for(let row=0;row<3;row++)for(let col2=0;col2<3;col2++){
25372 |         cells.push(`<rect x="${lx+col2*cw}" y="${ty+row*ch}" width="${cw}" height="${ch}" fill="${heatfill(3-row,col2+1)}" rx="2"/>
25373 |           <rect x="${lx+col2*cw}" y="${ty+row*ch}" width="${cw}" height="${ch}" fill="none" stroke="#E5E7EB" stroke-width="0.8"/>`);
25374 |       }
25375 |       const dots=items.map((it)=>{
25376 |         const dcx=lx+(it.i-1)*cw+cw/2, dcy=ty+(3-it.p)*ch+ch/2;
25377 |         const dc=it.p*it.i>=6?'#EF4444':it.p*it.i>=4?'#F59E0B':'#3B82F6';
25378 |         return `<circle cx="${dcx}" cy="${dcy}" r="12" fill="${dc}" opacity="0.12"/>
25379 |           <circle cx="${dcx}" cy="${dcy}" r="4.5" fill="${dc}"/>
25380 |           <text x="${dcx}" y="${dcy-16}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#4B5563" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${it.l.slice(0,14)}</text>`;
25381 |       }).join('');
25382 |       const axY=['High','Med','Low'].map((l,i)=>`<text x="${lx-5}" y="${ty+i*ch+ch/2+4}" text-anchor="end" font-size="8" fill="#6B7280" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${l}</text>`).join('');
25383 |       const axX=['Low','Medium','High'].map((l,i)=>`<text x="${lx+i*cw+cw/2}" y="${H-4}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6B7280" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${l}</text>`).join('');
25384 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="${H}" viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" style="overflow:visible;max-width:100%;">
25385 |         ${cells.join('')}${dots}${axY}${axX}
25386 |         <text x="${lx-28}" y="${ty+1.5*ch}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#9CA3AF" transform="rotate(-90,${lx-28},${ty+1.5*ch})" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">PROBABILITY</text>
25387 |         <text x="${lx+1.5*cw}" y="${H+2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#9CA3AF" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">IMPACT</text>
25388 |       </svg>`;
25389 |     }

25391 |     /* â•â•â• BUILD HTML â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
25392 |     const html=`
25393 | <div style="font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;color:#111827;background:#F8FAFC;">
25394 | 
25395 |   <!-- â•â• COVER PAGE â•â• -->

25746 |         setView("auth");
25747 |         setUserData(null);

25750 |       }
25751 |     });

25849 |   const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signUp({ email, password });

25851 |   return data;

25855 |   const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({ email, password });
25856 |   if (error) throw new Error(error.message);
25857 |   return data;
25858 | }

25862 |   if (error) throw new Error(error.message);

25886 |

25888 |     user_id:       user?.id ?? null,
25889 |     name:          userData.name          || "",
25890 |     email:         userData.email         || "",
25891 |     phone:         userData.phone         || "",
25892 |     organization:  userData.organization  || "",
25893 |     role:          userData.role          || "",

25897 |     sector:        userData.sector        || "",

25900 |     stage:         userData.stage         || "",

25902 |     overall_score: result?.overallScore   ?? null,

25904 |     dimensions:    result?.dimensions     ?? null,
25905 |     analysis_json: result,
25906 |   };

25918 |   if (!user) return [];

25921 |     .from("submissions")

26223 | ===== C:\Users\admin\Downloads\infopace-react (1)\infopace-react\src\lib\gemini.js =====
26224 | /**
26225 |  * generateAnalysis â€” calls the Node proxy (server.js â†’ Gemini)
26226 |  * Returns a parsed analysis object.
26227 |  */
26228 | export async function generateAnalysis(userData, answers = {}) {
26229 |   const answerLines = Object.entries(answers)
26230 |     .filter(([, v]) => v && v !== "")
26231 |     .map(([, v]) => `  - ${Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : v}`)
26232 |     .join("\n");
26233 | 
26234 |   const prompt = `You are a senior market intelligence analyst with deep knowledge of Indian and global markets.
26235 | 
26236 | Analyse this product and produce a data-driven market assessment using your real knowledge of this sector, geography, and companies.
26237 | 
26238 | PRODUCT: ${userData.organization || "Unnamed"}
26239 | SECTOR: ${userData.sector || "Not specified"}
26240 | BUSINESS TYPE: ${userData.role || "Not specified"}
26241 | TARGET GEOGRAPHY: ${userData.geography || "Not specified"}
26242 | BUSINESS STAGE: ${userData.stage || "Not specified"}
26243 | PROBLEM BEING SOLVED: ${userData.problem || "Not described"}
26244 | 
26245 | WHAT THE FOUNDER TOLD US ABOUT THEIR MARKET:
26246 | ${answerLines || "(answers not provided)"}
26247 | 
26248 | CRITICAL INSTRUCTIONS:
26249 | 1. Use your REAL knowledge of the ${userData.sector} market in ${userData.geography} â€” cite real TAM figures, real CAGR rates
26250 | 2. Name REAL competitors that actually exist in ${userData.sector} in ${userData.geography} â€” not placeholders
26251 | 3. Score those competitors based on your actual knowledge of their market position
26252 | 4. Revenue by region must reflect real market concentration for ${userData.sector} in ${userData.geography}
26253 | 5. The overall score must genuinely reflect the founder's answers above
26254 | 6. TAM/SAM/SOM must be realistic for this specific sector and geography
26255 | 
26256 | Return ONLY raw JSON, no markdown fences, no explanation before or after:
26257 | {
26258 | "overallScore": <0-100>,
26259 | "grade": "Excellent" or "Strong" or "Moderate" or "Needs Work" or "Critical",
26260 | "verdict": "<One specific sentence naming the product, its key opportunity, and its biggest risk>",
26261 | "realTimeInsight": "<One real market fact with actual numbers>",
26262 | "dimensions": {"marketSize":<0-100>,"audienceQuality":<0-100>,"competitionEdge":<0-100>,"revenuePotential":<0-100>,"riskProfile":<0-100>,"sectorFit":<0-100>},
26263 | "tamCrore": <realistic TAM in â‚¹Crore>,
26264 | "samCrore": <serviceable portion>,
26265 | "somCrore": <3-year realistic target>,
26266 | "growthRate": <real CAGR %>,
26267 | "competitorProfiles": [
26268 |   {"name":"<REAL company 1>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<real strength>","weakness":"<real gap>","marketSharePct":<realistic %>},
26269 |   {"name":"<REAL company 2>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<real strength>","weakness":"<real gap>","marketSharePct":<realistic %>},
26270 |   {"name":"<REAL company 3>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<real strength>","weakness":"<real gap>","marketSharePct":<realistic %>}
26271 | ],
26272 | "marketShare": [
26273 |   {"name":"<product>","pct":<1-10>,"val":"â‚¹<somCrore>Cr"},
26274 |   {"name":"<real comp 1>","pct":<their share %>,"val":"â‚¹<amount>Cr"},
26275 |   {"name":"<real comp 2>","pct":<their share %>,"val":"â‚¹<amount>Cr"},
26276 |   {"name":"<real comp 3>","pct":<their share %>,"val":"â‚¹<amount>Cr"},
26277 |   {"name":"Others","pct":<remainder>,"val":"â€”"}
26278 | ],
26279 | "revenueByRegion": {
26280 |   "labels": [<5-6 real cities relevant to the sector>],
26281 |   "currentMarket": [<real â‚¹Cr market size per city>],
26282 |   "projected2027": [<apply growthRate CAGR>],
26283 |   "ourTarget": [<realistic 2-8% of each city market>]
26284 | },
26285 | "competitorRadar": [
26286 |   {"name":"<product>","scores":{"pricingPower":<0-100>,"distribution":<0-100>,"brandValue":<0-100>,"innovation":<0-100>,"marketReach":<0-100>,"customerSat":<0-100>},"avg":"<average>"},
26287 |   {"name":"<comp 1>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"},
26288 |   {"name":"<comp 2>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"},
26289 |   {"name":"<comp 3>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"}
26290 | ],
26291 | "trendData": {
26292 |   "months": ["Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec","Jan","Feb","Mar"],
26293 |   "series": [
26294 |     {"label":"<product>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values 0-1% to 3-8%>]},
26295 |     {"label":"<comp 1>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~20-35%>]},
26296 |     {"label":"<comp 2>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~15-25%>]},
26297 |     {"label":"<comp 3>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~10-20%>]}
26298 |   ]
26299 | },
26300 | "geoRegions": {
26301 |   "Asia Pacific": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[4,50,156,356,360,392,410,458,702,704,764]},
26302 |   "North America": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[124,484,840]},
26303 |   "South America": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[32,68,76,152,170]},
26304 |   "Europe": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[276,250,826,380,724,528,208,752,756,616]},
26305 |   "Africa": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[566,710,404,818,12]}
26306 | },
26307 | "keyInsights": ["<insight 1 with numbers>","<insight 2>","<insight 3>","<insight 4>","<90-day action>"],
26308 | "topRisks": ["<risk 1>","<risk 2>","<risk 3>"],
26309 | "quickWins": ["<win 1>","<win 2>","<win 3>"],
26310 | "popups": {
26311 |   "mktshare": "<2 sentences: TAM/SAM/SOM + competitor context>",
26312 |   "revregion": "<2 sentences: priority cities and why>",
26313 |   "radar": "<2 sentences: where product leads and trails>",
26314 |   "trend": "<2 sentences: trajectory and inflection point>",
26315 |   "geomap": "<2 sentences: geographic focus rationale>"
26316 | }
26317 | }`;
26318 | 
26319 |   const resp = await fetch("/api", {
26320 |     method: "POST",
26321 |     headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
26322 |     body: JSON.stringify({ _type: "analysis", prompt }),
26323 |   });
26324 | 
26325 |   if (!resp.ok) throw new Error("API error " + resp.status);
26326 | 
26327 |   const data = await resp.json();
26328 | 
26329 |   // Support both Gemini native format and Anthropic-style wrapper
26330 |   const allText = (data?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts || [])
26331 |     .map((p) => p.text || "")
26332 |     .join("") || (data?.content?.[0]?.text || "");
26333 | 
26334 |   if (!allText) throw new Error("Empty API response");
26335 | 
26336 |   let raw = allText.trim();
26337 |   const fm = raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
26338 |   if (fm) raw = fm[1].trim();
26339 | 
26340 |   const s0 = raw.indexOf("{"), e0 = raw.lastIndexOf("}");
26341 |   if (s0 === -1 || e0 === -1) throw new Error("No JSON in response");
26342 |   raw = raw.slice(s0, e0 + 1);
26343 | 
26344 |   return JSON.parse(raw);
26345 | }

26388 |     "Other":                "B2B_SME",

26392 |     organization: userData.organization,
26393 |     sectorCode:   SECTOR_MAP[userData.sector]    || "OT",
26394 |     bizTypeCode:  ROLE_BIZ_TYPE_MAP[userData.role] || "B2B_SME",

26396 |     problem:      userData.problem,
26397 |     stage:        userData.stage,
26398 |   };
26399 | }
26400 | 
26401 | const LOADER_STEPS = [
26402 |   { n: 1, msg: "Reading your inputsâ€¦",                                      pct: 8  },
26403 |   { n: 2, msg: "Searching live market data & sector sizingâ€¦",               pct: 25 },
26404 |   { n: 3, msg: "Fetching real-time competitor profiles & funding dataâ€¦",    pct: 48 },
26405 |   { n: 4, msg: "Calculating TAM/SAM/SOM, scores & 12-month projectionsâ€¦",   pct: 75 },
26406 |   { n: 5, msg: "Assembling your market intelligence dashboardâ€¦",            pct: 95 },
26407 | ];
26408 | 
26409 | export default function AssessmentAndDashboard({ userData, onRestart }) {
26410 |   const iframeRef      = useRef(null);
26411 |   const prefillSentRef = useRef(false);
26412 |   // Store latest result so the PDF export button can access it
26413 |   const latestResultRef = useRef(null);
26414 |   const latestFdRef     = useRef(null);
26415 | 
26416 |   function postToIframe(msg) {
26417 |     iframeRef.current?.contentWindow?.postMessage(msg, "*");
26418 |   }
26419 | 
26420 |   async function handleSubmit(fd) {
26421 |     latestFdRef.current = fd;
26422 | 
26423 |     // Drive loader steps in the iframe
26424 |     for (const s of LOADER_STEPS) {
26425 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: s.n, msg: s.msg, pct: s.pct });
26426 |       await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, s.n === 3 ? 150 : 300));
26427 |     }
26428 | 
26429 |     try {
26430 |       const result = await generateAnalysis(userData, fd.answers || {});
26431 |       latestResultRef.current = result;
26432 | 
26433 |       // Save to Supabase (non-blocking)
26434 |       saveSubmission({ userData, answers: fd.answers || {}, result })
26435 |         .catch(e => console.warn("DB save failed:", e.message));
26436 | 
26437 |       // Render dashboard in iframe
26438 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: result });
26439 | 
26440 |     } catch (err) {
26441 |       console.error("Analysis failed:", err);
26442 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: 5, msg: "Running offline analysisâ€¦", pct: 95 });
26443 |       setTimeout(() => {
26444 |         postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: {} });
26445 |       }, 800);
26446 |     }
26447 |   }
26448 | 
26449 |   useEffect(() => {
26450 |     function handleMessage(event) {
26451 |       if (!event.data) return;
26452 | 
26453 |       // Iframe loaded â€” send prefill
26454 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_LOADED") {
26455 |         if (!prefillSentRef.current) {
26456 |           prefillSentRef.current = true;
26457 |           postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_PREFILL", userData: buildPrefill(userData) });
26458 |         }
26459 |       }
26460 | 
26461 |       // User clicked Generate Dashboard
26462 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_SUBMIT") {
26463 |         handleSubmit(event.data.fd);
26464 |       }
26465 | 
26466 |       // Export PDF clicked inside the iframe sidebar
26467 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_EXPORT_PDF") {
26468 |         handleExportPdf();
26469 |       }
26470 | 
26471 |       // New Assessment
26472 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_RESET") {
26473 |         onRestart();
26474 |       }
26475 |     }
26476 | 
26477 |     window.addEventListener("message", handleMessage);
26478 |     return () => window.removeEventListener("message", handleMessage);
26479 |   }, [userData]);
26480 | 
26481 |   function handleExportPdf() {
26482 |     exportPdf({
26483 |       userData,
26484 |       answers:  latestFdRef.current?.answers || {},
26485 |       result:   latestResultRef.current || {},
26486 |     });
26487 |   }
26488 | 
26489 |   return (
26490 |     <iframe
26491 |       ref={iframeRef}
26492 |       src="/dashboard.html"
26493 |       style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, border: "none", width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
26494 |       title="Infopace Assessment"
26495 |       sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups allow-downloads"
26496 |     />
26497 |   );
26498 | }

26502 | import { useState } from "react";
26503 | import { signIn, signUp } from "../lib/auth";
26504 | 
26505 | export default function AuthPage({ onAuth }) {
26506 |   const [mode, setMode]       = useState("login"); // "login" | "signup"
26507 |   const [email, setEmail]     = useState("");
26508 |   const [password, setPassword] = useState("");
26509 |   const [confirm, setConfirm] = useState("");
26510 |   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
26511 |   const [error, setError]     = useState("");
26512 |   const [success, setSuccess] = useState("");
26513 | 
26514 |   const inp = "w-full border border-[#D6DFED] rounded px-3 py-2 text-sm font-[IBM_Plex_Sans] bg-[#EEF2F7] outline-none focus:border-[#0091DA] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0091DA]/10 focus:bg-white transition-all";
26515 | 
26516 |   async function handleSubmit(e) {
26517 |     e.preventDefault();
26518 |     setError(""); setSuccess("");
26519 |     if (!email || !password) { setError("Email and password are required."); return; }
26520 |     if (mode === "signup" && password !== confirm) { setError("Passwords do not match."); return; }
26521 |     if (password.length < 6) { setError("Password must be at least 6 characters."); return; }
26522 | 
26523 |     setLoading(true);
26524 |     try {
26525 |       if (mode === "signup") {
26526 |         await signUp(email, password);
26527 |         setSuccess("Account created! Check your email to confirm, then log in.");
26528 |         setMode("login");
26529 |       } else {
26530 |         const data = await signIn(email, password);
26531 |         onAuth(data.user);
26532 |       }
26533 |     } catch (err) {
26534 |       setError(err.message);
26535 |     } finally {
26536 |       setLoading(false);
26537 |     }
26538 |   }
26539 | 
26540 |   return (
26541 |     <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#EEF2F7] flex flex-col">
26542 |       {/* Topbar */}

26556 |               Market <span className="text-[#0091DA] underline underline-offset-4" style={{ textDecorationThickness: 2 }}>Intelligence</span>
26557 |             </h1>
26558 |             <p className="text-sm text-[#627289] mt-2 max-w-xs mx-auto">
26559 |               {mode === "login" ? "Sign in to access your market assessments." : "Create an account to get started."}
26560 |             </p>
26561 |           </div>
26562 |

26564 |             <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 h-[3px] bg-[#00338D]" />

26676 | export default function OnboardingForm({ onComplete, user }) {
26677 |   const [step, setStep] = useState(1);

26679 |     name:         user?.user_metadata?.full_name || "",
26680 |     email:        user?.email || "",
26681 |     phone:        "",
26682 |     organization: "",
26683 |     role:         "",

26688 |     geography:    "",
26689 |     problem:      "",
26690 |     stage:        "",
26691 |   });
26692 |   const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
26693 | 
26694 |   const set = (k, v) => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [k]: v }));
26695 |   const clearErr = k => setErrors(e => { const n = { ...e }; delete n[k]; return n; });
26696 | 
26697 |   // â”€â”€ Validation â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
26698 |   function validate(fields) {
26699 |     const errs = {};
26700 |     fields.forEach(f => {
26701 |       if (!form[f] || form[f].trim?.() === "") {
26702 |         const label = {
26703 |           name: "Full Name", email: "Email", phone: "Phone",
26704 |           organization: "Organization", role: "Role",
26705 |           sector: "Sector", geography: "Target Geography",
26706 |           problem: "Problem statement", stage: "Stage of Business",
26707 |         }[f] || f;
26708 |         errs[f] = `${label} is required.`;
26709 |       }
26710 |     });
26711 |     if (form.email && !/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(form.email)) {
26712 |       errs.email = "Enter a valid email address.";
26713 |     }
26714 |     return errs;
26715 |   }

26723 |   }

📄 FILE #4: export_project.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------
    1 | const fs = require('fs');
    2 | const path = require('path');
    3 | 
    4 | const OUTPUT_FILE = 'project_export.txt';
    5 | 
    6 | // Folders to skip
    7 | const SKIP_DIRS = [
    8 |   'node_modules', '.git', '.angular', 'dist', 'build',
    9 |   '.cache', 'coverage', '.nyc_output', 'tmp', '.tmp',
   10 |   '__pycache__', '.pytest_cache', '.venv', 'venv', 'env',
   11 |   '.mypy_cache', '.eggs', '*.egg-info'
   12 | ];
   13 | 
   14 | // File types to SKIP (only binaries / assets — everything else is collected)
   15 | const SKIP_EXTENSIONS = [
   16 |   // Images
   17 |   '.png', '.jpg', '.jpeg', '.gif', '.svg', '.ico', '.webp', '.bmp', '.tiff',
   18 |   // Fonts
   19 |   '.woff', '.woff2', '.ttf', '.eot', '.otf',
   20 |   // Archives / binaries
   21 |   '.zip', '.tar', '.gz', '.rar', '.7z',
   22 |   '.exe', '.dll', '.so', '.dylib', '.bin',
   23 |   // Compiled Python
   24 |   '.pyc', '.pyo', '.pyd',
   25 |   // Misc
   26 |   '.pdf', '.map', '.lock', '.log'
   27 | ];
   28 | 
   29 | // ── No IMPORTANT_EXTENSIONS filter any more ──
   30 | // Every file NOT in SKIP_EXTENSIONS will be included.
   31 | 
   32 | let output = '';
   33 | let fileCount = 0;
   34 | 
   35 | function scanDir(dirPath, depth = 0) {
   36 |   let items;
   37 |   try {
   38 |     items = fs.readdirSync(dirPath);
   39 |   } catch (e) {
   40 |     output += `[Cannot read directory: ${dirPath}]\n`;
   41 |     return;
   42 |   }
   43 | 
   44 |   for (const item of items) {
   45 |     const fullPath = path.join(dirPath, item);
   46 |     let stat;
   47 |     try {
   48 |       stat = fs.statSync(fullPath);
   49 |     } catch (e) {
   50 |       continue;
   51 |     }
   52 | 
   53 |     if (stat.isDirectory()) {
   54 |       // Skip unwanted dirs (support glob-style *.egg-info check)
   55 |       if (SKIP_DIRS.some(d => d.startsWith('*') ? item.endsWith(d.slice(1)) : item === d)) continue;
   56 | 
   57 |       output += `\n${'='.repeat(70)}\n`;
   58 |       output += `📁 FOLDER: ${fullPath}\n`;
   59 |       output += `${'='.repeat(70)}\n`;
   60 |       scanDir(fullPath, depth + 1);
   61 | 
   62 |     } else {
   63 |       const ext = path.extname(item).toLowerCase();
   64 | 
   65 |       // Skip binary / asset extensions
   66 |       if (SKIP_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext)) continue;
   67 | 
   68 |       // ── Collect EVERY remaining file ──
   69 |       fileCount++;
   70 |       output += `\n${'-'.repeat(70)}\n`;
   71 |       output += `📄 FILE #${fileCount}: ${fullPath}\n`;
   72 |       output += `${'-'.repeat(70)}\n`;
   73 | 
   74 |       try {
   75 |         const content = fs.readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf8');
   76 |         const lines = content.split('\n');
   77 |         lines.forEach((line, i) => {
   78 |           output += `${String(i + 1).padStart(5)} | ${line}\n`;
   79 |         });
   80 |       } catch (e) {
   81 |         output += `[Could not read file: ${e.message}]\n`;
   82 |       }
   83 |     }
   84 |   }
   85 | }
   86 | 
   87 | // ── Header ──
   88 | output += `${'#'.repeat(70)}\n`;
   89 | output += `   FULL PROJECT EXPORT — JS FRONTEND + PYTHON BACKEND\n`;
   90 | output += `${'#'.repeat(70)}\n`;
   91 | output += `Generated : ${new Date().toISOString()}\n`;
   92 | output += `Root Path : ${process.cwd()}\n`;
   93 | output += `${'#'.repeat(70)}\n\n`;
   94 | 
   95 | // ── Scan ──
   96 | scanDir('.');
   97 | 
   98 | // ── Footer ──
   99 | output += `\n${'#'.repeat(70)}\n`;
  100 | output += `   EXPORT COMPLETE — Total Files: ${fileCount}\n`;
  101 | output += `${'#'.repeat(70)}\n`;
  102 | 
  103 | fs.writeFileSync(OUTPUT_FILE, output, 'utf8');
  104 | console.log(`✅ Done! Exported ${fileCount} files to: ${OUTPUT_FILE}`);

  781 | function pickPill(el,gid){
  782 |   const grp=gid?document.getElementById(gid):el.closest('.pills');
  783 |   grp.querySelectorAll('.pill').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('on'));
  784 |   el.classList.add('on');
  785 |   userTouched.add(grp.id||gid);
  786 |   calcLive();
  787 | }
  788 | function pickAIPill(el){
  789 |   el.closest('.pills').querySelectorAll('.pill').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('on'));
  790 |   el.classList.add('on');
  791 |   calcLive();
  792 | }
  793 | 
  794 | function goTo(s){
  795 |   document.querySelectorAll('.sec').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active'));
  796 |   document.getElementById('sec'+s).classList.add('active');
  797 |   for(let i=0;i<9;i++){const b=document.getElementById('sb'+i);if(!b)continue;b.classList.remove('active','done');if(i<s)b.classList.add('done');}
  798 |   document.getElementById('sb'+s).classList.add('active');
  799 |   step=s;
  800 |   document.getElementById('prevBtn').style.visibility=s===0?'hidden':'visible';
  801 |   document.getElementById('nextBtn').textContent=s===8?'Generate Dashboard →':'Next →';
  802 |   document.getElementById('nextBtn').className=s===8?'btn btn-go':'btn btn-primary';
  803 |   document.getElementById('slbl').textContent=`Step ${s+1} of 9`;
  804 |   document.getElementById('progBar').style.width=((s+1)/9*100)+'%';
  805 |   // Update button state based on current section completion
  806 |   calcLive();
  807 | }
  808 | 
  809 | function getUnansweredQuestionsInSection(secNum){
  810 |   const unanswered=[];
  811 |   const secEl=document.getElementById('q'+secNum);
  812 |   if(!secEl)return unanswered;
  813 | 
  814 |   // Check select dropdowns
  815 |   secEl.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{
  816 |     if(!el.value||el.value===''){
  817 |       const label=el.closest('.fd')?.querySelector('label')?.textContent||`Question`;
  818 |       unanswered.push(label.replace('*','').trim());
  819 |     }
  820 |   });
  821 |   // Check pill selections
  822 |   secEl.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{
  823 |     if(!grp.querySelector('.pill.on')){
  824 |       const label=grp.closest('.fd')?.querySelector('label')?.textContent||`Question`;
  825 |       unanswered.push(label.replace('*','').trim());
  826 |     }
  827 |   });
  828 |   // Check required text inputs
  829 |   secEl.querySelectorAll('.ai-txt').forEach(el=>{
  830 |     if(!el.value||el.value.trim()===''){
  831 |       const label=el.closest('.fd')?.querySelector('label')?.textContent||`Question`;
  832 |       unanswered.push(label.replace('*','').trim());
  833 |     }
  834 |   });
  835 |   // Check checkbox groups
  836 |   secEl.querySelectorAll('.ckg').forEach(ckg=>{
  837 |     if(!ckg.querySelector('.ai-chk:checked')){
  838 |       const label=ckg.closest('.fd')?.querySelector('label')?.textContent||`Question`;
  839 |       unanswered.push(label.replace('*','').trim());
  840 |     }
  841 |   });
  842 |   return unanswered;
  843 | }
  844 | 
  845 | function getUnansweredQuestions(){
  846 |   const all=[];
  847 |   for(let sec=1;sec<=8;sec++){
  848 |     all.push(...getUnansweredQuestionsInSection(sec));
  849 |   }
  850 |   return all;
  851 | }
  852 | 
  853 | function showSectionError(secNum,unanswered){
  854 |   // Remove any existing error
  855 |   const existing=document.getElementById('sectionError');
  856 |   if(existing)existing.remove();
  857 | 
  858 |   const secNames=['About Your Product','Market Size & TAM','Buyer Quality & WTP','Competitive Landscape','Revenue & Unit Economics','Risk & Market Timing','Go-to-Market','Output & PMF','Deep-Dive'];
  859 |   const secName=secNames[secNum]||`Section ${secNum}`;
  860 | 
  861 |   const errorDiv=document.createElement('div');
  862 |   errorDiv.id='sectionError';
  863 |   errorDiv.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:20px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#E00D00;color:#fff;padding:12px 20px;border-radius:6px;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(224,13,0,.3);z-index:10000;font-family:"IBM Plex Sans",sans-serif;font-size:13px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;max-width:90%;';
  864 |   errorDiv.innerHTML=`<span>⚠️</span><span><strong>Complete ${secName}</strong> — ${unanswered.length} question(s) remaining</span><button onclick="document.getElementById('sectionError').remove()" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border:none;color:#fff;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;margin-left:8px;font-size:16px;line-height:1;">×</button>`;
  865 |   document.body.appendChild(errorDiv);
  866 | 
  867 |   // Auto-hide after 4 seconds
  868 |   setTimeout(()=>{const el=document.getElementById('sectionError');if(el)el.remove();},4000);
  869 | }
  870 | 
  871 | function showValidationError(unanswered){
  872 |   const errorDiv=document.createElement('div');
  873 |   errorDiv.id='validationError';
  874 |   errorDiv.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:#fff;border:2px solid #E00D00;border-radius:8px;padding:24px;max-width:400px;width:90%;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.3);z-index:10000;font-family:"IBM Plex Sans",sans-serif;';
  875 |   const listItems=unanswered.slice(0,5).map(q=>`<li style="margin:6px 0;color:#08152A;font-size:13px;">${q}</li>`).join('');
  876 |   const moreText=unanswered.length>5?`<p style="margin-top:10px;color:#627289;font-size:12px;">...and ${unanswered.length-5} more</p>`:'';
  877 |   errorDiv.innerHTML=`<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px;"><span style="font-size:24px;">⚠️</span><h3 style="margin:0;color:#E00D00;font-size:18px;">Please Answer All Questions</h3></div><p style="color:#627289;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:14px;">The following required questions need answers:</p><ul style="margin:0;padding-left:20px;">${listItems}</ul>${moreText}<button onclick="document.getElementById('validationError').remove()" style="margin-top:20px;width:100%;padding:10px;background:#00338D;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:4px;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">Go Back and Complete</button>`;
  878 |   document.body.appendChild(errorDiv);
  879 | }
  880 | 
  881 | function validateStep0(){
  882 |   // Step 0: About Your Product - check context fields
  883 |   const hasSector=document.getElementById('sector')?.value;
  884 |   const hasBizType=document.getElementById('bizType')?.value;
  885 |   const hasGeo=document.getElementById('geo')?.value;
  886 |   const hasProblem=document.getElementById('problem')?.value?.length>20;
  887 |   const hasStage=document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on');
  888 |   const missing=[];
  889 |   if(!hasSector)missing.push('Industry Sector');
  890 |   if(!hasBizType)missing.push('Business Type');
  891 |   if(!hasGeo)missing.push('Target Geography');
  892 |   if(!hasProblem)missing.push('Problem Statement (min 20 chars)');
  893 |   if(!hasStage)missing.push('Stage of Business');
  894 |   return missing;
  895 | }
  896 | 
  897 | function navigate(d){
  898 |   const n=step+d;
  899 |   if(n<0)return;
  900 | 
  901 |   // Trying to go forward - validate current section first
  902 |   if(d>0&&n<=8){
  903 |     let missing=[];
  904 |     if(step===0){
  905 |       missing=validateStep0();
  906 |     }else if(step>=1&&step<=8){
  907 |       missing=getUnansweredQuestionsInSection(step);
  908 |     }
  909 |     if(missing.length>0){
  910 |       showSectionError(step,missing);
  911 |       return;
  912 |     }
  913 |   }
  914 | 
  915 |   if(n>8){
  916 |     // Validate all questions answered before submitting
  917 |     const unanswered=getUnansweredQuestions();
  918 |     if(unanswered.length>0){
  919 |       showValidationError(unanswered);
  920 |       return;
  921 |     }
  922 |     buildDashboard();
  923 |     return;
  924 |   }
  925 |   if(step===0&&n===1&&ctxReady()){
  926 |     generateAIQuestions().then(()=>goTo(1));
  927 |   }else{
  928 |     goTo(n);
  929 |   }
  930 | }
  931 | 
  932 | function ctxReady(){return document.getElementById('sector').value&&document.getElementById('bizType').value&&document.getElementById('geo').value;}
  933 | 
  934 | function onCtxChange(){
  935 |   const s=document.getElementById('sector');
  936 |   const tag=document.getElementById('sectorTag');
  937 |   if(s.value){tag.textContent=s.options[s.selectedIndex].text.split('/')[0].trim();tag.classList.add('active');}
  938 |   else{tag.textContent='All Sectors';tag.classList.remove('active');}
  939 |   calcLive();
  940 | }
  941 | 
  942 | /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  943 |    LIVE SCORING
  944 | ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
  945 | function calcLive(){
  946 |   // ── Step 0 context fields ──────────────────────────────
  947 |   const hasSector  = document.getElementById('sector').value?1:0;
  948 |   const hasBizType = document.getElementById('bizType').value?1:0;
  949 |   const hasGeo     = document.getElementById('geo').value?1:0;
  950 |   const probLen    = document.getElementById('problem').value.length;
  951 |   const probScore  = probLen>120?5:probLen>60?3:probLen>20?1:0;
  952 |   const stageVal   = +(document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.dataset.val)||0;
  953 | 
  954 |   // Only score if context is filled
  955 |   const contextFilled = hasSector&&hasBizType&&hasGeo;
  956 | 
  957 |   // ── Read actual selected values from AI questions ──────
  958 |   // Each select has data-w (weight) and returns v (1-5)
  959 |   // We track which section each question belongs to via ID prefix
  960 |   const selScores={d1:[],d2:[],d3:[],d4:[],d5:[],d6:[]};
  961 | 
  962 |   // Map question IDs to dimensions
  963 |   // s1=Market Size(d1), s2=Audience(d2), s3=Competition(d3),
  964 |   // s4=Revenue(d4), s5=Risk(d5), s6=GTM(d4), s7=PMF(d2), s8=SectorFit(d6)
  965 |   const dimMap={'s1':'d1','s2':'d2','s3':'d3','s4':'d4','s5':'d5','s6':'d4','s7':'d2','s8':'d6','f1':'d1','f2':'d2','f3':'d3','f4':'d4','f5':'d5','f6':'d4','f7':'d2','f8':'d6'};
  966 | 
  967 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{
  968 |     if(!el.value)return;
  969 |     const v=+(el.value)||0;          // actual selected value 1-5
  970 |     const w=+(el.dataset.w)||2;      // weight of this question
  971 |     const prefix=el.id.replace(/q\d+$/,'').replace(/^s/,'s').slice(0,2); // e.g. s1, s2
  972 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||dimMap[el.id.slice(0,2)]||'d1';
  973 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w});
  974 |   });
  975 | 
  976 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{
  977 |     const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');
  978 |     if(!on)return;
  979 |     const v=+(on.dataset.val)||3;
  980 |     const id=grp.id||'';
  981 |     const prefix=id.slice(0,2);
  982 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||'d1';
  983 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w:2});
  984 |   });
  985 | 
  986 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{
  987 |     const section=el.closest('.sec');
  988 |     const secId=section?.id||'sec1';
  989 |     const secNum=+secId.replace('sec','')||1;
  990 |     const dimKeys=['d1','d2','d3','d4','d5','d4','d2','d6'];
  991 |     const dim=dimKeys[secNum-1]||'d6';
  992 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v:4,w:1}); // checkboxes = moderate positive
  993 |   });
  994 | 
  995 |   // ── Calculate each dimension score (0-100) ────────────
  996 |   function dimScore(key){
  997 |     const items=selScores[key]||[];
  998 |     if(!items.length)return null; // not yet answered
  999 |     const totalW=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.w,0);
 1000 |     const weighted=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.v*i.w),0);
 1001 |     // weighted average on 1-5 scale → convert to 0-100
 1002 |     return Math.round(((weighted/totalW)-1)/4*100);
 1003 |   }
 1004 | 
 1005 |   const d1=dimScore('d1'); // Market Size
 1006 |   const d2=dimScore('d2'); // Audience Quality
 1007 |   const d3=dimScore('d3'); // Competition Edge
 1008 |   const d4=dimScore('d4'); // Revenue Potential
 1009 |   const d5=dimScore('d5'); // Risk Profile
 1010 |   const d6=dimScore('d6'); // Sector Fit
 1011 | 
 1012 |   // ── Context bonus (filling basics) ────────────────────
 1013 |   // Max 15 points for context — NOT for just having a sector selected
 1014 |   const contextBonus=contextFilled?(hasSector*3+hasBizType*3+hasGeo*2+probScore+Math.min(stageVal,5)):0;
 1015 | 
 1016 |   // ── Overall score = weighted average of dims + context ─
 1017 |   // Dims that haven't been answered yet are excluded from average
 1018 |   const answeredDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6].filter(v=>v!==null);
 1019 |   let overall=0;
 1020 |   if(!contextFilled||answeredDims.length===0){
 1021 |     // Nothing meaningful answered — score is 0
 1022 |     overall=0;
 1023 |   } else {
 1024 |     // Weighted: competition(d3) and revenue(d4) matter most
 1025 |     const weights=[15,20,25,25,10,5]; // d1 d2 d3 d4 d5 d6
 1026 |     const allDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
 1027 |     let wSum=0, wTotal=0;
 1028 |     allDims.forEach((v,i)=>{
 1029 |       if(v!==null){wSum+=v*weights[i];wTotal+=weights[i];}
 1030 |     });
 1031 |     const dimAvg=wTotal>0?wSum/wTotal:0;
 1032 | 
 1033 |     // Context bonus adds up to 15 points on top of dim average
 1034 |     // But only if at least 2 sections answered
 1035 |     const bonus=answeredDims.length>=2?Math.round(contextBonus/15*15):0;
 1036 |     overall=Math.min(100,Math.round(dimAvg*0.85+bonus));
 1037 | 
 1038 |     // Penalty: if less than 3 sections answered, cap score at 60
 1039 |     if(answeredDims.length<3)overall=Math.min(overall,60);
 1040 |     // Penalty: if problem statement too short, cap at 70
 1041 |     if(probLen<40&&overall>70)overall=70;
 1042 |   }
 1043 | 
 1044 |   // ── Count completion progress ──────────────────────────
 1045 |   function countQuestions(){
 1046 |     let total=0,answered=0;
 1047 |     for(let sec=1;sec<=8;sec++){
 1048 |       const secEl=document.getElementById('q'+sec);
 1049 |       if(!secEl)continue;
 1050 |       // Select dropdowns
 1051 |       secEl.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{total++;if(el.value)answered++;});
 1052 |       // Pills
 1053 |       secEl.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{total++;if(grp.querySelector('.pill.on'))answered++;});
 1054 |       // Text inputs
 1055 |       secEl.querySelectorAll('.ai-txt').forEach(el=>{total++;if(el.value&&el.value.trim())answered++;});
 1056 |       // Checkboxes (per group)
 1057 |       secEl.querySelectorAll('.ckg').forEach(ckg=>{total++;if(ckg.querySelector('.ai-chk:checked'))answered++;});
 1058 |     }
 1059 |     return{total,answered};
 1060 |   }
 1061 |   const{total,answered}=countQuestions();
 1062 |   const allAnswered=total>0&&answered>=total;
 1063 | 
 1064 |   // ── Update UI ─────────────────────────────────────────
 1065 |   const lsEl=document.getElementById('liveScore');
 1066 |   const lgEl=document.getElementById('liveGrade');
 1067 |   if(overall===0){
 1068 |     lsEl.textContent='0';lsEl.className='big-sc sc-zero';
 1069 |     const progressText=total>0?`(${answered}/${total} answered)`:'Fill in the form';
 1070 |     lgEl.textContent=progressText;lgEl.style.color='#9BAABB';
 1071 |     document.getElementById('topScoreWrap').style.display='none';
 1072 |     // Reset dim bars
 1073 |     ['bf1','bf2','bf3','bf4','bf5','bf6'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.style.width='0%';});
 1074 |     ['d1lbl','d2lbl','d3lbl','d4lbl','d5lbl','d6lbl'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.textContent='—';});
 1075 |     return;
 1076 |   }
 1077 |   // Show completion status in grade text
 1078 |   const progressSuffix=total>0?` (${answered}/${total})`:'';
 1079 |   lsEl.textContent=overall;
 1080 |   if(overall>=70){lsEl.className='big-sc sc-high';lgEl.textContent='High Potential ✓'+progressSuffix;lgEl.style.color='#00A3A1';}
 1081 |   else if(overall>=45){lsEl.className='big-sc sc-mid';lgEl.textContent='Moderate Potential'+progressSuffix;lgEl.style.color='#E8A000';}
 1082 |   else{lsEl.className='big-sc sc-low';lgEl.textContent='Needs Strengthening'+progressSuffix;lgEl.style.color='#C8002D';}
 1083 | 
 1084 |   document.getElementById('topScoreWrap').style.display='flex';
 1085 |   document.getElementById('topScore').textContent=overall+'/100';
 1086 | 
 1087 |   // ── Update Next/Generate Dashboard button state ──────
 1088 |   const nextBtn=document.getElementById('nextBtn');
 1089 |   if(nextBtn){
 1090 |     let currentMissing=[];
 1091 |     if(step===0){
 1092 |       currentMissing=validateStep0();
 1093 |     }else if(step>=1&&step<=8){
 1094 |       currentMissing=getUnansweredQuestionsInSection(step);
 1095 |     }
 1096 |     const canProceed=currentMissing.length===0;
 1097 | 
 1098 |     if(step===8){
 1099 |       // Final step - Generate Dashboard
 1100 |       nextBtn.className='btn btn-go';
 1101 |       nextBtn.style.opacity=canProceed?'1':'0.5';
 1102 |       nextBtn.title=canProceed?'Generate your market intelligence dashboard':`Answer all ${currentMissing.length} remaining question(s) to generate dashboard`;
 1103 |     }else{
 1104 |       // Steps 0-7 - Next button
 1105 |       nextBtn.className='btn btn-primary';
 1106 |       nextBtn.style.opacity=canProceed?'1':'0.5';
 1107 |       nextBtn.title=canProceed?'Proceed to next step':`Complete ${currentMissing.length} required field(s) to continue`;
 1108 |     }
 1109 |   }
 1110 | 
 1111 |   // ── Update individual dimension bars ──────────────────
 1112 |   const dimVals=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
 1113 |   const dimColors=['#00338D','#0091DA','#E8A000','#005EB8','#6D2077','#00A3A1'];
 1114 |   ['bf1','bf2','bf3','bf4','bf5','bf6'].forEach((id,i)=>{
 1115 |     const el=document.getElementById(id);
 1116 |     if(!el)return;
 1117 |     const v=dimVals[i];
 1118 |     el.style.width=(v!==null?v:0)+'%';
 1119 |     el.style.background=dimColors[i];
 1120 |   });
 1121 |   ['d1lbl','d2lbl','d3lbl','d4lbl','d5lbl','d6lbl'].forEach((id,i)=>{
 1122 |     const el=document.getElementById(id);
 1123 |     if(!el)return;
 1124 |     const v=dimVals[i];
 1125 |     el.textContent=v!==null?v+'/100':'—';
 1126 |   });
 1127 | 
 1128 |   buildLiveInsights(overall,{d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6});
 1129 | }
 1130 | 
 1131 | function buildLiveInsights(t,dims){
 1132 |   const sec=document.getElementById('sector').value;
 1133 |   const geo=document.getElementById('geo').value;
 1134 |   const items=[];
 1135 |   dims=dims||{};
 1136 | 
 1137 |   // Score-based headline
 1138 |   if(t>=70)items.push('Strong overall market potential — fundamentals solid across answered dimensions.');
 1139 |   else if(t>=50)items.push('Moderate potential — see which dimensions below need strengthening.');
 1140 |   else if(t>=30)items.push('Several dimensions are weak — fill more steps to get precise guidance.');
 1141 |   else if(t>0)items.push('Early stage — complete all 9 steps for a full and accurate score.');
 1142 | 
 1143 |   // Dimension-specific insights — only shown when that dim is answered
 1144 |   const dimNames={d1:'Market Size',d2:'Audience Quality',d3:'Competition Edge',d4:'Revenue Potential',d5:'Risk Profile',d6:'Sector Fit'};
 1145 |   const weakDims=Object.entries(dims).filter(([,v])=>v!==null&&v<45).sort((a,b)=>a[1]-b[1]);
 1146 |   const strongDims=Object.entries(dims).filter(([,v])=>v!==null&&v>=70).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]);
 1147 | 
 1148 |   if(weakDims.length>0){
 1149 |     const [wk,wv]=weakDims[0];
 1150 |     items.push(`⚠️ ${dimNames[wk]} scores ${wv}/100 — your weakest dimension. Focus here first.`);
 1151 |   }
 1152 |   if(strongDims.length>0){
 1153 |     const [sk,sv]=strongDims[0];
 1154 |     items.push(`✅ ${dimNames[sk]} scores ${sv}/100 — your strongest signal to lead with.`);
 1155 |   }
 1156 | 
 1157 |   // Sector-specific tips
 1158 |   if(sec==='IT')items.push('SaaS: NRR above 110% is the single most bankable investor signal.');
 1159 |   if(sec==='HC')items.push('HealthTech: CDSCO regulatory class determines your entire launch timeline.');
 1160 |   if(sec==='FS')items.push('FinTech: India Stack (UPI+AA+eKYC) cuts onboarding cost by up to 80%.');
 1161 |   if(geo==='T2')items.push('Tier 2/3 India: 60% of new internet users, 3× less competition than metros.');
 1162 | 
 1163 |   if(items.length===0)items.push('Continue filling in steps for personalised insights.');
 1164 |   document.getElementById('insightsList').innerHTML=items.slice(0,4).map(x=>
 1165 |     `<div class="ins-item"><div class="ins-dot"></div><span>${x}</span></div>`).join('');
 1166 | }

 1183 | async function updateGeoPreview(){
 1184 |   const gk=document.getElementById('geo').value;
 1185 |   const meta=GEO_META[gk];
 1186 |   if(!meta){document.getElementById('geoPreviewCard').style.display='none';return;}

 1190 |   document.getElementById('gs-gr').textContent=meta.gr.split('–')[0]+'%+';
 1191 |   try{
 1192 |     if(!miniWorld){const r=await fetch('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/world-atlas@2/countries-110m.json');miniWorld=await r.json();}
 1193 |     const wrap=document.getElementById('geoPreviewCard');
 1194 |     const W=wrap.offsetWidth-28||260;const H=100;
 1195 |     const svgEl=document.getElementById('geo-mini-svg');
 1196 |     svgEl.setAttribute('width',W);svgEl.setAttribute('height',H);svgEl.setAttribute('viewBox',`0 0 ${W} ${H}`);
 1197 |     const svg=d3.select(svgEl);svg.selectAll('*').remove();
 1198 |     svg.append('rect').attr('width',W).attr('height',H).attr('fill','#C8D8F0');
 1199 |     const proj=d3.geoEquirectangular().fitSize([W,H],{type:'Sphere'});
 1200 |     const pathFn=d3.geoPath().projection(proj);
 1201 |     const countries=topojson.feature(miniWorld,miniWorld.objects.countries);
 1202 |     svg.selectAll('path').data(countries.features).join('path')
 1203 |       .attr('d',pathFn)
 1204 |       .attr('fill',d=>meta.ids.includes(+d.id)?'#00338D':'#A8C0D8')
 1205 |       .attr('stroke','rgba(255,255,255,0.6)').attr('stroke-width','0.3');
 1206 |   }catch(e){console.warn('Geo preview map failed');}

 1209 | /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 1210 |    AI QUESTION GENERATION — 8 sections, market-potential focus
 1211 | ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
 1212 | async function generateAIQuestions(){
 1213 |   const sEl=document.getElementById('sector');
 1214 |   const tEl=document.getElementById('bizType');
 1215 |   const gEl=document.getElementById('geo');
 1216 |   const sector=sEl.options[sEl.selectedIndex].text;
 1217 |   const bizType=tEl.options[tEl.selectedIndex].text;
 1218 |   const geo=gEl.options[gEl.selectedIndex].text;
 1219 |   const problem=document.getElementById('problem').value||'Not specified';
 1220 |   const bizName=document.getElementById('bizName').value||'the product';
 1221 |   const stage=document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.textContent||'Not specified';
 1222 | 
 1223 |   // Show skeletons while loading
 1224 |   [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
 1225 |     const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
 1226 |     if(el)el.innerHTML='<div class="ql-skeleton"><div class="ql-skel-item"></div><div class="ql-skel-item"></div><div class="ql-skel-item"></div></div>';
 1227 |   });
 1228 | 
 1229 |   try{
 1230 |     // Retry with long wait for Gemini 429 rate limits (free tier = 15 req/min)
 1231 |     const fetchWithRetry=async(url,opts,maxTries=2)=>{
 1232 |       for(let attempt=1;attempt<=maxTries;attempt++){
 1233 |         const r=await fetch(url,opts);
 1234 |         if(r.status===429||r.status===529){
 1235 |           if(attempt===maxTries) return r;
 1236 |           const wait=62000; // Gemini free tier resets every 60s — wait 62s
 1237 |           [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
 1238 |             const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
 1239 |             if(el)el.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:16px;font-size:12px;color:#627289;text-align:center">⏳ Rate limit reached — waiting 62s for Gemini free tier reset…<br><br><span style="font-size:10px;color:#9BAABB">(Free tier: 15 requests/min. This is normal.)</span></div>`;
 1240 |           });
 1241 |           // Countdown display
 1242 |           let remaining=62;
 1243 |           const timer=setInterval(()=>{
 1244 |             remaining--;
 1245 |             [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
 1246 |               const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
 1247 |               if(el)el.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:16px;font-size:12px;color:#627289;text-align:center">⏳ Rate limit — retrying in <strong style="color:#00338D">${remaining}s</strong>…<br><br><span style="font-size:10px;color:#9BAABB">Gemini free tier resets every 60 seconds.</span></div>`;
 1248 |             });
 1249 |             if(remaining<=0)clearInterval(timer);
 1250 |           },1000);
 1251 |           await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,wait));
 1252 |           clearInterval(timer);
 1253 |           continue;
 1254 |         }
 1255 |         if(r.status>=500&&attempt<maxTries){
 1256 |           await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000));
 1257 |           continue;
 1258 |         }
 1259 |         return r;
 1260 |       }
 1261 |     };
 1262 | 
 1263 |     const _KEY='USE_SERVER_KEY';
 1264 |     const resp=await fetchWithRetry('/api',{
 1265 |       method:'POST',
 1266 |       headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
 1267 |       body:JSON.stringify({
 1268 |         _type:'questions',
 1269 |         prompt:`Generate 8 JSON question sections for market assessment.
 1270 | Sector:${sector} | Type:${bizType} | Geo:${geo} | Product:${bizName} | Stage:${stage}
 1271 | Problem:${problem}
 1272 | 
 1273 | Rules: Questions 100% specific to ${sector}+${bizType}+${geo}. 4 questions per section. Types: select(options with t+v 1-5), pills(options t only), checks(options t only). Options under 35 chars.
 1274 | 
 1275 | Return ONLY this JSON structure, no markdown:
 1276 | {"sb8txt":"<2 words>","d6name":"<dimension>","sections":[
 1277 | {"id":1,"title":"Market Size & TAM","icon":"📊","subtitle":"${sector} TAM in ${geo}","questions":[
 1278 | {"id":"s1q1","label":"<specific TAM question>","hint":"<real ₹Cr/$B benchmark>","type":"select","w":3,"options":[{"t":"Above ₹10,000Cr","v":5},{"t":"₹1,000–10,000Cr","v":4},{"t":"₹100–1,000Cr","v":3},{"t":"₹10–100Cr","v":2},{"t":"Under ₹10Cr","v":1}]},
 1279 | {"id":"s1q2","label":"<specific CAGR question>","hint":"<real sector CAGR>","type":"pills","options":[{"t":">50% YoY"},{"t":"25–50%"},{"t":"10–25%"},{"t":"5–10%"},{"t":"<5%"}]},
 1280 | {"id":"s1q3","label":"<specific segment question>","hint":"<real gap insight>","type":"select","w":4,"options":[{"t":"<opt1>","v":5},{"t":"<opt2>","v":4},{"t":"<opt3>","v":3},{"t":"<opt4>","v":2},{"t":"<opt5>","v":1}]},
 1281 | {"id":"s1q4","label":"<specific tailwinds>","hint":"<real context>","type":"checks","options":[{"t":"<item1>"},{"t":"<item2>"},{"t":"<item3>"},{"t":"<item4>"},{"t":"<item5>"},{"t":"<item6>"}]}
 1282 | ]},
 1283 | {"id":2,"title":"Buyer Quality & WTP","icon":"🎯","subtitle":"${bizType} buyers in ${sector}","questions":[<4 specific questions>]},
 1284 | {"id":3,"title":"Competitive Landscape","icon":"⚔️","subtitle":"${sector} competition in ${geo}","questions":[<4 specific questions>]},
 1285 | {"id":4,"title":"Revenue & Unit Economics","icon":"💰","subtitle":"Monetisation for ${sector}","questions":[<4 specific questions>]},
 1286 | {"id":5,"title":"Risk & Market Timing","icon":"⚠️","subtitle":"${sector} risks in ${geo}","questions":[<4 specific questions>]},
 1287 | {"id":6,"title":"Go-to-Market Power","icon":"🚀","subtitle":"GTM for ${geo}","questions":[<4 specific questions>]},
 1288 | {"id":7,"title":"Output & PMF Signal","icon":"📤","subtitle":"Validation evidence","questions":[<4 specific questions>]},
 1289 | {"id":8,"title":"${sector} Deep-Dive","icon":"🔬","subtitle":"${sector}-specific depth","questions":[<4 highly specific ${sector} questions>]}
 1290 | ]}`
 1291 |       })});
 1292 | 
 1293 |     // ── Gemini response parsing ──────────────────────────────
 1294 |     if(!resp.ok) throw new Error('HTTP '+resp.status);
 1295 |     const data=await resp.json();
 1296 |     const allText=(data?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts||[]).map(p=>p.text||'').join('');
 1297 |     if(!allText) throw new Error('Empty response from API');
 1298 | 
 1299 |     // Strip any markdown fences the model may have added
 1300 |     let raw=allText.trim();
 1301 |     const fenceMatch=raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
 1302 |     if(fenceMatch) raw=fenceMatch[1].trim();
 1303 | 
 1304 |     // Find the outermost { … } — handles leading prose
 1305 |     const start=raw.indexOf('{');
 1306 |     const end=raw.lastIndexOf('}');
 1307 |     if(start===-1||end===-1) throw new Error('No JSON object found in response');
 1308 |     raw=raw.slice(start,end+1);
 1309 | 
 1310 |     // Attempt parse; on failure try to repair truncated JSON
 1311 |     let parsed;
 1312 |     try{
 1313 |       parsed=JSON.parse(raw);
 1314 |     }catch(parseErr){
 1315 |       // Repair: truncate to last complete section by finding last complete "}]}" pattern
 1316 |       const repaired=repairTruncatedJSON(raw);
 1317 |       parsed=JSON.parse(repaired);
 1318 |     }
 1319 | 
 1320 |     aiQs=parsed;
 1321 |     if(aiQs.sb8txt)document.getElementById('sb8txt').textContent=aiQs.sb8txt;
 1322 |     if(aiQs.d6name)document.getElementById('d6name').textContent=aiQs.d6name;
 1323 |     if(aiQs.realTimeData)window._rtData=aiQs.realTimeData;
 1324 | 
 1325 |     if(!Array.isArray(aiQs.sections)||aiQs.sections.length===0) throw new Error('No sections in parsed JSON');
 1326 |     aiQs.sections.forEach((sec,i)=>renderSection(i+1,sec));
 1327 | 
 1328 |   }catch(e){
 1329 |     console.warn('AI question gen failed, using fallback:',e.message);
 1330 |     useFallbackQuestions(sector,bizType,geo);
 1331 |   }
 1332 | }
 1333 | 
 1334 | /* Repair a truncated JSON string by closing any open structures */
 1335 | function repairTruncatedJSON(s){
 1336 |   // Walk the string tracking depth; truncate at last complete top-level section
 1337 |   // Strategy: find the last occurrence of "}]}" or "}]," and close from there
 1338 |   let best=s;
 1339 |   // Try progressively shorter slices to find parseable JSON
 1340 |   for(let i=s.length-1;i>s.length*0.4;i--){
 1341 |     const c=s[i];
 1342 |     if(c==='}'){
 1343 |       try{
 1344 |         const candidate=closeJSON(s.slice(0,i+1));
 1345 |         JSON.parse(candidate);
 1346 |         best=candidate;
 1347 |         break;
 1348 |       }catch(_){}
 1349 |     }
 1350 |   }
 1351 |   return best;
 1352 | }
 1353 | 
 1354 | function closeJSON(s){
 1355 |   // Count open brackets/braces
 1356 |   let depth=0; const stack=[];
 1357 |   for(const c of s){
 1358 |     if(c==='{'){stack.push('}');}
 1359 |     else if(c==='['){stack.push(']');}
 1360 |     else if(c==='}'||c===']'){stack.pop();}
 1361 |   }
 1362 |   // Close any trailing comma before we close
 1363 |   let result=s.replace(/,\s*$/,'');
 1364 |   return result+stack.reverse().join('');
 1365 | }
 1366 | 
 1367 | function renderSection(idx,sec){
 1368 |   const el=document.getElementById('q'+idx);
 1369 |   if(!el||!sec)return;
 1370 |   let html=`<div class="sec-hd"><div class="sec-icon">${sec.icon||'📋'}</div><div><div class="sec-ttl">${sec.title}</div><div class="sec-sub">${sec.subtitle||''}</div></div></div><div class="fg">`;
 1371 |   (sec.questions||[]).forEach(q=>{
 1372 |     const wide=q.type==='checks'||q.type==='textarea';
 1373 |     html+=`<div class="fd ${wide?'s2':''}">`;
 1374 |     html+=`<label>${q.label}</label>`;
 1375 |     if(q.hint)html+=`<div class="hint">💡 ${q.hint}</div>`;
 1376 |     if(q.type==='select'){
 1377 |       html+=`<select class="ai-sel" id="${q.id}" data-w="${q.w||2}" onchange="calcLive()"><option value="">Select…</option>`;
 1378 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<option value="${o.v}">${o.t}</option>`;});
 1379 |       html+=`</select>`;
 1380 |     }else if(q.type==='pills'){
 1381 |       html+=`<div class="pills ai-pills" id="${q.id}_pills">`;
 1382 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<span class="pill" data-val="${o.v||3}" onclick="pickAIPill(this)">${o.t}</span>`;});
 1383 |       html+=`</div>`;
 1384 |     }else if(q.type==='checks'){
 1385 |       html+=`<div class="ckg">`;
 1386 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<label class="cki"><input type="checkbox" class="ai-chk" onchange="calcLive()"> ${o.t}</label>`;});
 1387 |       html+=`</div>`;
 1388 |     }else if(q.type==='text'){
 1389 |       html+=`<input type="text" class="ai-txt" id="${q.id}" placeholder="${q.placeholder||'Enter value…'}" oninput="calcLive()"/>`;
 1390 |     }
 1391 |     html+=`</div>`;
 1392 |   });
 1393 |   html+=`</div>`;
 1394 |   el.innerHTML=html;
 1395 | }

 1460 | /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 1461 |    COLLECT FORM DATA
 1462 | ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
 1463 | function collectData(){
 1464 |   const gopt=id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);return el?.options[el.selectedIndex]?.text||'';};
 1465 |   const getv=id=>document.getElementById(id)?.value||'';
 1466 |   const answers={};
 1467 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{answers[el.id]=el.options[el.selectedIndex]?.text||'';});
 1468 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');if(on)answers[grp.id]=on.textContent;});
 1469 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-txt').forEach(el=>{if(el.value)answers[el.id]=el.value;});
 1470 |   const chkGroups={};
 1471 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{const g=el.closest('.ckg')?.parentElement?.querySelector('label')?.textContent||'checks';chkGroups[g]=(chkGroups[g]||[]);chkGroups[g].push(el.parentElement.textContent.trim());});
 1472 |   Object.assign(answers,chkGroups);
 1473 |   return {
 1474 |     bizName:getv('bizName')||'Unnamed Business',
 1475 |     sector:gopt('sector'),sectorCode:getv('sector'),
 1476 |     bizType:gopt('bizType'),bizTypeCode:getv('bizType'),
 1477 |     geo:gopt('geo'),geoCode:getv('geo'),
 1478 |     problem:getv('problem')||'Not described',
 1479 |     stage:document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.textContent||'Not specified',
 1480 |     answers,
 1481 |   };
 1482 | }
 1483 | 
 1484 | /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 1485 |    LOADER
 1486 | ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
 1487 | function setLoader(n,msg,pct){
 1488 |   for(let i=1;i<=5;i++){const el=document.getElementById('ls'+i);if(!el)continue;el.className='ld-step'+(i<n?' done':i===n?' active':'');}
 1489 |   document.getElementById('ldStatus').textContent=msg||'';
 1490 |   document.getElementById('ldBar').style.width=(pct||0)+'%';
 1491 | }
 1492 | function showLoader(){document.getElementById('assessShell').style.display='none';document.getElementById('loaderShell').style.display='flex';}
 1493 | function hideLoader(){document.getElementById('loaderShell').style.display='none';}
 1494 | 
 1495 | /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 1496 |    MAIN BUILD
 1497 | ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
 1498 | async function buildDashboard(){
 1499 |   const fd=collectData();
 1500 |   showLoader();
 1501 |   setLoader(1,'Reading your inputs…',8);
 1502 |   await tick(200);
 1503 |   let analysis;
 1504 |   try{
 1505 |     setLoader(2,`Searching live ${fd.sector} market data in ${fd.geo}…`,25);
 1506 |     await tick(150);
 1507 |     setLoader(3,'Fetching real-time competitor profiles & funding data…',48);
 1508 |     analysis=await callAPI(fd);
 1509 |     setLoader(4,'Calculating TAM/SAM/SOM, scores & 12-month projections…',75);
 1510 |     await tick(300);
 1511 |     setLoader(5,'Assembling your market intelligence dashboard…',95);
 1512 |     await tick(400);
 1513 |   }catch(e){
 1514 |     console.warn('API failed, using fallback:',e.message);
 1515 |     setLoader(5,'Running offline analysis…',95);
 1516 |     analysis=offlineAnalysis(fd);
 1517 |     await tick(600);
 1518 |   }
 1519 |   renderDash(fd,analysis);
 1520 | }
 1521 | const tick=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));
 1522 | 
 1523 | /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 1524 |    CLAUDE API CALL
 1525 | ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
 1526 | async function callAPI(fd){
 1527 |   const answersText=Object.entries(fd.answers).map(([k,v])=>`• ${k}: ${Array.isArray(v)?v.join(', '):v}`).join('\n')||'(form answers not yet filled)';
 1528 |   const rtData=window._rtData||{};
 1529 |   // Build a clean, readable answers summary for Gemini
 1530 |   const answerLines=Object.entries(fd.answers)
 1531 |     .filter(([,v])=>v&&v!==''&&!(Array.isArray(v)&&v.length===0))
 1532 |     .map(([k,v])=>`  - ${Array.isArray(v)?v.join(', '):v}`)
 1533 |     .join('\n');
 1534 | 
 1535 |   const prompt=`You are a senior market intelligence analyst with deep knowledge of Indian and global markets.
 1536 | 
 1537 | Analyse this product and produce a data-driven market assessment using your real knowledge of this sector, geography, and companies.
 1538 | 
 1539 | PRODUCT: ${fd.bizName}
 1540 | SECTOR: ${fd.sector}
 1541 | BUSINESS TYPE: ${fd.bizType}  
 1542 | TARGET GEOGRAPHY: ${fd.geo}
 1543 | BUSINESS STAGE: ${fd.stage}
 1544 | PROBLEM BEING SOLVED: ${fd.problem}
 1545 | 
 1546 | WHAT THE FOUNDER TOLD US ABOUT THEIR MARKET:
 1547 | ${answerLines||'(answers not provided)'}
 1548 | 
 1549 | CRITICAL INSTRUCTIONS:
 1550 | 1. Use your REAL knowledge of the ${fd.sector} market in ${fd.geo} — cite real TAM figures, real CAGR rates
 1551 | 2. Name REAL competitors that actually exist in ${fd.sector} in ${fd.geo} — not placeholders
 1552 | 3. Score those competitors based on your actual knowledge of their market position
 1553 | 4. Revenue by region must reflect real market concentration for ${fd.sector} in ${fd.geo}
 1554 | 5. The overall score must genuinely reflect the founder's answers above
 1555 | 6. TAM/SAM/SOM must be realistic for this specific sector and geography
 1556 | 
 1557 | Return ONLY raw JSON, no markdown fences, no explanation before or after:
 1558 | {
 1559 | "overallScore": <0-100, genuine assessment based on answers above>,
 1560 | "grade": "Excellent" or "Strong" or "Moderate" or "Needs Work" or "Critical",

 1564 | "tamCrore": <realistic TAM for ${fd.sector} in ${fd.geo} in ₹Crore>,

 1588 |   {"name":"<real comp 1>","scores":{"pricingPower":<based on real knowledge>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"},
 1589 |   {"name":"<real comp 2>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"},
 1590 |   {"name":"<real comp 3>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"}
 1591 | ],

 1598 |     {"label":"<real comp 3 name>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values: their current share ~10-20%, slight growth>]}
 1599 |   ]
 1600 | },
 1601 | "geoRegions": {
 1602 |   "Asia Pacific": {"rev":"<GLOBAL sector market size in this region e.g. ₹5000Cr or $8B>","pct":"<% of global sector TAM>","ids":[4,50,156,356,360,392,410,458,702,704,764,840]},

 1615 | ],
