 1624 | }
 1625 | }`;
 1626 | 
 1627 |   // Exponential backoff helper (shared pattern)
 1628 |   const fetchWithRetry=async(url,opts,maxTries=3)=>{
 1629 |     for(let attempt=1;attempt<=maxTries;attempt++){
 1630 |       const r=await fetch(url,opts);
 1631 |       if((r.status===429||r.status===529||r.status>=500)&&attempt<maxTries){
 1632 |         await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,Math.min(2000*Math.pow(2,attempt-1),16000)));
 1633 |         continue;
 1634 |       }
 1635 |       return r;
 1636 |     }
 1637 |   };
 1638 | 
 1639 |   const _KEY2='USE_SERVER_KEY';
 1640 |   const resp=await fetchWithRetry('/api',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({
 1641 |     _type:'analysis',
 1642 |     prompt:prompt})});
 1643 |   // ── Gemini response parsing ──
 1644 |   if(!resp.ok) throw new Error('HTTP '+resp.status);
 1645 |   const data=await resp.json();
 1646 |   const allText=(data?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts||[]).map(p=>p.text||'').join('');
 1647 |   if(!allText) throw new Error('Empty API response');
 1648 | 
 1649 |   // Strip markdown fences
 1650 |   let raw=allText.trim();
 1651 |   const fm=raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
 1652 |   if(fm) raw=fm[1].trim();
 1653 | 
 1654 |   // Find outermost JSON object
 1655 |   const s0=raw.indexOf('{'), e0=raw.lastIndexOf('}');
 1656 |   if(s0===-1||e0===-1) throw new Error('No JSON in response');
 1657 |   raw=raw.slice(s0,e0+1);
 1658 | 
 1659 |   // Parse with truncation repair fallback
 1660 |   let parsed;
 1661 |   try{ parsed=JSON.parse(raw); }
 1662 |   catch(_){
 1663 |     try{ parsed=JSON.parse(repairTruncatedJSON(raw)); }
 1664 |     catch(e2){ throw new Error('JSON parse failed: '+e2.message); }
 1665 |   }
 1666 |   // Merge Gemini response with offline fallback for any missing fields
 1667 |   // This ensures we ALWAYS use real AI data where available, fill gaps from fallback
 1668 |   if(!parsed||typeof parsed!=='object'){
 1669 |     throw new Error('No valid JSON from Gemini');
 1670 |   }
 1671 |   console.log('Gemini returned fields:', Object.keys(parsed).join(', '));
 1672 |   // Return what we got — renderDash has guards for missing fields
 1673 |   return parsed;
 1674 | }

 1676 | /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 1677 |    OFFLINE FALLBACK — realistic sector-calibrated values
 1678 | ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
 1679 | function offlineAnalysis(fd){
 1680 |   const sc=fd.sectorCode;
 1681 |   const gc=fd.geoCode;
 1682 |   const isIndia=['T1','T2','PI'].includes(gc);
 1683 |   const TAM={IT:2800,HC:1400,FS:3500,EC:8000,ED:650,MF:12000,RE:6000,LG:4500,ME:1200,AG:900,EN:2200,OT:500};
 1684 |   const GR={IT:28,HC:22,FS:25,EC:35,ED:30,MF:15,RE:12,LG:14,ME:18,AG:20,EN:32,OT:18};
 1685 |   const tamC=(TAM[sc]||500)*(isIndia?0.18:1.0);
 1686 |   const gr=GR[sc]||20;
 1687 |   const t=+document.getElementById('liveScore').textContent||50;
 1688 |   const tgtPct=Math.round(2+t/100*8);
 1689 | 
 1690 |   // Always use sector default competitors — never fall back to empty
 1691 |   const defComps={
 1692 |     IT:['Zoho','Freshworks','LeadSquared'],
 1693 |     HC:['Practo','Mfine','Portea'],
 1694 |     FS:['Razorpay','Zerodha','PayU'],
 1695 |     EC:['Meesho','Flipkart','Nykaa'],
 1696 |     ED:["BYJU'S",'Unacademy','upGrad'],
 1697 |     MF:['Tata Technologies','L&T','Mahindra'],
 1698 |     RE:['NoBroker','MagicBricks','99acres'],
 1699 |     LG:['Delhivery','Ecom Express','Shiprocket'],
 1700 |     ME:['Zee5','SonyLiv','MXPlayer'],
 1701 |     AG:['DeHaat','Ninjacart','Agristack'],
 1702 |     EN:['ReNew Power','Greenko','Adani Green'],
 1703 |     OT:['Competitor A','Competitor B','Competitor C']
 1704 |   };
 1705 |   const compList=(defComps[sc]||['Competitor A','Competitor B','Competitor C']).slice(0,3);
 1706 | 
 1707 |   const rem=100-tgtPct;
 1708 |   const spl=[0.35,0.27,0.20,0.12];
 1709 | 
 1710 |   // Market share — always 5 entries: product + 3 competitors + Others
 1711 |   const mshare=[
 1712 |     {name:fd.bizName, pct:tgtPct, val:'₹'+Math.round(tamC*tgtPct/100)+'Cr'},
 1713 |     {name:compList[0], pct:Math.round(rem*spl[0]), val:'₹'+Math.round(tamC*rem*spl[0]/100)+'Cr'},
 1714 |     {name:compList[1], pct:Math.round(rem*spl[1]), val:'₹'+Math.round(tamC*rem*spl[1]/100)+'Cr'},
 1715 |     {name:compList[2], pct:Math.round(rem*spl[2]), val:'₹'+Math.round(tamC*rem*spl[2]/100)+'Cr'},
 1716 |     {name:'Others',    pct:Math.max(1,100-tgtPct-Math.round(rem*spl[0])-Math.round(rem*spl[1])-Math.round(rem*spl[2])), val:'—'}
 1717 |   ];
 1718 | 
 1719 |   // Competitor profiles — always populated
 1720 |   const compProfiles=compList.map((name,i)=>({
 1721 |     name,
 1722 |     stage:['Series C / Listed','Series B','Series A'][i]||'Funded',
 1723 |     strength:['Wide distribution & brand recognition','Strong product depth & retention','Aggressive pricing & SME focus'][i]||'Established market presence',
 1724 |     weakness:['Weak Tier 2/3 penetration','Poor UX for non-tech users','Limited enterprise features'][i]||'Slower innovation cycle',
 1725 |     marketSharePct:Math.round(rem*spl[i])
 1726 |   }));
 1727 | 
 1728 |   // Cities / regions — per sector for realistic city names
 1729 |   const cityMap={
 1730 |     IT:  ['Mumbai','Delhi NCR','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Pune'],
 1731 |     HC:  ['Mumbai','Delhi','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Pune'],
 1732 |     FS:  ['Mumbai','Delhi NCR','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Pune'],
 1733 |     EC:  ['Mumbai','Delhi','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Kolkata'],
 1734 |     ED:  ['Mumbai','Delhi','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Pune'],
 1735 |     MF:  ['Mumbai','Pune','Chennai','Hyderabad','Surat','Ahmedabad'],
 1736 |     RE:  ['Mumbai','Delhi NCR','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Pune'],
 1737 |     LG:  ['Mumbai','Delhi','Bangalore','Chennai','Hyderabad','Kolkata'],
 1738 |     ME:  ['Mumbai','Delhi','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Pune'],
 1739 |     AG:  ['Delhi','Hyderabad','Bangalore','Pune','Chennai','Mumbai'],

 1742 |   };
 1743 |   const intlCities=['Asia Pacific','North America','Europe','South America','Africa','ROW'];
 1744 |   const cities=isIndia?(cityMap[sc]||cityMap.OT):intlCities;
 1745 | 
 1746 |   const base=tamC/cities.length;
 1747 |   const mults=[1.25,1.05,1.35,0.85,0.70,0.65];
 1748 | 
 1749 |   const months=['Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec','Jan','Feb','Mar'];
 1750 |   const ttmMo=3;
 1751 |   const ourTrend=months.map((_,i)=>i<ttmMo?0:+((tgtPct*(i-ttmMo+1)/10)).toFixed(1));
 1752 |   const c1Trend=months.map((_,i)=>+(rem*0.35*(0.88+i*0.008)+Math.sin(i*0.8)*0.6).toFixed(1));
 1753 |   const c2Trend=months.map((_,i)=>+(rem*0.27*(0.82+i*0.007)+Math.sin(i*1.1+1)*0.5).toFixed(1));
 1754 |   const c3Trend=months.map((_,i)=>+(rem*0.20*(0.80+i*0.006)+Math.sin(i*0.9+2)*0.4).toFixed(1));
 1755 | 
 1756 |   const geoRevs={
 1757 |     'Asia Pacific':{rev:isIndia?'₹'+Math.round(tamC*0.45)+'Cr':'$'+Math.round(tamC*0.32)+'M',pct:isIndia?'45%':'32%'},
 1758 |     'North America':{rev:'$'+Math.round(tamC*0.26)+'M',pct:'26%'},
 1759 |     'South America':{rev:'$'+Math.round(tamC*0.12)+'M',pct:'12%'},
 1760 |     'Europe':{rev:'€'+Math.round(tamC*0.21)+'M',pct:'21%'},
 1761 |     'Africa':{rev:'$'+Math.round(tamC*0.06)+'M',pct:'6%'}
 1762 |   };
 1763 | 
 1764 |   const radarAxes=['pricingPower','distribution','brandValue','innovation','marketReach','customerSat'];
 1765 |   const ourOffsets=[+5,-3,+2,+8,-4,+6];
 1766 |   const ourR=radarAxes.map((_,i)=>Math.min(100,Math.max(5,t+ourOffsets[i])));

 1768 |   const radar=[

 1770 |     ...compList.map((n,ci)=>{
 1771 |       const s=ourR.map((v,ai)=>Math.min(100,Math.max(5,v+COMP_OFFSETS[ci][ai])));
 1772 |       return{name:n,scores:Object.fromEntries(radarAxes.map((k,i)=>[k,s[i]])),avg:(s.reduce((a,b)=>a+b)/6).toFixed(1)};
 1773 |     })
 1774 |   ];
 1775 | 
 1776 |   return{
 1777 |     overallScore:t,
 1778 |     grade:t>=75?'Excellent':t>=60?'Strong':t>=45?'Moderate':t>=30?'Needs Work':'Critical',
 1779 |     verdict:`${fd.bizName} has ${t>=60?'strong':'moderate'} potential in the ${fd.sector} market targeting ${fd.geo} — key opportunity in ${cities[0]} and ${cities[1]}.`,
 1780 |     dimensions:{marketSize:Math.min(100,t+4),audienceQuality:Math.min(100,t-2),competitionEdge:Math.max(0,t-7),revenuePotential:Math.min(100,t+2),riskProfile:Math.max(0,t-4),sectorFit:Math.min(100,t+6)},
 1781 |     tamCrore:Math.round(tamC),
 1782 |     samCrore:Math.round(tamC*0.28),
 1783 |     somCrore:Math.round(tamC*tgtPct/100),
 1784 |     growthRate:gr,
 1785 |     currency:'₹Cr',
 1786 |     marketShare:mshare,
 1787 |     competitorProfiles:compProfiles,
 1788 |     revenueByRegion:{
 1789 |       labels:cities,
 1790 |       currentMarket:cities.map((_,i)=>+(base*mults[i]*0.72).toFixed(1)),
 1791 |       projected2027:cities.map((_,i)=>+(base*mults[i]*(1+gr/100)).toFixed(1)),
 1792 |       ourTarget:cities.map((_,i)=>+(base*mults[i]*tgtPct/100*0.85).toFixed(1))
 1793 |     },
 1794 |     competitorRadar:radar,
 1795 |     trendData:{
 1796 |       months,
 1797 |       series:[
 1798 |         {label:fd.bizName,   dash:[],data:ourTrend},
 1799 |         {label:compList[0],  dash:[],data:c1Trend},
 1800 |         {label:compList[1],  dash:[],data:c2Trend},
 1801 |         {label:compList[2],  dash:[],data:c3Trend}
 1802 |       ]
 1803 |     },
 1804 |     geoRegions:Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(geoRevs).map(([k,v])=>[[k],{rev:v.rev,pct:v.pct,ids:{}}])),
 1805 |     keyInsights:[
 1806 |       `💡 ${fd.bizName} targets a ₹${Math.round(tamC)}Cr TAM in the ${fd.sector} sector — growing at ~${gr}% CAGR in ${fd.geo}.`,
 1807 |       `⚔️ Competing against ${compList[0]} and ${compList[1]} — your primary edge must be 10× better on at least one dimension.`,

 1809 |       `📍 Highest revenue density in ${cities[0]} and ${cities[1]} — establish these before geographic expansion.`,
 1810 |       `✅ 90-day priority: sign 3 paying pilots, validate pricing at ₹${Math.round(tamC*tgtPct/100/12/100)}K/month, and map the regulatory pathway.`

 1815 |       `Stage risk: at "${fd.stage}", premature scaling before product-market fit is the primary failure mode.`
 1816 |     ],

 1821 |     ],

 1831 | 
 1832 | /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 1833 |    RENDER DASHBOARD — exact market_dashboard_fixed style
 1834 | ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
 1835 | function renderDash(fd,a){
 1836 |   const biz=fd.bizName;
 1837 |   dd={fd,a};
 1838 | 
 1839 |   /* ── Header ── */
 1840 |   const scoreCol=a.overallScore>=55?'#7FDEBD':a.overallScore>=40?'#F5C842':'#FF8080';
 1841 |   document.getElementById('dhTitle').textContent=`${biz} · Market Potential Assessment`;
 1842 |   const liveTag=a.realTimeInsight?' · 🟢 AI-Powered Live Data':' · 🟡 Offline Estimate';
 1843 |   document.getElementById('dhSub').textContent=`${fd.sector} · ${fd.bizType} · ${fd.geo}${liveTag} · Infopace Management Pvt Ltd`;
 1844 |   // Smart merge: use AI data where present, fill gaps from offline fallback
 1845 |   // This means real Gemini data is always shown, nothing is silently replaced
 1846 |   const offline=offlineAnalysis(fd);
 1847 |   const merge=(aiVal,fbVal)=>(aiVal!==undefined&&aiVal!==null&&aiVal!=='')?aiVal:fbVal;
 1848 | 
 1849 |   a.tamCrore    = merge(a.tamCrore,    offline.tamCrore);
 1850 |   a.samCrore    = merge(a.samCrore,    offline.samCrore);
 1851 |   a.somCrore    = merge(a.somCrore,    offline.somCrore);
 1852 |   a.overallScore= merge(a.overallScore,offline.overallScore);
 1853 |   a.growthRate  = merge(a.growthRate,  offline.growthRate);
 1854 |   a.grade       = merge(a.grade,       offline.grade);
 1855 |   a.verdict     = merge(a.verdict,     offline.verdict);
 1856 |   a.keyInsights = (Array.isArray(a.keyInsights)&&a.keyInsights.length)?a.keyInsights:offline.keyInsights;
 1857 |   a.topRisks    = (Array.isArray(a.topRisks)&&a.topRisks.length)?a.topRisks:offline.topRisks;
 1858 |   a.quickWins   = (Array.isArray(a.quickWins)&&a.quickWins.length)?a.quickWins:offline.quickWins;
 1859 |   a.popups      = (a.popups&&Object.keys(a.popups).length)?a.popups:offline.popups;
 1860 |   a.geoRegions  = a.geoRegions||offline.geoRegions||null;
 1861 |   a.dimensions  = (a.dimensions&&a.dimensions.marketSize)?a.dimensions:offline.dimensions;
 1862 |   a.marketShare = (Array.isArray(a.marketShare)&&a.marketShare.length>2)?a.marketShare:offline.marketShare;
 1863 |   a.competitorRadar = (Array.isArray(a.competitorRadar)&&a.competitorRadar.length>1)?a.competitorRadar:offline.competitorRadar;
 1864 |   a.trendData   = (a.trendData&&Array.isArray(a.trendData.series)&&a.trendData.series.length>2)?a.trendData:offline.trendData;

 1886 |   /* ══ CHART 1: D3 DONUT — exact template rendering ══ */

 1889 |   // Ensure product (index 0) always has a visible minimum slice

 1916 |     let dispVal=d.val||'';
 1917 |     if(!dispVal||dispVal==='—'||dispVal==='-'){

 1919 |       dispVal=p+'%';
 1920 |     } else if(/^\d+(\.\d+)?$/.test(dispVal.trim())){
 1921 |       // Raw number with no unit — add ₹Cr
 1922 |       dispVal='₹'+dispVal+'Cr';
 1923 |     } else if(dispVal.endsWith('C')||dispVal.endsWith('Cr')==false&&dispVal.includes('₹')){
 1924 |       // Truncated like "₹37.5C" — ensure ends with "Cr"

 1926 |     }

 1939 |   // D3 donut SVG — exact template code
 1940 |   (function(){
 1941 |     const W=200,H=200;
 1942 |     const svgEl=document.getElementById('donut-svg');
 1943 |     svgEl.setAttribute('width',W);svgEl.setAttribute('height',H);
 1944 |     svgEl.setAttribute('viewBox',`0 0 ${W} ${H}`);
 1945 |     svgEl.style.width=W+'px';svgEl.style.height=H+'px';
 1946 |     const svg=d3.select(svgEl);svg.selectAll('*').remove();
 1947 |     const cx=W/2,cy=H/2,outerR=88,innerR=52;
 1948 |     const pie=d3.pie().value(d=>d.pct).sort(null).padAngle(0.014);
 1949 |     const arcFn=d3.arc().innerRadius(innerR).outerRadius(outerR).cornerRadius(2);
 1950 |     const arcs=pie(BD);
 1951 |     const g=svg.append('g').attr('transform',`translate(${cx},${cy})`);
 1952 |     g.selectAll('path').data(arcs).join('path')
 1953 |       .attr('d',arcFn).attr('fill',(_,i)=>PAL[i%8])
 1954 |       .attr('stroke','#fff').attr('stroke-width',2);
 1955 |     arcs.forEach((arc,i)=>{

 1957 |       if(pct<5)return; // skip tiny slices only

 1966 |         .attr('fill','rgba(255,255,255,0.92)')
 1967 |         .attr('stroke',PAL[i%8]).attr('stroke-width',1);

 2198 |   // ── Use Gemini's actual data — only fix if data is bad ──────
 2199 |   const shapedSeries=rawShare.map((s,i)=>{
 2200 |     let data=[...s.data];
 2201 |     const validVals=data.filter(v=>typeof v==='number'&&!isNaN(v));
 2202 |     const mx=validVals.length?Math.max(...validVals):0;
 2203 |     const mn=validVals.length?Math.min(...validVals):0;
 2204 |     const spread=mx-mn;
 2205 | 
 2206 |     if(i===0){
 2207 |       // Our product: use Gemini data if it has real variation
 2208 |       // Only override if all values are 0 or identical
 2209 |       if(mx===0||spread<0.3){
 2210 |         // Fallback: generate realistic S-curve using somCrore/tamCrore
 2211 |         const peakPct=Math.min(+((a.somCrore||5)/(a.tamCrore||100)*100).toFixed(1),15);
 2212 |         data=Array.from({length:12},(_,m)=>{
 2213 |           const t=m/11;
 2214 |           const base=peakPct*(t*t*(3-2*t));
 2215 |           // Add slight natural volatility — wins some months, dips others
 2216 |           const noise=peakPct*0.06*Math.sin(m*1.3+0.5);
 2217 |           return +Math.max(0,base+noise).toFixed(1);
 2218 |         });
 2219 |       }
 2220 |     } else {
 2221 |       // Competitors: use Gemini data if valid
 2222 |       // Only override if data is missing or completely flat
 2223 |       if(!validVals.length||mx===0){
 2224 |         const share=a.marketShare?.[i]?.pct||20;
 2225 |         const gr=(a.growthRate||20)/100;
 2226 |         data=Array.from({length:12},(_,m)=>{
 2227 |           const t=m/11;
 2228 |           return +(share*(0.9+0.2*t)+Math.sin(m*0.7)*0.3).toFixed(1);
 2229 |         });
 2230 |       } else if(spread<2){
 2231 |         // Data is too flat — add meaningful market fluctuation
 2232 |         // Simulate real market dynamics: dips in summer, peak in Q4
 2233 |         const volatility=Math.max(mx*0.08, 1.5);
 2234 |         data=data.map((v,m)=>{
 2235 |           const seasonal=Math.sin(m*0.9+1)*volatility*0.6;
 2236 |           const trend=mx*(0.92+m*0.007); // slight upward drift
 2237 |           return +Math.max(0.1,(trend+seasonal)).toFixed(1);
 2238 |         });
 2239 |       }
 2240 |     }
 2241 |     // Fill any NaN or missing months
 2242 |     data=data.map((v,m)=>typeof v==='number'&&!isNaN(v)?v:+(data.filter(x=>!isNaN(x))[0]||0));
 2243 |     return {...s, data};
 2244 |   });

 2469 |   function renderMap(world){
 2470 |     const wrap=document.getElementById('mapWrap');
 2471 |     const tip=document.getElementById('mapTT');
 2472 |     const W=wrap.offsetWidth,H=wrap.offsetHeight;
 2473 |     if(W<50||H<30){setTimeout(()=>renderMap(world),150);return;}
 2474 |     const svgEl=document.getElementById('worldMap');
 2475 |     svgEl.setAttribute('width',W);svgEl.setAttribute('height',H);
 2476 |     svgEl.setAttribute('viewBox',`0 0 ${W} ${H}`);
 2477 |     svgEl.style.width=W+'px';svgEl.style.height=H+'px';
 2478 |     const svg=d3.select(svgEl);svg.selectAll('*').remove();
 2479 |     const proj=d3.geoEquirectangular().fitSize([W,H],{type:'Sphere'});
 2480 |     const pathFn=d3.geoPath().projection(proj);
 2481 |     const countries=topojson.feature(world,world.objects.countries);
 2482 |     const borders=topojson.mesh(world,world.objects.countries,(a,b)=>a!==b);
 2483 |     // Dark ocean
 2484 |     svg.append('rect').attr('width',W).attr('height',H).attr('fill','#C8D8F0');
 2485 |     svg.append('path').datum(d3.geoGraticule().step([30,30])()).attr('d',pathFn).attr('fill','none').attr('stroke','rgba(0,145,218,0.04)').attr('stroke-width','0.4');
 2486 |     svg.selectAll('.ctry').data(countries.features).join('path').attr('class','ctry').attr('d',pathFn)
 2487 |       .attr('fill',d=>{
 2488 |         const r=getRegion(d.id);
 2489 |         if(!r)return '#A8C0D8';
 2490 |         const rd=RDATA_D[r];
 2491 |         // Zero/untargeted regions get a muted version of their color
 2492 |         return rd&&rd.zero?rga(RCOL_D[r],0.25):RCOL_D[r];
 2493 |       })
 2494 |       .attr('stroke','rgba(0,20,50,0.5)').attr('stroke-width','0.3').style('cursor','pointer')
 2495 |       .attr('opacity',d=>{const r=getRegion(d.id);return r&&RDATA_D[r]?.zero?0.5:1;})
 2496 |       .on('mouseover',function(ev,d){
 2497 |         const r=getRegion(d.id);if(!r)return;
 2498 |         const rd=RDATA_D[r];
 2499 |         const isIndia=+d.id===356;
 2500 |         tip.innerHTML=`<strong style="color:#fff">${r}</strong>${isIndia?' <span style="color:#7FDEBD;font-size:9px">· Click for India drill-down</span>':''}<br>${rd.zero?'<span style="color:#9BAABB;font-size:10px">Outside target geography — global sector opportunity shown</span>':`Rev: <span style="color:#7FDEBD">${rd.v}</span> &nbsp;·&nbsp; Share: <span style="color:#BDD0EC">${rd.p}</span>`}`;
 2501 |         tip.style.opacity='1';
 2502 |         svg.selectAll('.ctry').style('opacity',e=>getRegion(e.id)===r?1:0.35);
 2503 |         d3.select(this).attr('stroke','rgba(127,222,189,0.6)').attr('stroke-width','1');
 2504 |       })
 2505 |       .on('mousemove',function(ev){
 2506 |         const rc=wrap.getBoundingClientRect();
 2507 |         let x=ev.clientX-rc.left+12,y=ev.clientY-rc.top-38;
 2508 |         if(x+240>W)x-=252;if(y<4)y=4;
 2509 |         tip.style.left=x+'px';tip.style.top=y+'px';
 2510 |       })
 2511 |       .on('mouseleave',function(){
 2512 |         tip.style.opacity='0';
 2513 |         svg.selectAll('.ctry').style('opacity',1);
 2514 |         d3.select(this).attr('stroke','rgba(0,20,50,0.8)').attr('stroke-width','0.3');
 2515 |       })
 2516 |       .on('click',function(ev,d){

 2518 |         if(+d.id===356){ev.stopPropagation();renderIndiaMap();}
 2519 |         else{const r=getRegion(d.id);if(r)openPop('geomap');}
 2520 |       });
 2521 |     svg.append('path').datum(borders).attr('d',pathFn).attr('fill','none').attr('stroke','rgba(0,30,60,0.7)').attr('stroke-width','0.25');
 2522 | 
 2523 |     // Label boxes — dark theme
 2524 |     const lblSz=Math.max(9,W*0.016);const dotSz=Math.max(5,W*0.011);
 2525 |     const dotSizes={'Asia Pacific':1.0,'North America':0.93,'Europe':0.86,'South America':0.64,'Africa':0.50};
 2526 |     Object.entries(RDOTS_D).forEach(([region,[lon,lat]])=>{
 2527 |       const pt=proj([lon,lat]);if(!pt)return;
 2528 |       const[cx,cy]=pt;
 2529 |       const sz=dotSz*(dotSizes[region]||0.7);
 2530 |       const col=RCOL_D[region]||PAL[0];

 2532 |       // Glow ring
 2533 |       svg.append('circle').attr('cx',cx).attr('cy',cy).attr('r',sz+dotSz*0.8).attr('fill','none').attr('stroke',col).attr('stroke-width','1').attr('opacity','0.2');
 2534 |       // Inner dot
 2535 |       svg.append('circle').attr('cx',cx).attr('cy',cy).attr('r',sz).attr('fill','#fff').attr('stroke',col).attr('stroke-width','1.8').attr('opacity','0.95');

 2539 |       svg.append('rect').attr('x',bx).attr('y',by).attr('width',bW).attr('height',2).attr('rx',4).attr('fill',col);
 2540 |       const shortName={'Asia Pacific':'Asia Pac','North America':'N. America','Europe':'Europe','South America':'S. America','Africa':'Africa'}[region];
 2541 |       svg.append('text').attr('x',cx).attr('y',by+lblSz*1.4).attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('font-size',lblSz*0.88).attr('font-weight','700').attr('fill',col).attr('font-family','IBM Plex Sans,sans-serif').text(shortName);
 2542 |       const dispText=rd.zero?'Not targeted':`${rd.v}  ·  ${rd.p}`;

 2545 |     });
 2546 |

 2553 |       }
 2554 |     }
 2555 |     document.getElementById('c5tag').textContent='Click region · 🇮🇳 India drill-down';
 2556 |   }

 2561 |   mapRO.observe(document.getElementById('mapWrap'));

 2575 | /* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 2576 |    POPUPS
 2577 | ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
 2578 | function openPop(key){
 2579 |   const a=dd.a;if(!a)return;
 2580 |   const pi=a.popups||{};
 2581 |   const titles={mktshare:'🥧 Market Share & TAM Analysis',revregion:'📊 Revenue by Region',radar:'🕸️ Competitive Intelligence',trend:'📈 Market Trajectory',geomap:'🗺️ Geographic Opportunity'};
 2582 |   let html='';
 2583 | 
 2584 |   // Real-time data badge (shown on all popups if available)
 2585 |   if(a.realTimeInsight){
 2586 |     html+=`<div class="pi-block" style="background:#EEF2FB;border-color:#C5D5F5"><div class="pi-lbl" style="color:#0091DA">🔴 Live Market Data</div><div class="pi-txt">${a.realTimeInsight}</div></div>`;
 2587 |   }
 2588 | 
 2589 |   if(pi[key])html+=`<div class="pi-block"><div class="pi-lbl">AI Analysis</div><div class="pi-txt">${pi[key]}</div></div>`;
 2590 | 
 2591 |   if(key==='mktshare'){

 2595 |     </div></div>`;

 2670 |     const { fd, analysis } = event.data;

 2679 |     }
 2680 |   }

 2683 |   if (event.data.type === 'INFOPACE_PREFILL') {
 2684 |     const u = event.data.userData;
 2685 |     if (!u) return;
 2686 |     // Business name = organization
 2687 |     const bn = document.getElementById('bizName');

 2700 |     if (geo && u.geoCode) geo.value = u.geoCode;

 2726 |     showLoader();

 2728 |   } else {

 2730 |     await _originalBuildDashboard();
 2731 |   }

 2764 |     }

 2782 |     const lbl=br.querySelector('.sb-label');

 2835 |     /* ═══ SVG HELPERS ═══════════════════════════════════════ */
 2836 | 
 2837 |     // Score gauge — clean minimal
 2838 |     function scoreGaugeSVG(score,W,H){
 2839 |       const cx=W/2, cy=100, R=72, sw=12;
 2840 |       const pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,score))/100;
 2841 |       const arcColor=score>=70?'#10B981':score>=50?'#F59E0B':'#EF4444';
 2842 |       const gradId='g'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,6);
 2843 |       // Arc endpoints: left=180deg, right=0deg, going clockwise (bottom open)
 2844 |       const sx=cx-R, sy=cy;
 2845 |       const ex=cx+R, ey=cy;
 2846 |       const scX=cx+R*Math.cos(Math.PI*(1-pct));
 2847 |       const scY=cy-R*Math.sin(Math.PI*pct);
 2848 |       const lg=pct>0.5?1:0;
 2849 |       // Grade label
 2850 |       const grade=score>=70?'Strong':score>=50?'Moderate':'Needs Work';
 2851 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="118" viewBox="0 0 ${W} 118" style="display:block;overflow:visible;">
 2852 |         <defs>
 2853 |           <linearGradient id="${gradId}" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
 2854 |             <stop offset="0%" stop-color="${arcColor}" stop-opacity="0.4"/>
 2855 |             <stop offset="100%" stop-color="${arcColor}"/>
 2856 |           </linearGradient>
 2857 |         </defs>
 2858 |         <!-- Grey track -->
 2859 |         <path d="M${sx},${sy} A${R},${R} 0 0,1 ${ex},${ey}"
 2860 |               fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"/>
 2861 |         <!-- Coloured score arc -->
 2862 |         <path d="M${sx},${sy} A${R},${R} 0 ${lg},1 ${scX},${scY}"
 2863 |               fill="none" stroke="url(#${gradId})" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"/>
 2864 |         <!-- 0 and 100 end labels -->
 2865 |         <text x="${sx-8}" y="${sy+5}" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">0</text>
 2866 |         <text x="${ex+8}" y="${ey+5}" text-anchor="start" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">100</text>
 2867 |         <!-- Centre tick at 50 -->
 2868 |         <line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy-R-sw/2-2}" x2="${cx}" y2="${cy-R+sw/2+2}" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
 2869 |         <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-R-sw/2-6}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">50</text>
 2870 |         <!-- Needle -->
 2871 |         <line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy}" x2="${scX}" y2="${scY}"
 2872 |               stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.7)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
 2873 |         <circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" stroke-width="1"/>
 2874 |         <circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="2.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)"/>
 2875 |         <!-- Score -->
 2876 |         <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-18}" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace"
 2877 |               font-size="34" font-weight="700" fill="${arcColor}">${score}</text>
 2878 |         <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-3}" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
 2879 |               font-size="8.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.35)" letter-spacing=".12em">OUT OF 100</text>
 2880 |       </svg>`;
 2881 |     }
 2882 | 
 2883 |     // Funnel — proper trapezoid shape + side descriptions
 2884 |     function funnelSVG(){
 2885 |       const tam = +(a.tamCrore)||100;
 2886 |       const sam = +(a.samCrore)||30;
 2887 |       const som = +(a.somCrore)||5;
 2888 |       const fmtV = v => v >= 1000 ? '₹' + (v/1000).toFixed(1) + 'K Cr' : '₹' + Math.round(v) + 'Cr';
 2889 | 
 2890 |       // Layout — funnel on left, labels on right
 2891 |       const SVG_W = 480;
 2892 |       const FW = 200;   // funnel column width
 2893 |       const LX = 224;   // label column starts here
 2894 |       const SEG = 64;   // height of each segment
 2895 |       const GAP = 4;    // gap between segments
 2896 |       const SVG_H = SEG * 3 + GAP * 2 + 12;
 2897 | 
 2898 |       const steps = [
 2899 |         {
 2900 |           v: tam, l: 'TAM', pct: 100,
 2901 |           c: '#1A56B0',
 2902 |           title: 'Total Addressable Market',
 2903 |           desc: 'The entire market demand for your product category in the target geography.',
 2904 |           tw: FW, bw: Math.round(FW * 0.68)
 2905 |         },
 2906 |         {
 2907 |           v: sam, l: 'SAM', pct: Math.round(sam/tam*100),
 2908 |           c: '#0891B2',
 2909 |           title: 'Serviceable Available Market',
 2910 |           desc: 'The segment you can realistically reach with your current model and channels.',
 2911 |           tw: Math.round(FW * 0.68), bw: Math.round(FW * 0.38)
 2912 |         },
 2913 |         {
 2914 |           v: som, l: 'SOM', pct: Math.round(som/tam*100),
 2915 |           c: '#059669',
 2916 |           title: '3-Year Revenue Target',
 2917 |           desc: 'Your realistic capture target — typically 2-8% of SAM at early stage.',
 2918 |           tw: Math.round(FW * 0.38), bw: Math.round(FW * 0.16)
 2919 |         }
 2920 |       ];
 2921 | 
 2922 |       const parts = steps.map((s, i) => {
 2923 |         const y = 6 + i * (SEG + GAP);
 2924 |         const cx = FW / 2;
 2925 |         // Trapezoid: top-left, top-right, bottom-right, bottom-left
 2926 |         const tlx = cx - s.tw/2, trx = cx + s.tw/2;
 2927 |         const blx = cx - s.bw/2, brx = cx + s.bw/2;
 2928 |         const path = `M${tlx},${y} L${trx},${y} L${brx},${y+SEG} L${blx},${y+SEG} Z`;
 2929 |         const my = y + SEG/2;
 2930 | 
 2931 |         // Label block on the right
 2932 |         const lmy = my;
 2933 |         const labelLines = s.desc.match(/.{1,44}(\s|$)/g) || [s.desc];
 2934 | 
 2935 |         return `
 2936 |           <!-- segment ${i} -->
 2937 |           <path d="${path}" fill="${s.c}" opacity="0.85"/>
 2938 |           <path d="${path}" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" stroke-width="1.2"/>
 2939 |           <!-- value -->
 2940 |           <text x="${cx}" y="${my - 9}" text-anchor="middle"
 2941 |                 font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#fff">${fmtV(s.v)}</text>
 2942 |           <!-- label + pct -->
 2943 |           <text x="${cx}" y="${my + 8}" text-anchor="middle"
 2944 |                 font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)">${s.l} &nbsp;·&nbsp; ${s.pct}% of TAM</text>
 2945 |           <!-- connector dot + line -->
 2946 |           <circle cx="${FW + 6}" cy="${lmy}" r="4" fill="${s.c}"/>
 2947 |           <line x1="${FW + 10}" y1="${lmy}" x2="${LX - 4}" y2="${lmy}" stroke="${s.c}" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
 2948 |           <!-- right label -->
 2949 |           <text x="${LX}" y="${lmy - 14}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
 2950 |                 font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="${s.c}">${s.title}</text>
 2951 |           ${labelLines.slice(0,2).map((ln, li) =>
 2952 |             `<text x="${LX}" y="${lmy + li * 12}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
 2953 |                    font-size="8.5" fill="#6B7280">${ln.trim()}</text>`
 2954 |           ).join('')}
 2955 |         `;
 2956 |       }).join('');
 2957 | 
 2958 |       // Divider lines between segments
 2959 |       const dividers = [1,2].map(i => {
 2960 |         const y = 6 + i * (SEG + GAP) - GAP;
 2961 |         return `<line x1="2" y1="${y}" x2="${FW-2}" y2="${y}"
 2962 |                       stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>`;
 2963 |       }).join('');
 2964 | 
 2965 |       return `<svg width="${SVG_W}" height="${SVG_H}"
 2966 |                    viewBox="0 0 ${SVG_W} ${SVG_H}"
 2967 |                    style="display:block;width:100%;max-width:${SVG_W}px;overflow:visible;">
 2968 |         ${parts}
 2969 |         ${dividers}
 2970 |       </svg>`;
 2971 |     }
 2972 | 
 2973 |     // Donut chart — pure SVG
 2974 |     function donutSVG(data,W,cx,cy,OR,IR){
 2975 |       const tot=data.reduce((s,d)=>s+(+d.v||0),0)||100;
 2976 |       let ang=-Math.PI/2;
 2977 |       return data.map((d,i)=>{
 2978 |         const sw=(+d.v||0)/tot*2*Math.PI;
 2979 |         if(sw<0.02){ang+=sw;return '';}
 2980 |         const x1=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang),y1=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang);
 2981 |         const x2=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y2=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
 2982 |         const x3=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y3=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
 2983 |         const x4=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang),y4=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang);
 2984 |         const lg=sw>Math.PI?1:0;
 2985 |         const mx=cx+(OR+IR)/2*Math.cos(ang+sw/2),my=cy+(OR+IR)/2*Math.sin(ang+sw/2);
 2986 |         const pct=Math.round((+d.v||0)/tot*100);
 2987 |         const lbl2=pct>=6?`<text x="${mx}" y="${my+3.5}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.95)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${pct}%</text>`:'';
 2988 |         ang+=sw;
 2989 |         return `<path d="M${x1},${y1} A${OR},${OR} 0 ${lg},1 ${x2},${y2} L${x3},${y3} A${IR},${IR} 0 ${lg},0 ${x4},${y4} Z" fill="${d.c}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5"/>${lbl2}`;
 2990 |       }).join('');
 2991 |     }
 2992 | 
 2993 |     // Horizontal bar chart for dimensions
 2994 |     function dimBarsSVG(){
 2995 |       const W=380,H=dimDefs.length*36+16, lw=130;
 2996 |       const rows=dimDefs.map((d,i)=>{
 2997 |         const v=dim[d.k]||0, y=8+i*36;
 2998 |         const bw=Math.max(4,(W-lw-40)*v/100);
 2999 |         const statusC=colfn(v);
 3000 |         return `<text x="${lw-8}" y="${y+16}" text-anchor="end" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#374151" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${d.l}</text>
 3001 |           <rect x="${lw}" y="${y+6}" width="${W-lw-40}" height="16" rx="3" fill="#F3F4F6"/>
 3002 |           <rect x="${lw}" y="${y+6}" width="${bw}" height="16" rx="3" fill="${d.c}" opacity="0.85"/>
 3003 |           <text x="${lw+bw+5}" y="${y+17}" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="${d.c}" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${v}</text>
 3004 |           <text x="${W-2}" y="${y+17}" text-anchor="end" font-size="8" font-weight="600" fill="${statusC}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${lblfn(v)}</text>`;
 3005 |       }).join('');
 3006 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="${H}" viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" style="max-width:100%;">${rows}</svg>`;
 3007 |     }
 3008 | 
 3009 |     // Gantt — full width, readable labels, solid bars
 3010 |     function ganttSVG(){
 3011 |       const wins3=a.quickWins||[];
 3012 |       const tasks=[
 3013 |         {l:wins3[0]?wins3[0].replace(/[₹]/g,'Rs').slice(0,38):'Define North Star Metric & Track OKRs',start:0,dur:2,c:'#065F46',type:'win'},
 3014 |         {l:wins3[1]?wins3[1].replace(/[₹]/g,'Rs').slice(0,38):'Run Structured Customer Discovery Sessions',start:1,dur:3,c:'#1A56B0',type:'win'},
 3015 |         {l:wins3[2]?wins3[2].replace(/[₹]/g,'Rs').slice(0,38):'Validate & Lock Pricing Architecture',start:3,dur:3,c:'#0891B2',type:'win'},
 3016 |         {l:'Competitor Deep-Dive Intelligence',start:0,dur:4,c:'#D97706',type:'research'},
 3017 |         {l:'Build GTM Beachhead Strategy',start:5,dur:4,c:'#1E3A8A',type:'strategy'},
 3018 |         {l:'Close First 3 Paying Pilots',start:7,dur:5,c:'#6D28D9',type:'revenue'},
 3019 |       ];
 3020 | 
 3021 |       // Responsive: fill available width
 3022 |       const W=700, lw=220, weeks=12, rh=36, topPad=32, botPad=36;
 3023 |       const H=tasks.length*rh+topPad+botPad;
 3024 |       const cw=(W-lw)/weeks;
 3025 | 
 3026 |       // Alternating row backgrounds
 3027 |       const rowBg=tasks.map((t,i)=>`<rect x="0" y="${topPad+i*rh}" width="${W}" height="${rh}" fill="${i%2===0?'#FAFAFA':'#ffffff'}"/>`).join('');
 3028 | 
 3029 |       // Vertical grid lines
 3030 |       const grid=Array.from({length:weeks+1},(_,i)=>{
 3031 |         const x=lw+i*cw;
 3032 |         const isMajor=i%4===0;
 3033 |         return `<line x1="${x}" y1="${topPad-8}" x2="${x}" y2="${H-botPad+4}" stroke="${isMajor?'#D1D5DB':'#F0F0F0'}" stroke-width="${isMajor?1:0.5}"/>`;
 3034 |       }).join('');
 3035 | 
 3036 |       // Week labels — only show W1,W2...W12, skip if too narrow
 3037 |       const wkLbls=Array.from({length:weeks},(_,i)=>`<text x="${lw+(i+0.5)*cw}" y="${topPad-10}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#9CA3AF" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">W${i+1}</text>`).join('');
 3038 | 
 3039 |       // Task rows
 3040 |       const typeIcon={'win':'✓','research':'○','strategy':'◆','revenue':'$'};
 3041 |       const rows=tasks.map((t,i)=>{
 3042 |         const y=topPad+i*rh;
 3043 |         const bx=lw+t.start*cw+1;
 3044 |         const bw=Math.max(t.dur*cw-3, 20);
 3045 |         const midY=y+rh/2;
 3046 |         const icon=typeIcon[t.type]||'·';
 3047 |         // Solid bar with full fill + left accent
 3048 |         return `<text x="12" y="${midY+4}" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="${t.c}" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${icon}</text>
 3049 |           <text x="26" y="${midY+4}" font-size="10.5" fill="#1F2937" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${t.l}</text>
 3050 |           <rect x="${bx}" y="${y+6}" width="${bw}" height="${rh-12}" rx="5" fill="${t.c}" opacity="0.18"/>
 3051 |           <rect x="${bx}" y="${y+6}" width="${bw}" height="${rh-12}" rx="5" fill="none" stroke="${t.c}" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.5"/>
 3052 |           <rect x="${bx}" y="${y+6}" width="4" height="${rh-12}" rx="3" fill="${t.c}" opacity="0.9"/>
 3053 |           <text x="${bx+bw/2}" y="${midY+4}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="${t.c}" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">W${t.start+1}–W${t.start+t.dur}</text>`;
 3054 |       }).join('');
 3055 | 
 3056 |       // Month bands at bottom
 3057 |       const mColors=[['#EFF6FF','#1D4ED8'],['#ECFDF5','#065F46'],['#FFF7ED','#92400E']];
 3058 |       const months=mColors.map(([bg,fc],i)=>`<rect x="${lw+i*4*cw}" y="${H-botPad+4}" width="${4*cw-1}" height="20" rx="4" fill="${bg}"/>
 3059 |         <text x="${lw+(i*4+2)*cw}" y="${H-botPad+17}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="${fc}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">Month ${i+1}</text>`).join('');
 3060 | 
 3061 |       // Divider line
 3062 |       const divider=`<line x1="${lw}" y1="${topPad-14}" x2="${lw}" y2="${H-botPad+2}" stroke="#E5E7EB" stroke-width="1.5"/>`;
 3063 | 
 3064 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="${H}" viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" style="width:100%;max-width:${W}px;display:block;">
 3065 |         <rect width="${W}" height="${H}" fill="#fff"/>
 3066 |         ${rowBg}${grid}${divider}${rows}${months}${wkLbls}
 3067 |       </svg>`;
 3068 |     }

 3070 |     // Risk heatmap — improved
 3071 |     function riskSVG(){
 3072 |       const risks2=a.topRisks||[];
 3073 |       const items=[
 3074 |         {l:'Competitive Response',p:2,i:3},
 3075 |         {l:'Regulatory Risk',p:1,i:3},
 3076 |         {l:risks2[0]?risks2[0].slice(0,18):'Execution Risk',p:2,i:2},
 3077 |         {l:risks2[1]?risks2[1].slice(0,18):'Market Timing',p:3,i:2},
 3078 |         {l:'Tech Disruption',p:1,i:2},
 3079 |         {l:'Talent Shortage',p:1,i:1},
 3080 |       ];
 3081 |       const W=280,H=220,lx=52,ty=28,cw=(W-lx)/3,ch=(H-ty-20)/3;
 3082 |       const heatfill=(p,iv)=>{const v=p*iv;return v>=6?'rgba(239,68,68,0.12)':v>=4?'rgba(245,158,11,0.12)':v>=2?'rgba(59,130,246,0.08)':'rgba(16,185,129,0.07)';};
 3083 |       const cells=[];
 3084 |       for(let row=0;row<3;row++)for(let col2=0;col2<3;col2++){
 3085 |         cells.push(`<rect x="${lx+col2*cw}" y="${ty+row*ch}" width="${cw}" height="${ch}" fill="${heatfill(3-row,col2+1)}" rx="2"/>
 3086 |           <rect x="${lx+col2*cw}" y="${ty+row*ch}" width="${cw}" height="${ch}" fill="none" stroke="#E5E7EB" stroke-width="0.8"/>`);
 3087 |       }
 3088 |       const dots=items.map((it)=>{
 3089 |         const dcx=lx+(it.i-1)*cw+cw/2, dcy=ty+(3-it.p)*ch+ch/2;
 3090 |         const dc=it.p*it.i>=6?'#EF4444':it.p*it.i>=4?'#F59E0B':'#3B82F6';
 3091 |         return `<circle cx="${dcx}" cy="${dcy}" r="12" fill="${dc}" opacity="0.12"/>
 3092 |           <circle cx="${dcx}" cy="${dcy}" r="4.5" fill="${dc}"/>
 3093 |           <text x="${dcx}" y="${dcy-16}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#4B5563" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${it.l.slice(0,14)}</text>`;
 3094 |       }).join('');
 3095 |       const axY=['High','Med','Low'].map((l,i)=>`<text x="${lx-5}" y="${ty+i*ch+ch/2+4}" text-anchor="end" font-size="8" fill="#6B7280" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${l}</text>`).join('');
 3096 |       const axX=['Low','Medium','High'].map((l,i)=>`<text x="${lx+i*cw+cw/2}" y="${H-4}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6B7280" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${l}</text>`).join('');
 3097 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="${H}" viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" style="overflow:visible;max-width:100%;">
 3098 |         ${cells.join('')}${dots}${axY}${axX}
 3099 |         <text x="${lx-28}" y="${ty+1.5*ch}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#9CA3AF" transform="rotate(-90,${lx-28},${ty+1.5*ch})" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">PROBABILITY</text>
 3100 |         <text x="${lx+1.5*cw}" y="${H+2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#9CA3AF" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">IMPACT</text>
 3101 |       </svg>`;
 3102 |     }

----------------------------------------------------------------------
📄 FILE #10: README.md
----------------------------------------------------------------------
    1 | # Infopace — React + Supabase Edition
    2 | 
    3 | > AI-powered market intelligence assessment platform.
    4 | > Built with React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Gemini AI + Supabase.
    5 | 
    6 | ---
    7 | 
    8 | ## What This App Does
    9 | 
   10 | 1. **Onboarding Form** — Collects user details (name, email, phone, organization, role, website, LinkedIn, team size, sector, geography, problem statement, stage)
   11 | 2. **AI Assessment** — Generates 8 tailored question groups using Gemini AI, with a live market score panel updating as you answer
   12 | 3. **Results Dashboard** — Full market intelligence dashboard with:
   13 |    - Score donut + dimension bars + capability radar
   14 |    - Revenue projection chart (conservative / base / optimistic)
   15 |    - TAM / SAM / SOM estimates
   16 |    - Competitor analysis
   17 |    - Key AI-generated insights
   18 |    - 90-day action plan
   19 |    - Full printable report view
   20 |    - Raw JSON data view
   21 | 4. **Supabase Storage** — Every submission (user details + all answers + full analysis) is saved to your Supabase database
   22 | 
   23 | ---
   24 | 
   25 | ## Prerequisites
   26 | 
   27 | - Node.js 18+
   28 | - A free [Gemini API key](https://aistudio.google.com) (already in `server.js`)
   29 | - A free [Supabase](https://supabase.com) project
   30 | 
   31 | ---
   32 | 
   33 | ## Quick Start
   34 | 
   35 | ### Step 1 — Set up Supabase
   36 | 
   37 | 1. Create a free project at [supabase.com](https://supabase.com)
   38 | 2. Go to **SQL Editor** and paste + run the contents of `supabase_setup.sql`
   39 | 3. Go to **Settings → API** and copy:
   40 |    - **Project URL** (looks like `https://xxxx.supabase.co`)
   41 |    - **anon / public key** (long JWT string)
   42 | 
   43 | ### Step 2 — Configure environment
   44 | 
   45 | ```bash
   46 | cp .env.example .env
   47 | ```
   48 | 
   49 | Edit `.env` and fill in your values:
   50 | 
   51 | ```env
   52 | VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://YOUR_PROJECT_ID.supabase.co
   53 | VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=YOUR_ANON_PUBLIC_KEY
   54 | ```
   55 | 
   56 | ### Step 3 — Install dependencies
   57 | 
   58 | ```bash
   59 | npm install
   60 | ```
   61 | 
   62 | ### Step 4 — Run the app (two terminals)
   63 | 
   64 | **Terminal 1** — Start the Gemini proxy server (port 4000):
   65 | ```bash
   66 | node server.js
   67 | ```
   68 | 
   69 | **Terminal 2** — Start the React dev server (port 3000):
   70 | ```bash
   71 | npm run dev
   72 | ```
   73 | 
   74 | Open **http://localhost:3000**
   75 | 
   76 | The Vite dev server automatically proxies `/api` requests to `server.js` on port 4000.
   77 | 
   78 | ---
   79 | 
   80 | ## Project Structure
   81 | 
   82 | ```
   83 | infopace-react/
   84 | ├── server.js                    ← Gemini AI proxy (Node.js, port 4000)
   85 | ├── supabase_setup.sql           ← Run once in Supabase SQL Editor
   86 | ├── .env.example                 ← Copy to .env and fill in keys
   87 | │
   88 | ├── index.html                   ← Vite entry HTML
   89 | ├── vite.config.js               ← Dev server + /api proxy config
   90 | ├── tailwind.config.js
   91 | ├── postcss.config.js
   92 | ├── package.json
   93 | │
   94 | └── src/
   95 |     ├── main.jsx                 ← React entry point
   96 |     ├── App.jsx                  ← Screen router (onboarding → assessment → results)
   97 |     ├── index.css                ← Tailwind + IBM Plex fonts
   98 |     │
   99 |     ├── pages/
  100 |     │   ├── OnboardingForm.jsx   ← Step 1: User & venture details
  101 |     │   ├── AssessmentShell.jsx  ← Step 2: AI questions + live scoring
  102 |     │   └── ResultsDashboard.jsx ← Step 3: Full dashboard + report
  103 |     │
  104 |     └── lib/
  105 |         ├── supabase.js          ← Supabase client init
  106 |         ├── gemini.js            ← Gemini API helpers (questions + analysis)
  107 |         └── db.js                ← Save / load submissions
  108 | ```
  109 | 
  110 | ---
  111 | 
  112 | ## Data Saved to Supabase
  113 | 
  114 | Every completed assessment saves one row to the `submissions` table:
  115 | 
  116 | | Column | Type | Description |
  117 | |---|---|---|
  118 | | `id` | uuid | Auto-generated primary key |
  119 | | `name` | text | Full name |
  120 | | `email` | text | Email address |
  121 | | `phone` | text | Phone number |
  122 | | `organization` | text | Company name |
  123 | | `role` | text | Job role |
  124 | | `website` | text | Website URL |
  125 | | `linkedin` | text | LinkedIn URL |
  126 | | `team_size` | text | Team size bracket |
  127 | | `sector` | text | e.g. "HealthTech", "B2B SaaS" |
  128 | | `geography` | text | e.g. "PI" (Pan India), "GL" (Global) |
  129 | | `problem` | text | Problem statement |
  130 | | `stage` | text | Business stage (1–5) |
  131 | | `answers` | jsonb | All question answers keyed by question ID |
  132 | | `overall_score` | integer | Final market score (0–100) |
  133 | | `grade` | text | e.g. "A", "B+", "C" |
  134 | | `dimensions` | jsonb | Six dimension scores |
  135 | | `analysis_json` | jsonb | Complete AI analysis (TAM/SAM/SOM, competitors, insights, action plan, projections) |
  136 | | `created_at` | timestamptz | Submission timestamp |
  137 | 
  138 | ---
  139 | 
  140 | ## Production Deployment
  141 | 
  142 | ### Build the React app
  143 | 
  144 | ```bash
  145 | npm run build
  146 | ```
  147 | 
  148 | This creates a `dist/` folder.
  149 | 
  150 | ### Serve with server.js
  151 | 
  152 | Update `server.js` to serve the `dist/` folder as static files. Replace the static file section at the bottom of `server.js` with:
  153 | 
  154 | ```javascript
  155 | // Serve React build
  156 | let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
  157 | 
  158 | // For React Router — serve index.html for unknown routes
  159 | const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', fp);
  160 | fs.readFile(fullPath, (err, data) => {
  161 |   if (err) {
  162 |     // Fallback to index.html for client-side routing
  163 |     fs.readFile(path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', 'index.html'), (e2, d2) => {
  164 |       if (e2) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
  165 |       res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'text/html' });
  166 |       res.end(d2);
  167 |     });
  168 |     return;
  169 |   }
  170 |   res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fullPath)] || 'text/plain' });
  171 |   res.end(data);
  172 | });
  173 | ```
  174 | 
  175 | Then run just `node server.js` — it serves both the API and the React app on port 4000.
  176 | 
  177 | ### Deploy options
  178 | 
  179 | - **Railway / Render / Fly.io** — push repo, set env vars, run `node server.js`
  180 | - **Vercel** — deploy React app, add serverless function wrapping Gemini calls
  181 | - **VPS** — clone repo, `npm run build`, run with `pm2 start server.js`
  182 | 
  183 | ---
  184 | 
  185 | ## Customisation
  186 | 
  187 | ### Change sectors / geographies
  188 | Edit the `SECTORS` and `GEO` arrays at the top of `src/pages/OnboardingForm.jsx`.
  189 | 
  190 | ### Change AI models
  191 | Edit `MODEL_FAST` and `MODEL_SMART` constants in `server.js`.
  192 | 
  193 | ### Change question count
  194 | Edit the prompt in `src/lib/gemini.js` → `generateQuestions()`.
  195 | 
  196 | ### Add email notifications
  197 | After `saveSubmission()` in `AssessmentShell.jsx`, call a Supabase Edge Function or a service like Resend/SendGrid.
  198 | 
  199 | ---
  200 | 
  201 | ## Troubleshooting
  202 | 
  203 | | Problem | Fix |
  204 | |---|---|
  205 | | `/api` returns 500 | Check Gemini API key on line 8 of `server.js` |
  206 | | Supabase save fails | Verify `.env` values and that `supabase_setup.sql` was run |
  207 | | Questions don't load | Gemini API key may be rate-limited; fallback questions will show |
  208 | | Blank dashboard | Open browser console — look for JSON parse errors in analysis response |
  209 | 
  210 | ---
  211 | 
  212 | ## License
  213 | 
  214 | Infopace Management Pvt Ltd — Internal Use
  215 |

📄 FILE #11: server.js

    1 | // ================================================================
    2 | //  Infopace Proxy Server — Gemini Edition (FREE)
    3 | //  1. Paste your Gemini API key on line 8
    4 | //     Get free key at: https://aistudio.google.com → Get API Key
    5 | //  2. Run:  node server.js
    6 | //  3. Open: http://localhost:4000
    7 | // ================================================================
    8 | 
    9 | const API_KEY = 'AIzaSyAAYHBlfh9Jh42dyjKHlQfU3dzqvUOOhHc'; // ← paste your Gemini key here
   10 | 
   11 | // ── Models ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   12 | // Flash = fast + free (question generation)
   13 | // Pro   = smart + free (dashboard analysis)
   14 | const MODEL_FAST = 'gemini-2.5-flash';
   15 | const MODEL_SMART = 'gemini-2.5-flash';  // both use flash on free tier
   16 | 
   17 | // ── No edits needed below ───────────────────────────────────────
   18 | const http  = require('http');
   19 | const https = require('https');
   20 | const fs    = require('fs');
   21 | const path  = require('path');
   22 | const PORT  = 4000;
   23 | 
   24 | const MIME = {
   25 |   '.html':'text/html', '.js':'application/javascript',
   26 |   '.css':'text/css',   '.json':'application/json',
   27 |   '.png':'image/png',  '.ico':'image/x-icon', '.txt':'text/plain'
   28 | };
   29 | 
   30 | function geminiRequest(model, promptText, callback) {
   31 |   const payload = JSON.stringify({
   32 |     contents: [{ parts: [{ text: promptText }] }],
   33 |     generationConfig: {
   34 |       temperature: 0.7,
   35 |       maxOutputTokens: 8192,
   36 |       responseMimeType: 'text/plain'
   37 |     }
   38 |   });
   39 | 
   40 |   const options = {
   41 |     hostname: 'generativelanguage.googleapis.com',
   42 |     path: `/v1beta/models/${model}:generateContent?key=${API_KEY}`,
   43 |     method: 'POST',
   44 |     headers: {
   45 |       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   46 |       'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(payload)
   47 |     }
   48 |   };
   49 | 
   50 |   const req = https.request(options, res => {
   51 |     let body = '';
   52 |     res.on('data', c => body += c);
   53 |     res.on('end', () => callback(null, res.statusCode, body));
   54 |   });
   55 |   req.on('error', e => callback(e, null, null));
   56 |   req.write(payload);
   57 |   req.end();
   58 | }
   59 | 
   60 | http.createServer((req, res) => {
   61 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*');
   62 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, OPTIONS');
   63 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type');
   64 |   if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') { res.writeHead(204); res.end(); return; }
   65 | 
   66 |   // ── /api → Gemini proxy ─────────────────────────────────────
   67 |   if (req.url === '/api' && req.method === 'POST') {
   68 |     if (!API_KEY || API_KEY === 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE') {
   69 |       res.writeHead(500, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
   70 |       res.end(JSON.stringify({error:'Gemini API key not set. Edit line 8 of server.js'}));
   71 |       return;
   72 |     }
   73 | 
   74 |     let body = '';
   75 |     req.on('data', c => body += c);
   76 |     req.on('end', () => {
   77 |       let payload;
   78 |       try { payload = JSON.parse(body); }
   79 |       catch(e) { res.writeHead(400); res.end('bad json'); return; }
   80 | 
   81 |       const type   = payload._type || 'analysis';
   82 |       const prompt = payload.prompt || '';
   83 |       const model  = type === 'questions' ? MODEL_FAST : MODEL_SMART;
   84 | 
   85 |       console.log('  →  ' + type + ' (' + model + ')');
   86 | 
   87 |       geminiRequest(model, prompt, (err, status, respBody) => {
   88 |         if (err) {
   89 |           console.log('  ❌ Network error:', err.message);
   90 |           res.writeHead(502, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
   91 |           res.end(JSON.stringify({error: err.message}));
   92 |           return;
   93 |         }
   94 | 
   95 |         const icon = status < 300 ? '✅' : '❌';
   96 |         console.log('  ' + icon + '  ' + status + '  ' + type);
   97 | 
   98 |         if (status !== 200) {
   99 |           try {
  100 |             const e = JSON.parse(respBody);
  101 |             console.log('      Error:', e.error?.message || respBody.slice(0,120));
  102 |           } catch(_) { console.log('      Raw:', respBody.slice(0,120)); }
  103 |         }
  104 | 
  105 |         // Convert Gemini response → Anthropic-style response
  106 |         // so the HTML parsing code works without changes
  107 |         let anthropicStyle;
  108 |         try {
  109 |           const geminiData = JSON.parse(respBody);
  110 |           const text = (geminiData?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts||[])
  111 |             .map(p => p.text||'').join('');
  112 |           // Wrap in Anthropic content format
  113 |           anthropicStyle = JSON.stringify({
  114 |             candidates: geminiData.candidates,
  115 |             content: [{ type: 'text', text: text }]
  116 |           });
  117 |         } catch(_) {
  118 |           anthropicStyle = respBody;
  119 |         }
  120 | 
  121 |         res.writeHead(status, {
  122 |           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  123 |           'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'
  124 |         });
  125 |         res.end(anthropicStyle);
  126 |       });
  127 |     });
  128 |     return;
  129 |   }
  130 | 
  131 |   // ── Static files ────────────────────────────────────────────
  132 |   let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
  133 |   fp = path.join(process.cwd(), fp);
  134 |   fs.readFile(fp, (err, data) => {
  135 |     if (err) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
  136 |     res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fp)] || 'text/plain'});
  137 |     res.end(data);
  138 |   });
  139 | 
  140 | }).listen(PORT, () => {
  141 |   const ok = API_KEY && API_KEY !== 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE';
  142 |   console.log('');
  143 |   console.log('  Infopace — Gemini Edition (Free)');
  144 |   console.log('  ─────────────────────────────────────');
  145 |   console.log('  🌐  http://localhost:' + PORT);
  146 |   console.log('  🔑  Gemini key: ' + (ok ? '✅ Set (' + API_KEY.slice(0,16) + '...)' : '❌ NOT SET — edit line 8'));
  147 |   console.log('  🤖  Model: ' + MODEL_SMART);
  148 |   console.log('  ─────────────────────────────────────');
  149 |   if (!ok) {
  150 |     console.log('');
  151 |     console.log('  Get a free key at https://aistudio.google.com');
  152 |     console.log('  Then paste it on line 8 of server.js');
  153 |   }
  154 |   console.log('');
  155 | });

    1 | import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
    2 | import { onAuthChange, signOut } from "./lib/auth";
    3 | import AuthPage from "./pages/AuthPage";
    4 | import OnboardingForm from "./pages/OnboardingForm";
    5 | import AssessmentAndDashboard from "./pages/AssessmentAndDashboard";
    6 | 
    7 | export default function App() {
    8 |   const [authUser,  setAuthUser]  = useState(undefined); // undefined = loading
    9 |   const [userData,  setUserData]  = useState(null);      // onboarding form data
   10 |   const [view,      setView]      = useState("auth");    // "auth" | "onboard" | "dashboard"
   11 | 
   12 |   // Listen for Supabase auth state changes
   13 |   useEffect(() => {
   14 |     const { data: { subscription } } = onAuthChange(user => {
   15 |       setAuthUser(user);
   16 |       if (!user) {
   17 |         setView("auth");
   18 |         setUserData(null);
   19 |       } else if (view === "auth") {
   20 |         setView("onboard");
   21 |       }
   22 |     });
   23 |     return () => subscription.unsubscribe();
   24 |   }, []);
   25 | 
   26 |   // ── Loading splash ───────────────────────────────────────────
   27 |   if (authUser === undefined) {
   28 |     return (
   29 |       <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#EEF2F7] flex items-center justify-center">
   30 |         <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
   31 |           <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-[#0091DA] rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center font-mono font-bold text-white text-sm">IP</div>
   32 |           <div className="text-sm text-[#627289]">Loading…</div>
   33 |         </div>
   34 |       </div>
   35 |     );
   36 |   }
   37 | 
   38 |   // ── Auth page ────────────────────────────────────────────────
   39 |   if (!authUser || view === "auth") {
   40 |     return <AuthPage onAuth={user => { setAuthUser(user); setView("onboard"); }} />;
   41 |   }
   42 | 
   43 |   // ── Onboarding form ──────────────────────────────────────────
   44 |   if (view === "onboard" || !userData) {
   45 |     return (
   46 |       <OnboardingForm
   47 |         user={authUser}
   48 |         onComplete={data => {
   49 |           // Merge auth email into form data
   50 |           setUserData({ ...data, email: data.email || authUser.email });
   51 |           setView("dashboard");
   52 |         }}
   53 |       />
   54 |     );
   55 |   }
   56 | 
   57 |   // ── Dashboard ────────────────────────────────────────────────
   58 |   return (
   59 |     <AssessmentAndDashboard
   60 |       userData={userData}
   61 |       onRestart={() => {
   62 |         setUserData(null);
   63 |         setView("onboard");
   64 |       }}
   65 |     />
   66 |   );
   67 | }
   68 |

    1 | import { supabase } from "./supabase";
    2 | 
    3 | export async function signUp(email, password) {
    4 |   const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signUp({ email, password });
    5 |   if (error) throw new Error(error.message);
    6 |   return data;
    7 | }
    8 | 
    9 | export async function signIn(email, password) {
   10 |   const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({ email, password });
   11 |   if (error) throw new Error(error.message);
   12 |   return data;
   13 | }
   14 | 
   15 | export async function signOut() {
   16 |   const { error } = await supabase.auth.signOut();
   17 |   if (error) throw new Error(error.message);
   18 | }
   19 | 
   20 | export async function getUser() {
   21 |   const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   22 |   return user;
   23 | }
   24 | 
   25 | export function onAuthChange(callback) {
   26 |   return supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session) => {
   27 |     callback(session?.user ?? null);
   28 |   });
   29 | }

📄 FILE #15: src\lib\db.js

    1 | import { supabase } from "./supabase";
    2 | 
    3 | /**
    4 |  * Save a completed assessment to Supabase.
    5 |  * Linked to the currently logged-in user (if any).
    6 |  */
    7 | export async function saveSubmission({ userData, answers, result }) {
    8 |   const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
    9 | 
   10 |   const row = {
   11 |     user_id:       user?.id ?? null,
   12 |     name:          userData.name          || "",
   13 |     email:         userData.email         || "",
   14 |     phone:         userData.phone         || "",
   15 |     organization:  userData.organization  || "",
   16 |     role:          userData.role          || "",
   17 |     website:       userData.website       || "",
   18 |     linkedin:      userData.linkedin      || "",
   19 |     team_size:     userData.teamSize      || "",
   20 |     sector:        userData.sector        || "",
   21 |     geography:     userData.geography     || "",
   22 |     problem:       userData.problem       || "",
   23 |     stage:         userData.stage         || "",
   24 |     answers:       answers,
   25 |     overall_score: result?.overallScore   ?? null,
   26 |     grade:         result?.grade          ?? null,
   27 |     dimensions:    result?.dimensions     ?? null,
   28 |     analysis_json: result,
   29 |   };
   30 | 
   31 |   const { error } = await supabase.from("submissions").insert([row]);
   32 |   if (error) throw new Error(error.message);
   33 |   return true;
   34 | }
   35 | 
   36 | /**
   37 |  * Fetch all submissions for the current user.
   38 |  */
   39 | export async function getMySubmissions() {
   40 |   const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   41 |   if (!user) return [];
   42 | 
   43 |   const { data, error } = await supabase
   44 |     .from("submissions")
   45 |     .select("*")
   46 |     .eq("user_id", user.id)
   47 |     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
   48 | 
   49 |   if (error) throw new Error(error.message);
   50 |   return data || [];
   51 | }
   52 |

📄 FILE #16: src\lib\exportPdf.js

    1 | /**
    2 |  * exportPdf — generates a well-formatted PDF report
    3 |  * Uses a hidden iframe with print-styled HTML — no external libraries needed.
    4 |  */
    5 | export function exportPdf({ userData, answers, result }) {
    6 |   const now = new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-IN", {
    7 |     day: "2-digit", month: "long", year: "numeric",
    8 |   });
    9 | 
   10 |   const scoreCol =
   11 |     (result?.overallScore ?? 0) >= 70 ? "#00A3A1" :
   12 |     (result?.overallScore ?? 0) >= 50 ? "#E8A000" : "#C8002D";
   13 | 
   14 |   const dim = result?.dimensions || {};
   15 |   const dims = [
   16 |     { l: "Market Size",       v: dim.marketSize       ?? "—" },
   17 |     { l: "Audience Quality",  v: dim.audienceQuality  ?? "—" },
   18 |     { l: "Competitive Edge",  v: dim.competitionEdge  ?? "—" },
   19 |     { l: "Revenue Potential", v: dim.revenuePotential ?? "—" },
   20 |     { l: "Risk Profile",      v: dim.riskProfile      ?? "—" },
   21 |     { l: "Sector Fit",        v: dim.sectorFit        ?? "—" },
   22 |   ];
   23 | 
   24 |   const answerRows = Object.entries(answers || {})
   25 |     .filter(([, v]) => v && v !== "")
   26 |     .map(([k, v]) => `
   27 |       <tr>
   28 |         <td style="padding:7px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid #F3F4F6;font-size:11px;color:#6B7280;width:40%">${k}</td>
   29 |         <td style="padding:7px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid #F3F4F6;font-size:11px;color:#111827">${Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : v}</td>
   30 |       </tr>`)
   31 |     .join("");
   32 | 
   33 |   const insightRows = (result?.keyInsights || [])
   34 |     .map((ins, i) => `
   35 |       <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;padding:10px 14px;background:${i % 2 === 0 ? "#FAFAFA" : "#fff"};border:1px solid #F3F4F6;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
   36 |         <div style="width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:#0F1E3C;color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0">${i + 1}</div>
   37 |         <div style="font-size:12px;color:#374151;line-height:1.65">${ins.replace(/^[💡⚔️💰📍✅⚠️]\s*/u, "")}</div>
   38 |       </div>`)
   39 |     .join("");
   40 | 
   41 |   const riskRows = (result?.topRisks || [])
   42 |     .map((r, i) => `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:12px;color:#374151"><span style="color:#EF4444;font-weight:700">${i + 1}.</span>${r}</div>`)
   43 |     .join("");
   44 | 
   45 |   const winRows = (result?.quickWins || [])
   46 |     .map((w, i) => `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:12px;color:#374151"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:700">${i + 1}.</span>${w}</div>`)
   47 |     .join("");
   48 | 
   49 |   const html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
   50 | <html lang="en">
   51 | <head>
   52 |   <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
   53 |   <title>Infopace Market Assessment — ${userData.organization || "Report"}</title>
   54 |   <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
   55 |   <style>
   56 |     *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
   57 |     body{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;color:#111827;background:#fff;-webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;print-color-adjust:exact}
   58 |     @page{size:A4;margin:0}
   59 |     @media print{body{margin:0}}
   60 |     .page{max-width:794px;margin:0 auto;padding:0}
   61 |     /* Cover */
   62 |     .cover{background:#0F1E3C;padding:52px 56px 36px;position:relative;page-break-after:always}
   63 |     .cover-brand{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(148,163,184,.5);margin-bottom:20px}
   64 |     .cover-title{font-size:38px;font-weight:700;color:#F8FAFC;line-height:1;letter-spacing:-.02em;margin-bottom:10px}
   65 |     .cover-sub{font-size:13px;color:rgba(148,163,184,.6);margin-bottom:28px}
   66 |     .cover-badges{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:36px}

📄 FILE #17: src\lib\gemini.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------
    1 | /**
    2 |  * generateAnalysis — calls the Node proxy (server.js → Gemini)
    3 |  * Returns a parsed analysis object.
    4 |  */
    5 | export async function generateAnalysis(userData, answers = {}) {
    6 |   const answerLines = Object.entries(answers)
    7 |     .filter(([, v]) => v && v !== "")
    8 |     .map(([, v]) => `  - ${Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : v}`)
    9 |     .join("\n");
   10 | 
   11 |   const prompt = `You are a senior market intelligence analyst with deep knowledge of Indian and global markets.
   12 | 
   13 | Analyse this product and produce a data-driven market assessment using your real knowledge of this sector, geography, and companies.
   14 | 
   15 | PRODUCT: ${userData.organization || "Unnamed"}
   16 | SECTOR: ${userData.sector || "Not specified"}
   17 | BUSINESS TYPE: ${userData.role || "Not specified"}
   18 | TARGET GEOGRAPHY: ${userData.geography || "Not specified"}
   19 | BUSINESS STAGE: ${userData.stage || "Not specified"}
   20 | PROBLEM BEING SOLVED: ${userData.problem || "Not described"}
   21 | 
   22 | WHAT THE FOUNDER TOLD US ABOUT THEIR MARKET:
   23 | ${answerLines || "(answers not provided)"}
   24 | 
   25 | CRITICAL INSTRUCTIONS:
   26 | 1. Use your REAL knowledge of the ${userData.sector} market in ${userData.geography} — cite real TAM figures, real CAGR rates
   27 | 2. Name REAL competitors that actually exist in ${userData.sector} in ${userData.geography} — not placeholders
   28 | 3. Score those competitors based on your actual knowledge of their market position
   29 | 4. Revenue by region must reflect real market concentration for ${userData.sector} in ${userData.geography}
   30 | 5. The overall score must genuinely reflect the founder's answers above
   31 | 6. TAM/SAM/SOM must be realistic for this specific sector and geography
   32 | 
   33 | Return ONLY raw JSON, no markdown fences, no explanation before or after:
   34 | {
   35 | "overallScore": <0-100>,
   36 | "grade": "Excellent" or "Strong" or "Moderate" or "Needs Work" or "Critical",
   37 | "verdict": "<One specific sentence naming the product, its key opportunity, and its biggest risk>",
   38 | "realTimeInsight": "<One real market fact with actual numbers>",
   39 | "dimensions": {"marketSize":<0-100>,"audienceQuality":<0-100>,"competitionEdge":<0-100>,"revenuePotential":<0-100>,"riskProfile":<0-100>,"sectorFit":<0-100>},
   40 | "tamCrore": <realistic TAM in ₹Crore>,
   41 | "samCrore": <serviceable portion>,
   42 | "somCrore": <3-year realistic target>,
   43 | "growthRate": <real CAGR %>,
   44 | "competitorProfiles": [
   45 |   {"name":"<REAL company 1>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<real strength>","weakness":"<real gap>","marketSharePct":<realistic %>},
   46 |   {"name":"<REAL company 2>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<real strength>","weakness":"<real gap>","marketSharePct":<realistic %>},
   47 |   {"name":"<REAL company 3>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<real strength>","weakness":"<real gap>","marketSharePct":<realistic %>}
   48 | ],
   49 | "marketShare": [
   50 |   {"name":"<product>","pct":<1-10>,"val":"₹<somCrore>Cr"},
   51 |   {"name":"<real comp 1>","pct":<their share %>,"val":"₹<amount>Cr"},
   52 |   {"name":"<real comp 2>","pct":<their share %>,"val":"₹<amount>Cr"},
   53 |   {"name":"<real comp 3>","pct":<their share %>,"val":"₹<amount>Cr"},
   54 |   {"name":"Others","pct":<remainder>,"val":"—"}
   55 | ],
   56 | "revenueByRegion": {
   57 |   "labels": [<5-6 real cities relevant to the sector>],
   58 |   "currentMarket": [<real ₹Cr market size per city>],
   59 |   "projected2027": [<apply growthRate CAGR>],
   60 |   "ourTarget": [<realistic 2-8% of each city market>]
   61 | },
   62 | "competitorRadar": [
   63 |   {"name":"<product>","scores":{"pricingPower":<0-100>,"distribution":<0-100>,"brandValue":<0-100>,"innovation":<0-100>,"marketReach":<0-100>,"customerSat":<0-100>},"avg":"<average>"},
   64 |   {"name":"<comp 1>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"},
   65 |   {"name":"<comp 2>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"},
   66 |   {"name":"<comp 3>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"}
   67 | ],
   68 | "trendData": {
   69 |   "months": ["Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec","Jan","Feb","Mar"],
   70 |   "series": [
   71 |     {"label":"<product>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values 0-1% to 3-8%>]},
   72 |     {"label":"<comp 1>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~20-35%>]},
   73 |     {"label":"<comp 2>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~15-25%>]},
   74 |     {"label":"<comp 3>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~10-20%>]}
   75 |   ]
   76 | },
   77 | "geoRegions": {
   78 |   "Asia Pacific": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[4,50,156,356,360,392,410,458,702,704,764]},
   79 |   "North America": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[124,484,840]},
   80 |   "South America": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[32,68,76,152,170]},
   81 |   "Europe": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[276,250,826,380,724,528,208,752,756,616]},
   82 |   "Africa": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[566,710,404,818,12]}
   83 | },
   84 | "keyInsights": ["<insight 1 with numbers>","<insight 2>","<insight 3>","<insight 4>","<90-day action>"],
   85 | "topRisks": ["<risk 1>","<risk 2>","<risk 3>"],
   86 | "quickWins": ["<win 1>","<win 2>","<win 3>"],
   87 | "popups": {
   88 |   "mktshare": "<2 sentences: TAM/SAM/SOM + competitor context>",
   89 |   "revregion": "<2 sentences: priority cities and why>",
   90 |   "radar": "<2 sentences: where product leads and trails>",
   91 |   "trend": "<2 sentences: trajectory and inflection point>",
   92 |   "geomap": "<2 sentences: geographic focus rationale>"
   93 | }
   94 | }`;
   95 | 
   96 |   const resp = await fetch("/api", {
   97 |     method: "POST",
   98 |     headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   99 |     body: JSON.stringify({ _type: "analysis", prompt }),
  100 |   });
  101 | 
  102 |   if (!resp.ok) throw new Error("API error " + resp.status);
  103 | 
  104 |   const data = await resp.json();
  105 | 
  106 |   // Support both Gemini native format and Anthropic-style wrapper
  107 |   const allText = (data?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts || [])
  108 |     .map((p) => p.text || "")
  109 |     .join("") || (data?.content?.[0]?.text || "");
  110 | 
  111 |   if (!allText) throw new Error("Empty API response");
  112 | 
  113 |   let raw = allText.trim();
  114 |   const fm = raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
  115 |   if (fm) raw = fm[1].trim();
  116 | 
  117 |   const s0 = raw.indexOf("{"), e0 = raw.lastIndexOf("}");
  118 |   if (s0 === -1 || e0 === -1) throw new Error("No JSON in response");
  119 |   raw = raw.slice(s0, e0 + 1);
  120 | 
  121 |   return JSON.parse(raw);
  122 | }
  123 |

📄 FILE #18: src\lib\supabase.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------
    1 | import { createClient } from "@supabase/supabase-js";
    2 | 
    3 | const SUPABASE_URL  = import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL;
    4 | const SUPABASE_ANON = import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY;
    5 |

📄 FILE #20: src\pages\AssessmentAndDashboard.jsx

    1 | import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
    2 | import { generateAnalysis } from "../lib/gemini";
    3 | import { saveSubmission } from "../lib/db";
    4 | import { exportPdf } from "../lib/exportPdf";
    5 | 
    6 | // Maps React onboarding userData → dashboard.html iframe field codes
    7 | function buildPrefill(userData) {
    8 |   const SECTOR_MAP = {
    9 |     "Information Technology / SaaS": "IT",
   10 |     "Healthcare & Pharma":           "HC",
   11 |     "Financial Services / FinTech":  "FS",
   12 |     "E-Commerce & Retail":           "EC",
   13 |     "Education & EdTech":            "ED",
   14 |     "Manufacturing":                 "MF",
   15 |     "Real Estate & PropTech":        "RE",
   16 |     "Logistics & Supply Chain":      "LG",
   17 |     "Media & Entertainment":         "ME",
   18 |     "Agriculture & AgroTech":        "AG",
   19 |     "Energy & CleanTech":            "EN",
   20 |     "Other / General":               "OT",
   21 |   };
   22 |   const ROLE_BIZ_TYPE_MAP = {
   23 |     "Founder / Co-Founder": "B2B_SME",
   24 |     "CEO / MD":             "B2B_ENT",
   25 |     "CTO / CPO":            "B2B_SME",
   26 |     "CMO / VP Marketing":   "B2C_MASS",
   27 |     "Business Development": "B2B_SME",
   28 |     "Product Manager":      "B2B_SME",
   29 |     "Investor / VC":        "B2B_ENT",
   30 |     "Consultant / Advisor": "B2B_SME",
   31 |     "Other":                "B2B_SME",
   32 |   };
   33 | 
   34 |   return {
   35 |     organization: userData.organization,
   36 |     sectorCode:   SECTOR_MAP[userData.sector]    || "OT",
   37 |     bizTypeCode:  ROLE_BIZ_TYPE_MAP[userData.role] || "B2B_SME",
   38 |     geoCode:      userData.geography             || "PI",
   39 |     problem:      userData.problem,
   40 |     stage:        userData.stage,
   41 |   };
   42 | }
   43 | 
   44 | const LOADER_STEPS = [
   45 |   { n: 1, msg: "Reading your inputs…",                                      pct: 8  },
   46 |   { n: 2, msg: "Searching live market data & sector sizing…",               pct: 25 },
   47 |   { n: 3, msg: "Fetching real-time competitor profiles & funding data…",    pct: 48 },
   48 |   { n: 4, msg: "Calculating TAM/SAM/SOM, scores & 12-month projections…",   pct: 75 },
   49 |   { n: 5, msg: "Assembling your market intelligence dashboard…",            pct: 95 },
   50 | ];
   51 | 
   52 | export default function AssessmentAndDashboard({ userData, onRestart }) {
   53 |   const iframeRef      = useRef(null);
   54 |   const prefillSentRef = useRef(false);
   55 |   // Store latest result so the PDF export button can access it
   56 |   const latestResultRef = useRef(null);
   57 |   const latestFdRef     = useRef(null);
   58 | 
   59 |   function postToIframe(msg) {
   60 |     iframeRef.current?.contentWindow?.postMessage(msg, "*");
   61 |   }
   62 | 
   63 |   async function handleSubmit(fd) {
   64 |     latestFdRef.current = fd;
   65 | 
   66 |     // Drive loader steps in the iframe
   67 |     for (const s of LOADER_STEPS) {
   68 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: s.n, msg: s.msg, pct: s.pct });
   69 |       await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, s.n === 3 ? 150 : 300));
   70 |     }
   71 | 
   72 |     try {
   73 |       const result = await generateAnalysis(userData, fd.answers || {});
   74 |       latestResultRef.current = result;
   75 | 
   76 |       // Save to Supabase (non-blocking)
   77 |       saveSubmission({ userData, answers: fd.answers || {}, result })
   78 |         .catch(e => console.warn("DB save failed:", e.message));
   79 | 
   80 |       // Render dashboard in iframe
   81 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: result });
   82 | 
   83 |     } catch (err) {
   84 |       console.error("Analysis failed:", err);
   85 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: 5, msg: "Running offline analysis…", pct: 95 });
   86 |       setTimeout(() => {
   87 |         postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: {} });
   88 |       }, 800);
   89 |     }
   90 |   }
   91 | 
   92 |   useEffect(() => {
   93 |     function handleMessage(event) {
   94 |       if (!event.data) return;
   95 | 
   96 |       // Iframe loaded — send prefill
   97 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_LOADED") {
   98 |         if (!prefillSentRef.current) {
   99 |           prefillSentRef.current = true;
  100 |           postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_PREFILL", userData: buildPrefill(userData) });
  101 |         }
  102 |       }
  103 | 
  104 |       // User clicked Generate Dashboard
  105 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_SUBMIT") {
  106 |         handleSubmit(event.data.fd);
  107 |       }
  108 | 
  109 |       // Export PDF clicked inside the iframe sidebar
  110 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_EXPORT_PDF") {
  111 |         handleExportPdf();
  112 |       }
  113 | 
  114 |       // New Assessment
  115 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_RESET") {
  116 |         onRestart();
  117 |       }
  118 |     }
  119 | 
  120 |     window.addEventListener("message", handleMessage);
  121 |     return () => window.removeEventListener("message", handleMessage);
  122 |   }, [userData]);
  123 | 
  124 |   function handleExportPdf() {
  125 |     exportPdf({
  126 |       userData,
  127 |       answers:  latestFdRef.current?.answers || {},
  128 |       result:   latestResultRef.current || {},
  129 |     });
  130 |   }
  131 | 
  132 |   return (
  133 |     <iframe
  134 |       ref={iframeRef}
  135 |       src="/dashboard.html"
  136 |       style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, border: "none", width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
  137 |       title="Infopace Assessment"
  138 |       sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups allow-downloads"
  139 |     />
  140 |   );
  141 | }
  142 |

📄 FILE #21: src\pages\AuthPage.jsx
